# AMERICA FIRST. NAVY VETERAN. PROVEN LEADER.
---
| |
---
---
| Peter,
Freedom is at stake. Not just here, but across the world.
[This week, I joined the John Solomon Show](https://km78svhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013SYq7kIRm_COjDvtlpo42tDi9UKOej-SLXjNSqbX7L9TQ7hrunK2-LdL_t1L8G2-3pR8Yzs-mMx11LRGYaFLUdyCDVH-wO22y3mkmToEvFkxdm8Mb4i009keA3Pb0KRE-OPaTq7nKcO2LZfAOl1XMg9UzT5WN_nKUATZWSU1PFSWuzZ4Z60d1ToRooqoU2lUzcBmHHo07Nw=&c=DOSTkBjhHeor1tjHaInVuWnXSDDZCZ7qExiMBh0OOVgeh3-pkLW0Yg==&ch=p9XDiw7_PDIl-M7-2Xd4Eu4DIiXjBGjSvelR9j5HXEwZQO3pAwt5rA==) to discuss the the race for Florida's 23rd Congressional District, and the importance of this seat not only for Florida but for the country.
President Trump has been taking on the corrupt dictators across the world that threaten our nation's safety and security. District 23 needs someone representing them that will stand with the President, and stand up to dictators and terrorists.
This week all eyes have been on Iran, whose continuous attempts to secure nuclear weapons makes them an ongoing significant threat. As a global sponsor of terrorism for nearly 50 years, preventing the Iranian regime from acquiring nuclear weapons is imperative for the security of the United States as well as our allies.
The weeks prior, the spotlight was on the failing governments in Cuba and Venezuela -- two countries in our own backyard whose people have suffered while their dictators enriched themselves and built close relationships with Iran, Russia and China.
But The DC Democrats didn't stand up to these dangerous regimes, they befriended them! And they continue to oppose the President's actions to keep our country safe and secure, choosing political partisanship over national security.
These international threats underscore the importance of supporting our military and ensuring we maintain a strong national defense. As a Navy Veteran, who served on a fast attack submarine, I know first hand what is at stake as our servicemen confront the evil regimes across the world.
A Republican majority in Congress is key to guaranteeing our President and military receive the support they need to keep our nation safe!
I'm running to represent Florida's 23rd Congressional District to stand up to terrorists, ensure we maintain the strongest military in the world, defend our nation and maintain our sacred freedoms.
Join our team and fight for what really matters \- a safe and secure country now and in the future.
I need your support to win this seat.
---

clean_body: The country is at stake! | | | | | == | AMERICA FIRST. NAVY VETERAN. PROVEN LEADER. | | | Peter, Freedom is at stake. Not just here, but across the world. == to discuss the the race for Florida's 23rd Congressional District, and the importance of this seat not only for Florida but for the country. President Trump has been taking on the corrupt dictators across the world that threaten our nation's safety and security. District 23 needs someone representing them that will stand with the President, and stand up to dictators and terrorists. This week all eyes have been on Iran, whose continuous attempts to secure nuclear weapons makes them an ongoing significant threat. As a global sponsor of terrorism for nearly 50 years, preventing the Iranian regime from acquiring nuclear weapons is imperative for the security of the United States as well as our allies. The weeks prior, the spotlight was on the failing governments in Cuba and Venezuela -- two countries in our own backyard whose people have suffered while their dictators enriched themselves and built close relationships with Iran, Russia and China. But The DC Democrats didn't stand up to these dangerous regimes, they befriended them! And they continue to oppose the President's actions to keep our country safe and secure, choosing political partisanship over national security. These international threats underscore the importance of supporting our military and ensuring we maintain a strong national defense. As a Navy Veteran, who served on a fast attack submarine, I know first hand what is at stake as our servicemen confront the evil regimes across the world. A Republican majority in Congress is key to guaranteeing our President and military receive the support they need to keep our nation safe! I'm running to represent Florida's 23rd Congressional District to stand up to terrorists, ensure we maintain the strongest military in the world, defend our nation and maintain our sacred freedoms. Join our team and fight for what really matters \- a safe and secure country now and in the future. I need your support to win this seat. | | == | Sincerely, | George | == == | | == | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIA FOR UPDATES! | == == == == mailto:info@george4congress.com | == | == | == | == | == | | | | == | Paid for by George Moraitis for Congress Committee Use of candidate's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | | | | George Moraitis for Congress | 1103 Hays Street | Tallahassee, FL 32301 US | | | | | | |

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 3.6.2026
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-atjttdt-didthutlhu-g/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-atjttdt-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,33 days until the Supreme Court election, and 66% of voters are still undecided. It is CRITICAL that we continue spreading the word about Chris Taylor's dangerous policies.Help us spread the word by sharing our website, [ChrisTaylorforWI.com](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-atjttdt-didthutlhu-y/)!-Team WisGOP **Chris Taylor is DANGEROUS for Wisconsin** Time and again, Chris Taylor has put politics over protecting Wisconsin's most vulnerable. As a state legislator, she opposed a [straightforward bill](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-atjttdt-didthutlhu-j/) that would have kept sexually violent offenders from living near their victims or within 1,500 feet of schools, child care centers, and other places where kids gather, needlessly endangering families across the state. She doubled down on that anti-victim stance by voting [against Marsy's Law not once, but twice](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-atjttdt-didthutlhu-t/): a bipartisan constitutional amendment that gave victims 16 essential new rights, from dignity and protection to timely notifications about releases or escapes. Wisconsin voters approved it by a resounding 75% in 2020, yet Taylor stood against the clear will of the people. She even [opposed tougher penalties](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-atjttdt-didthutlhu-i/) for those who intimidate domestic violence survivors. Now, with her campaign ads claiming to champion survivors, her long record tells the real story: Chris Taylor has repeatedly failed to stand up for crime victims when it mattered most.

Beyond failing victims, Chris Taylor has pushed [extreme gender ideology that threatens the privacy and safety of Wisconsin children.](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-atjttdt-didthutlhu-d/) During her time in the legislature, she actively fought efforts to keep bathrooms single-sex and co-authored a bill requiring all state-owned restrooms, including those in schools and even male facilities, to stock tampons and sanitary napkins. This isn't about helping anyone; it's about erasing basic biological differences and opening girls' private spaces to boys under the banner of "inclusivity." Wisconsin parents understand that protecting daughters' privacy is common sense, not politics. Taylor's actions show she's more committed to far-left agendas than to the safety and well-being of our kids.

The hypocrisy doesn't stop there. The [Milwaukee Journal Sentinel](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-atjttdt-didthutlhu-h/) exposed Chris Taylor's blatant political opportunism, revealing how she abandons her own principles the moment they become inconvenient. As a legislator, she pushed for judicial ethics reforms, including strict recusal rules to prevent judges from hearing cases involving major campaign donors. Yet now, as she campaigns for the Supreme Court, backed by special interests, she dismisses her own proposals as "not workable" and refuses to stand by them. When big money is on the line, Taylor flips faster than she can say principles. Wisconsin deserves leaders with consistent integrity, not politicians who bend their ethics to chase power and campaign cash.

More alarmingly, Chris Taylor has made clear she wants Wisconsin's courts packed with ideological activists rather than impartial jurists. In a glowing [recommendation letter](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-atjttdt-didthutlhu-k/), she endorsed longtime Democrat Lena Taylor for a judgeship, praising her specifically for her "continued advocacy" on liberal causes and making plain that she believes ideological activism belongs on the bench. Judges take a solemn oath to administer justice without respect to persons and to faithfully, impartially apply the law, not to serve as advocates for any political agenda. Yet, Taylor sees the judiciary as a backdoor tool to impose far-left policies when voters and the legislature reject them. If she thinks outspoken activists like Lena Taylor are what our courts need, imagine the extreme left-wing operative she would become as a Supreme Court justice. Wisconsin families deserve neutral umpires who follow the Constitution and the law, not politicians in black robes determined to force through failed progressive ideas the people have repeatedly turned down. **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). clean_body: No images? Patriot,33 days until the Supreme Court election, and 66% of voters are still undecided. It is CRITICAL that we continue spreading the word about Chris Taylor's dangerous policies.Help us spread the word by sharing our website, WisGOP Chris Taylor is DANGEROUS for Wisconsin Time and again, Chris Taylor has put politics over protecting Wisconsin's most vulnerable. As a state legislator, she opposed a that would have kept sexually violent offenders from living near their victims or within 1,500 feet of schools, child care centers, and other places where kids gather, needlessly endangering families across the state. She doubled down on that anti-victim stance by voting : a bipartisan constitutional amendment that gave victims 16 essential new rights, from dignity and protection to timely notifications about releases or escapes. Wisconsin voters approved it by a resounding 75% in 2020, yet Taylor stood against the clear will of the people. She even for those who intimidate domestic violence survivors. Now, with her campaign ads claiming to champion survivors, her long record tells the real story: Chris Taylor has repeatedly failed to stand up for crime victims when it mattered most. Beyond failing victims, Chris Taylor has pushed During her time in the legislature, she actively fought efforts to keep bathrooms single-sex and co-authored a bill requiring all state-owned restrooms, including those in schools and even male facilities, to stock tampons and sanitary napkins. This isn't about helping anyone; it's about erasing basic biological differences and opening girls' private spaces to boys under the banner of "inclusivity." Wisconsin parents understand that protecting daughters' privacy is common sense, not politics. Taylor's actions show she's more committed to far-left agendas than to the safety and well-being of our kids. The hypocrisy doesn't stop there. The exposed Chris Taylor's blatant political opportunism, revealing how she abandons her own principles the moment they become inconvenient. As a legislator, she pushed for judicial ethics reforms, including strict recusal rules to prevent judges from hearing cases involving major campaign donors. Yet now, as she campaigns for the Supreme Court, backed by special interests, she dismisses her own proposals as "not workable" and refuses to stand by them. When big money is on the line, Taylor flips faster than she can say principles. Wisconsin deserves leaders with consistent integrity, not politicians who bend their ethics to chase power and campaign cash. More alarmingly, Chris Taylor has made clear she wants Wisconsin's courts packed with ideological activists rather than impartial jurists. In a glowing , she endorsed longtime Democrat Lena Taylor for a judgeship, praising her specifically for her "continued advocacy" on liberal causes and making plain that she believes ideological activism belongs on the bench. Judges take a solemn oath to administer justice without respect to persons and to faithfully, impartially apply the law, not to serve as advocates for any political agenda. Yet, Taylor sees the judiciary as a backdoor tool to impose far-left policies when voters and the legislature reject them. If she thinks outspoken activists like Lena Taylor are what our courts need, imagine the extreme left-wing operative she would become as a Supreme Court justice. Wisconsin families deserve neutral umpires who follow the Constitution and the law, not politicians in black robes determined to force through failed progressive ideas the people have repeatedly turned down. subject: Toxic Water Warning
body:
Hometown water supply in danger
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Toxic water warning | **The Invisible Threat In Millions of Homes** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **The worst drinking water outbreak in U.S. history sent 403,000 to the hospital and killed 69. No alarms. No warnings.** The drinking water in their homes appeared safe, but was contaminated with a deadly pathogen. Families didn't fail. The systems they trusted failed. This outbreak proved that clear, normal-looking water can be dangerously contaminated. That's why experts still study this outbreak for one reason: It can happen again. In fact, here's what should truly concern you... Federal authorities and national security experts are now reporting something even more disturbing: **The FBI warns the next deadly contamination may be _intentional_.** _Hackers are attacking water systems in our home towns, overriding safety protocols, weaponizing our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes._ America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot, and national security experts warn it's not just China. Iran, Russia and North Korea are also preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share! Folks have been calling, emailing and leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **5X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **But hurry - we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** Order today you'll also get a FREE Bonus Package with 7 FREE Gifts worth $263.75!
* **FREE Gift #1:** FREE Aqua-Tote Collapsible Water Container ($16.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #2:** FREE Personal Water Filter Straw ($24.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #3:** FREE "Water Solutions" Online Class ($149.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #4:** FREE Water Survival Digital Guide ($9.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #5:** FREE "What's in your Tap Water" Digital Guide ($9.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #6:** $25.00 Savings Certificate
* **FREE Gift #7:** FREE Shipping and Handling

[**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) The best part is... _**This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!**_ It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria - up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses - up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts - up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 200+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. [**Now we've just got a fresh batch in!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.**

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Derrick loves the convenience of his MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System: _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_ **Customers Love Their Ultimate
Water Filtration System!** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **_Cyndi L._**_
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others."_ _**Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time."_ _**Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water."_ _**Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious."_ _**Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you."_ _**Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day."_ [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Who’s Watching Your Tax Dollars?

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | A Tesla Explosion That Changes Everything | Near Trump Tower in Las Vegas, a Tesla Cybertruck exploded—and it’s raising serious questions. **Good morning!** On this day in 1862, Union forces under Gen. Samuel Curtis clashed with Gen. Earl Van Dorn’s Confederate army at the Battle of Pea Ridge—also known as [the Battle of Elkhorn Tavern](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMZ2RGQPmFi5uQ5dtt0QTPMSzMXZkO0G8_SqrfYOtP-no6P-8LBfkwPH2gTvZuqUl0lEC1Up5ecY1RceVU8RQnjlTdJQdngsoGKXSUpnFIYdz6RtnNyIg3ZDtjIFpgqHXjbf9ME2rc4PbBppWdSUko43pNtTdANO_hu17TWllug4AuhbQjIom3dE4jOiU6BU5rim3X4lj9bSFM70ot2vam2B9rY8i9H8Bs4D5OI7Wc6kpn28XMFfPRTo8JUf5KwLmHfPqpREwX7HWQDJt8kEoM7sbSQp3n3KUFV-Uo8R8x1iwNNm6x8EhcBmN6NVtRw4_N-qf2r0sfAcAAP__CeqFbQ)—in northwest Arkansas. The fighting lasted two days and ended in a Confederate defeat.

America moves its clocks ahead one hour at 2 a.m. tonight (well, technically Sunday morning), which means we lose an hour in the morning, but gain an hour of extra daylight in the evening. Daylight saving time is a controversial issue that never seems to go away. Let us know what you think about it in today’s _Poll_ below.

## Trump Calls for 'Unconditional Surrender'
President Trump declared Friday on Truth Social that there would be no deal to end the U.S. war against Iran [without "unconditional surrender,"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFvgzAUhH-N2UCPZ7DJ4KELW7p2tBz7EV5l7Mg4Qfn3FR36B7qcTjrpO919Xe3VceR0_3Qbmbpkm-jYI9VKxT6Tzylw5Zxc3J-lUApUgntbBFQtyBa0DY7j2w5NMAsRkmzI9FrjNOE4yGY13qMbFY3gJxX0pBftbzR60vqCF1CqYXPSQILue0TsO3RaAU2yJzUqF0AMQIFrLt135lRXWuI7v6h0Pm9NNGutj13ID4GzwPk4js6nmz9DgfOJFjiDPOV0tTy3R8vFpTZzbP9WdWvdYlNMeBwcI-9KiwHum-P4W1P_9c3L4E8AAAD__5gHdxk) rejecting mediation efforts that Iran's president said had begun. [In his post,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2q4zAUBOCnsboE6ejPKVQsLO6y1cKW5kQ6jrXIkpHkhLz9xfcVbjsDH8z8u893jCnm5x_cyPWlzJneLVHvVOcj-5JD7LFkTO2olXKgGvAzAwdz4fLC7Rwwps-sWHALEZBk5IS1MI6glWSrk-gfIRi0XNsbeq0foxcLeKvw9hBKsuhOjUtuhQAAcQW0htMoBRltMPBBcQqxl3r9X2LuKy3pU15Ur75sLLm1970N8tcA0wBTr0dfW_ER09mfoeKVMP0-R4S_9dj2Aaa9tN4GmIQwYgSthZQWtDJKsurC_o4pxWbsoPhzw_hNsf6jf14OvgIAAP__qKB3ug) Trump said that after Iran surrenders, _“we, and many of our wonderful and very brave allies and partners, will work tirelessly to bring Iran back from the brink of destruction, making it economically bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.”_ U.S. crude oil on Friday posted its [biggest weekly gain in futures trading history](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL8GOiOz5gwpXKShu7Qp0WIvx0bGPi3m0P19RH4hzWikkd5I7_s-3ZEjp8cXbuTKkqdE5x6pFJLpSD6nwIVzwrgfIpQCScD3BBqs0kbpfgrI8T11dXALEZCpybV9D8MAt87Uq-swGBqIhj58tK23Vt80kkfbefRzMDW7i6aN7tsWANoGsLeaBtOSvVkMuuo0BS5Zmp_Mqay0xHd-kTQ-b3V0aynPvTKfFYwVjOd5Nj7N_horGC90BaM2V1yNBZM6dnWiqMxRPYU97WoWSkWdhdWMIhTVcpRDaG_WssVaXHieHCPvtq86_diQ4997-Zeyl4PfAAAA__9SXYAz), surging 35% this week as the war triggered a major disruption to global fuel supplies. The U.S. stock market fell Friday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average dropping 450 points. Meanwhile, intense Israeli strikes [continued pounding Tehran](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAURE8DnZH9DZjGRRq6TZsSefHA_sSYlW0W7e0jcoXUM5rRe1-36eY4cFw_3QZbln2KOHNAKUjTEec9ei68RxfykRKiR_LuPZGkXkgtpJm84_Ce2trbBSDoGlYZQ8NAXavrh8Uyq3s3GLUomjXQKWivzOI8WtnD1GyvNamlUYqIVEPO9BKDVui73nlZtRKey56a751jeWAJ7_2F1Mz7Vgf7KOWZK_1R0VjReJ5nM9_zRXHlFY2BXxDH07uCXNF4ZMHJRXG6JDgnhyBySfyDLBJW3iCKSyvK1a2T9c-TQ-Dcm6qV6-Y4_N2Wf7l6WfoNAAD__0lZgAc) and Beirut overnight, while Iran has attacked neighboring Gulf nations with missiles and drones. ## Military to ID Unknown Pearl Harbor Dead
The U.S. military announced plans to [exhume the remains of 88 Pearl Harbor](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ_GdEZmzeG7wsXf0N3fpkQLXo6NjI1sc4Q8fUReId1II43m-z6ewxPZc3j9x5VsmeMQ6MieSqE07GGKwXHhGNDnPSUKjpLDcwAFnVRaKjM4ZH8ObeXsTASkK7KNMXC_w63V1WKnxrQ4weOBSukZRvfo2hGbm9KdaWmEiu21prQyTQMATQ1oOkV33VB369Ap0SpyXGKqPyOHstDsz_imVE9xrbxdStmy0P8E9AL64zjqacwXxdUL6K8ooN-z3DyGLOlr2VeS7CgUnk-ZaEUOWW6EycsF0xiTzMg-piz3nCUm_o4BBfRVsm472HvOnRGteq3I_vdG-ZO7t4WfAAAA___frIWS) sailors and Marines from the _USS Arizona_ sailors who were buried as unknowns in a Honolulu cemetery, hoping to finally identify them using DNA technology. Disinterments from the National Memorial Cemetery of the Pacific are [set to begin in November or December](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMRnItI3NBA4uIZtLL0QNbg99MjYynkHz96vZYH9g45JKr-rffb4jR06Pv7iTqyHPia4zUq1U5mdac_JcOSeM57MUSp6Kx_cMEkwrVSvt7JHje9aNd4EISDXkemthHGHQqtmcRxu0QoPjYv1tXfTahxDkooACwNA37D5tUknb9wDQd4DWSBpVT2Yw6KXQkjzXXLr_mVPdKMR3flHp1rw30W21HqdQfwRMAqbrurqzFj7o_OQCphdVKphOAdMPWwuYDsIS2w3LkkvLnlLlwCt-1rb-QGxB3rQZzK3b6h6b4vxxcYx8Giu0fOzI8VtQf3Xby8FXAAAA__-EZ4EX), with about eight sets of remains removed every two to three weeks. The effort follows similar projects over the past decade that identified hundreds of crew members from the _USS Oklahoma_ , _USS West Virginia_ , and other ships. A grassroots campaign called Operation 85 has collected DNA from family members of 626 sailors and Marines—nearly 60% of those still missing—to convince Pentagon officials to exhume the bodies, a move the military has been reluctant to take.
## Clocks Spring Forward Tonight
Tonight’s the night almost all Americans [set their clocks forward](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3uozAQxU9jOtAwJkAKF9vQZdst0SQeYFbGjuxJELdfsVf4d0960vv4_XnMD5Igcf1NOztd0hz5KIFVOc-f-ErRi0qKFMonZ46es6dzRsC-BlvDMHuScM5d5d3CjGwrdu0w4DjirbPV5uyTiSwxjIDesr23cAMmP_rlbgmelbgrDSwMbYuIbYM09MCjbbm_9eTBdMBeNOXmb5KoGy_hTF_OzSvtVXCb6rsY-8vgZHA6jqN5Pcv14vINTpc0OHk6g6yb1oW-EtdSq-xcF6Wspb4WGJyq7Pz7kBCk9IPpYN1Jwv8a_RGbr8N_AQAA___2IHkX) by one hour at 2 a.m. Sunday morning as daylight saving time begins for 2026. Hawaii and Arizona are the only states that don't observe the change. Momentum to end the twice-yearly clock switch continues in Congress. The Daylight Act of 2026, introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R-Florida), would move clocks [forward 30 minutes permanently](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u2zAQBODTUB0NcimJfgWLNOpe2pTESlyZG_DHoGg7un2gXCH1AIOZ79e3_0ZOXB4_MZPre_WFPkei3qn5V9lqCdy5FkzHqzUqgVrA04OCWSojlfUBOZ1-HILbiYDMQE5bC_c7TKMZovtSMwbUd22MXbdZTUatEyrYv1aAUY8Du6tNGWW1BgB9A7SzorvRNE8zBiVGRYF7bbfflUuPtKezvqndtpqH5GLvz0OYHwIWAUuPFDmlKxOwxJrpOiRgKfTn6Nh8psDoP9xIwDLZEWBSMmLaZcAz8SN2eeCby0N2ziS3-kpBrrTVTPJJLWOh0uXrkpCFPnLllAQsQ3Ph-eGU-JitGNUjI_9bMfT_Yn07-BsAAP__M1eNow) and stop the seasonal changes altogether. Lawmakers in at least 15 states [have introduced legislation this session](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUD2y2yAQPg3q8CCQhBqKNOpe2pTMGtZiEwQeWNvR7TPKFV63M_v9__ryX0CZyv4TDnT8qL7gp2dkxuZfJdQSiakWyP3VGpaILcLptdKLVEYq6yNQPv00RPdA1GgGdKO1el31PJkhuSmqCQLaWd1HY9DEeFcrGDRrCDACDuQuNWWUHUet9XjTYBeFqxlxmReISkwKI3Ftt9-VCid85LO-sd1CPYbsEvOzC_ND6E3ojRMmyvn6Cb2leuBVSOit4N_O0PyBkcB_qKHQ22zVYtdFRjgz7YllhzeVXTIdKDlhR9kZGLuEhhJyQ4inDLV0itgu5J1y7pKrzDX8uSgyXNflODQXnx_KmfpixaT2A-h_sIG_tfTb6X8BAAD__-wwllM) aimed at locking the clocks either on permanent daylight saving time or permanent standard time. Nineteen states have already passed bills calling for year-round daylight saving time, pending federal approval. A 2025 Gallup poll found that [54% of Americans](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL8GOpBZgw2Fi2vS5dor0YLXsCfHjmwniL8_kV-4dkaa0Xs_9_mO7Dls3_ggU1ycAx3ZUymU5ldYY7BcOAb0-ZUSBUvJ4jmDANUI2Qg9W2R_zn1tjSMCkjWZTmsYRxh6We_G2WGZVj3B5AQIWsBNCmjsR6nVIpehZnOtCSl01wFA1wJqJWiUHalBoRVVL8hyian9jRzKTs6f8U2pXeOj9mYv5Zkr-VXBrYLbcRxtiRbPq63g5tnRFe8UGs6NxdPztpcm45vD1nxA0hoQhmkCWSdjnwd7z1npqhfbA9l_fsq_5LwN_AUAAP__ab530A) would prefer to stop changing their clocks though Congress has yet to act. For now, the spring-forward, fall-back cycle remains the law of the land.

On this day in 1862, Union forces under Gen. Samuel Curtis clashed with Gen. Earl Van Dorn’s Confederate army at the Battle of Pea Ridge—also known as —in northwest Arkansas. The fighting lasted two days and ended in a Confederate defeat. America moves its clocks ahead one hour at 2 a.m. tonight (well, technically Sunday morning), which means we lose an hour in the morning, but gain an hour of extra daylight in the evening. Daylight saving time is a controversial issue that never seems to go away. Let us know what you think about it in today’s Poll below. A lot of you reading are either already retired or getting close. You’ve done the hard part. You saved. You invested. You built meaningful assets. Now the question is not “Can I retire?” It is “How do I make this money last and actually enjoy it?” If this sounds like you and download their free resource. | Trump Calls for 'Unconditional Surrender' President Trump declared Friday on Truth Social that there would be no deal to end the U.S. war against Iran rejecting mediation efforts that Iran's president said had begun. Trump said that after Iran surrenders, “we, and many of our wonderful and very brave allies and partners, will work tirelessly to bring Iran back from the brink of destruction, making it economically bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.” U.S. crude oil on Friday posted its , surging 35% this week as the war triggered a major disruption to global fuel supplies. The U.S. stock market fell Friday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average dropping 450 points. Meanwhile, intense Israeli strikes and Beirut overnight, while Iran has attacked neighboring Gulf nations with missiles and drones. The State Department said thousands of U.S. citizen were still stranded in the Middle East. Military to ID Unknown Pearl Harbor Dead The U.S. military announced plans to sailors and Marines from the USS Arizona sailors who were buried as unknowns in a Honolulu cemetery, hoping to finally identify them using DNA technology. Disinterments from the National Memorial Cemetery of the Pacific are , with about eight sets of remains removed every two to three weeks. The effort follows similar projects over the past decade that identified hundreds of crew members from the USS Oklahoma , USS West Virginia , and other ships. A grassroots campaign called Operation 85 has collected DNA from family members of 626 sailors and Marines—nearly 60% of those still missing—to convince Pentagon officials to exhume the bodies, a move the military has been reluctant to take. Clocks Spring Forward Tonight Tonight’s the night almost all Americans by one hour at 2 a.m. Sunday morning as daylight saving time begins for 2026. Hawaii and Arizona are the only states that don't observe the change. Momentum to end the twice-yearly clock switch continues in Congress. The Daylight Act of 2026, introduced by Rep. Greg Steube (R-Florida), would move clocks and stop the seasonal changes altogether. Lawmakers in at least 15 states aimed at locking the clocks either on permanent daylight saving time or permanent standard time. Nineteen states have already passed bills calling for year-round daylight saving time, pending federal approval. A 2025 Gallup poll found that would prefer to stop changing their clocks though Congress has yet to act. For now, the spring-forward, fall-back cycle remains the law of the land. | The following stories are featured exclusively on The Flyover Podcast—a daily show that gives you the most important headlines in under 15 minutes, straight from the heart of the country.Clicking the link will take you directly to these stories: ➤ U.S. jobs fell by nearly 100,000 in February, catching economists off guard after promising forecasts. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

And it’s not just words. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | This is not just another feud. ## Rep. Tony Gonzales Ends Re-election Bid
Rep. Tony Gonzales announced late Thursday night that he was [dropping his re-election](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGq4zAQRb9G7ibIsh05hYtt3L1ttzQTaRQLFI2Rxi_xfv3iwH7Ba4aBC4d7uH--li-MKebHb3zSJO_AS6ZXTSRCZXlw_ouJqi-8Vd5F6I25VtkXo80VdAfaLh5jOpa-8dNd-1vb0NRaa8Zx0Fo36-TMeNPBjbYdnR396O-u19fWuVETItkmTidMd9q2RnetvdzvXXujwQfX2yEMg-o1-ShcLrLSWaGGdPA3lYvjZ5OmVWSrqvulzKzMnI-Nq5yRMvNJVmbW3XnOb69w-ikzf0BQaAPhfMB_Vfi4Au8CHKDsmUOAgo4gcIFClMhJ5AweD8AgVAD9M4rE_ABhwBAwFnhFWYHegNETvFaGgIIpHVBJYKVSKQXgDCEWUmZuyuS3V0wp1qtVvX48MaaPnvxslO_J_AsAAP__ETalhQ) bid for the U.S. House, after admitting he had an extramarital affair with a former aide, Regina Santos-Aviles, who died by self-immolation in September. _"After deep reflection and with the support of my loving family, I have decided not to seek re-election,”_ Gonzales posted on X. He had [initially denied](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O2zAQRk9DdTRGpP5cqHCwUOc0KZJOGIsjexCKFMjxcp3TB_IVtv6AD--939f5iuw53H_iRqN8rXEOVLInEUrzPYZ_6Cm7FPccnyL0hSFnec4GTKfBauhnh-xfc1O58QbuXFc01n1vhqEFgOoxdgOBQbCuAaoba2khGLDrz67uGhzOFY_HGVjoawO27k-3m63P1Lp1afp2bVvVADmWmE7yoAMhr_4VPymdlrhVfnyI7FnZizKTMlMp5bTlcGzKTBT0MyszHVLHGJN3ykzvF-2xbPiXkn776USaPC3CMegbO42rUNLoNhbhcNe4rshJF5aHRnakzIRJXy71nw97ZWWnuLBT9uPHkZNK_kVpr9Lo9sLec-561cB9Q_Zvbvle7c_R_A8AAP__lxSWiQ) the affair with Santo-Aviles and maintained on Wednesday that her death had nothing to do with their relationship. The announcement comes as fellow [Republicans urged Gonzales](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOqNlwRgKF9fQ5dorkbEXYsmxkb0JyT39iUj3BH830kij75s_t-VmfPBx_20epPm9pSXSWQIxU172FP-aQMXldJT0ZKa3iaXwc0HAQUAnQC3O-PBZ-trpFdzU1qRbpXAcJQDUd03gFEyjw9XKaXS2UyAnnBxONA52bGuvrzHoQLUIXauade3aiaTbbK_kJmXVAznPKTd8pwuhbOGTXpQbmx510Hfmo1TdrwrnCufzPJu42svi6iucjxQ8e1sqnG2Ke6ZyxUyH4BQ_4r-k-FqKTIICWfYpitU7kW00OCBIWWftjtOH4Mugqh72h_Hhy8A_e-6l8V8AAAD__5aVhQQ) to end his campaign and address __ "these very serious allegations directly with his constituents and his colleagues.” Gonzales was set for a runoff with Brandon Herrera after failing to secure enough votes for the Republican nomination in this week’s primaries.

## Canyon Ranked Among Prettiest Towns in U.S.
The city of Canyon ranks as one of [America’s prettiest towns](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yhCAUhZ8GO5wLirgFRRq7TZvSQbkoCcoOXPcnT59ZXyHlvefMN9-cr-t4tSGGffm0Gxp6-jTu-CgRiTCPS9p_bcTicrqVdBDh0-6l0DFKkB2HhoMenQ3xNbaVMxO4i6jQCK1l3ysAqFZju76TSnmcRGfVpevaVmqhm15qq9E3VTBvGDSghYRG6HqaGnFB5fzcauWVYi2gC5RyTSu-FYqPr3THXM9pq6JZiW6FNR9MDkwOlO0dY_2ya0rvApPDcgSHhcnh2AOh44UsnfcJY3KwmcIcz1fyPszBRn5mnNJj599HIZ7t_oOOCwEAIHVbr7TFKht3e4QYQ-k0a2HZbIinFv1vzLuRfwEAAP__xx2KjA), according to online educational resource WorldAtlas. Canyon was one of 13 towns to make the list as WorldAtlas claimed it represented “the expansive and diverse landscape of Texas better than most towns.” The gateway to the Palo Duro Canyon State Park—also known as the “Grand Canyon of Texas”—and home to Texas’ largest history museum, Canyon is a must-visit for outdoor enthusiasts. Brunswick, Georgia, Gatlinburg, Tennessee, and Mount Dora, Florida, joined Canyon as representatives of the Southern U.S. You can see the full list of America’s [prettiest towns here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb1j8GOMMDF28pWtHi5hLjITBgpuQ9Okr5xW6Hn36dHR-rsvVhhjS_dvuYPDl85Kg1QiIUJZ7Tr82QnUlHzU_EOFlU634WAQTI2WSMr04G-J7GTpnbsxdeAeGay2mSTHGus047-XIL05Zz_1kxciVXJWEVYhpmqzrgjnPmGSaCya57m83yS-gnF8HrbxSZGDgAubS4wanQvXxnZ9Q-jXvXTQb4lGJ_CJiJmJurfUtl-gsRlvPCRHzGjBAJWLmkmZPcQN6FMATIsXcUqUhffAjBQRHK1qEShUfJOs33GNXjDtaiDHUUZOB3Xcb4kcA_5ftacRfAAAA__9Z5oQj).

name: Shawn Harris
subject: We've only got a few days, I need your help
body:
| | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below.
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&ca=98dc9cad-4abf-4845-bf6a-3e3c7b19f2c9) | [Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&t=001K38G1XFjd5aGExTKG1RzxA==&lang=001FCSs65SMrsI=&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&p=oo&ca=98dc9cad-4abf-4845-bf6a-3e3c7b19f2c9) | [Constant Contact Data Notice](https://www.constantcontact.com/legal/customer-contact-data-notice)
---

| Listen, I'm coming back to you because in a race like this, we don't get many chances to prove we're building something real.
Running as a Democrat in Marjorie Taylor Greene's district ain't easy -- but this race is unlike any we've seen. Greene quit on her own constituents back in January, and ever since, this seat has been up for grabs. The special election is March 10th. We're in the final stretch, and national money is flooding the district. We can't afford to be caught flat-footed.

People told me not to try. They said it was impossible. They said no one would care.
But I care. And so do the people I meet every day who are tired of being ignored, misrepresented, and embarrassed by their representation in Washington.
[If you can, please make a donation right now so we can get out as much of the vote as possible on Election Day. Every single contribution matters.](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qqTCLKpj8U_8YdVEW7xGMAR4Y8GxGipt-ST7U1uyo5egHrZr5qg_rDUKhjA8jsd00RJvh0MRbh2fNFJXyI5fA4pgEI8JF6ObjKdAQ3JEupkDVIMHNwEUa-BBDTqH_gYqY0z8El-dSOfBWYxgdqzKD2aAPuvVCSJcMN_uIK7_7pp2CcNfjhDHCohQ-KkxgILYQweEoKzZdDz3dMlvJUJWuHzSa7Lr9LDI&c=y7tRAxehB_OtfnM0hOTzN1BuSKcnJ6EhQJyh48taBzZduUWumLHjHQ==&ch=0Vqz1jysWHmvwURvc42M9LgnGUHexLeEpcSsjFtYtKNKD4uVeDaiWQ==)
This race is about more than one election. It's about whether we allow extremism to go unchecked, or whether we start pushing back -- even in the places we're told not to.
[So I'm asking you: please step up right now if you can. Donate today.](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qqTCLKpj8U_8YdVEW7xGMAR4Y8GxGipt-ST7U1uyo5egHrZr5qg_rDUKhjA8jsd0RObasUBuFlr1YuSwL_BPmptbaPIAEC74pLgTGjyAC3RFHFWBr32Z0XpGi1qsv678RnYyF2kcV3V6VRKKULyaOV9p-1QDDCUN74-TzSaWZipLtc-Sabrtc_T1UGQR7CvJ6bGewk12MAGdi8rBUajAJw==&c=y7tRAxehB_OtfnM0hOTzN1BuSKcnJ6EhQJyh48taBzZduUWumLHjHQ==&ch=0Vqz1jysWHmvwURvc42M9LgnGUHexLeEpcSsjFtYtKNKD4uVeDaiWQ==)

Null, we're counting on you to stand with Haley this year as she fights to keep Michigan blue. But according to our official records, as of this month, _we still do not have official confirmation that you are a Democrat._
We must have accurate information as the campaign heats up. This is going to be one of the most competitive races in the country – a new poll shows Haley tied with her MAGA opponent – and we need to communicate with you effectively.

So, null, let us know by midnight tonight:
**ARE YOU A DEMOCRAT?**
| | [Confirm Democrat](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14640?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=2369%2E49239%2ERRiRRF)
---

|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14641?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=2369%2E49239%2ERRiRRF) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14639?t=10&akid=2369%2E49239%2ERRiRRF)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Must Read:
subject: Toxic Water Warning
body:
Govt officials send chilling warning
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih2to3fja25nbskxlpa1yg6c9exa4lxqvpoea0adfttzhcbhxqcg7igvarcit1eypv89qxb0z81h72w533gacewjc56d1t&__stmp=tbj5qm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor
* * *

**FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share! Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=2bqpaez2e9giusuw86tfaj6c3updxxi9tt9cb7djh3qgsgq0m96liwqj45f4d12ccjrz3spvvcqm1r0rpr621sporvpezb5x88gez15nu1knjbaeujvbr9a7dx9z4rb6x6oklreisvm5mo70lf44eoktqa5jrsqx74kyrcmwnakhw3rjg4tiapnugi4rhud56ftieukfbbz3lgdmwi7l093f8xrboxwhx6o1q8gh21gvg4m31xx16oveamqqod5pwjr6sp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbj5qm&__onlt=h) **5X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water** [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=2bqpaez2e9giusuw86tfaj6c3updxxi9tt9cb7djh3qgsgq0m96liwqj45f4d12ccjrz3spvvcqm1r0rpr621sporvpezb5x88gez15nu1knjbaeujvbr9a7dx9z4rb6x6oklreisvm5mo70lf44eoktqa5jrsqx74kyrcmwnakhw3rjg4tiapnugi4rhud56ftieukfbbz3lgdmwi7l093f8xrboxwhx6o1q8gh21gvg4m31xx16oveamqqod5pwjr6sp0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tbj5qm&__onlt=h) **But hurry – we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** Order today you'll also get a FREE Bonus Package with 7 FREE Gifts worth $263.75!

But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%

Frank Bates

clean_body: Govt officials send chilling warning Please read the message below from our sponsor. Steve Thompson, Editor FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever. If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it. If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply. Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity. Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share! Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... NEW AND IMPROVED... 5X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water But hurry – we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around. Order today you'll also get a FREE Bonus Package with 7 FREE Gifts worth $263.75! FREE Gift #1: FREE Aqua-Tote Collapsible Water Container ($16.95 Value) FREE Gift #2: FREE Personal Water Filter Straw ($24.95 Value) FREE Gift #3: FREE "Water Solutions" Online Class ($149.00 Value) FREE Gift #4: FREE Water Survival Digital Guide ($9.95 Value) FREE Gift #5: FREE "What's in your Tap Water" Digital Guide ($9.95 Value) FREE Gift #6: $25.00 Savings Certificate FREE Gift #7: FREE Shipping and Handling The best part is... This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts! It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. So you can reduce... Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999% Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99% Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 200+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same... But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while. In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan! Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the peace of mind knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. Stay Safe. Stay Prepared. Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Hello, I’m Daniel Weiss, Director of Voting Rights Fund. **At the Voting Rights Fund, we’re proud to do things differently. We’re not wasting our supporters’ hard-earned money on consultants or flashy advertisements.** Instead, 100% of our funds go directly to campaigns and pro-voting rights leaders on the front lines of democracy. In the last election cycle, our approach paid off in a big way: → Nine VRF-endorsed U.S. House and Senate candidates won in highly competitive races → We backed 19 winning State Legislative and County candidates, helping ensure fair and free elections in a state with a long history of voter suppression legislation → We played a decisive role in key Senate victories in Arizona, Michigan, Nevada, Virginia, and Wisconsin, proving that small-dollar grassroots giving can drive national impact **Behind every one of these victories are supporters like you.** Our average online contribution is under $20, and yet, together, we’ve built a movement powerful enough to take on dark money groups and Super PACs with millions of dollars at their disposal. With your help, we’re building a national bench of lawmakers who will defend our democracy up and down the ballot. **Now, as we gear up for the 2026 cycle, we’re expanding our reach to new states, growing our grassroots infrastructure, and scaling up the fight to expand access to the ballot box.** **[Can you pitch in $15 to support our ongoing work to elect candidates and changemakers committed We may be a small, scrappy team, but together, we’re making a big impact. Daniel Weiss Director Voting Rights Fund ** ** Voting Rights Fund wasn’t created just to defend voting rights — we elect the leaders who will expand and protect them. Our aim is to keep our operational costs as low as possible, so a majority of our funds go toward doing the work that needs to be done. That means building a national bench of lawmakers who will fight tooth and nail to expand access to the ballot box and protect our right to vote at every level of government. Learn more about how to join our pro-democracy movement »** Paid for by Voting Rights Fund and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

name: NEGOP

body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
A Night to Remember: Honoring Our State Senators at the NEGOP Recognition Dinner
Dear Fellow Republicans,
Last night was truly special--a powerful evening of gratitude, fellowship, and shared purpose.
Twenty-eight State Senators, many accompanied by their spouses, gathered with us at the Nebraska Republican Party's annual Senator Recognition Dinner to celebrate service, leadership, and the momentum we're building together.
The evening kicked off with a heartfelt VIP reception honoring those serving their final session in the Legislature:

* Speaker John Arch, LD 14
* Senator Christy Armendariz, LD 18
* Senator Tom Brandt, LD 32
* Senator Rob Clements, LD 2
* Senator Myron Dorn, LD 30
* Senator Ben Hansen, LD 16
* Senator Mike Moser, LD 22
* Senator Dave Murman, LD 38

These dedicated public servants have given so much to our state--we're proud to have honored them.
The main program opened with solemn reflection:
Senator Rick Holdcroft, LD 36 led a moment of silence for our fallen heroes, including Nebraska's own Sergeant First Class Noah L. Tietjens, a 42-year-old Army Reserve soldier from Bellevue who made the ultimate sacrifice. He followed with a moving invocation.
Senator Loren Lippincott, LD 34 then led us proudly in the Pledge of Allegiance.
We presented well-deserved awards recognizing exceptional contributions to our party and state:
* Lifetime Achievement Award to the Honorable Donald Stenberg, presented by Attorney General Mike Hilgers
* Outstanding Legacy Statesman Award to the Honorable Carol McBride Pirsch, presented by Senator Kathleen Kauth (LD 31)
* Distinguished Service Award to Speaker John Arch, presented by Jeanne Reigle, NEGOP Director of Government Relations
* People's Choice for Exemplary Leadership to Senator Barry DeKay (LD 40), also presented by Jeanne Reigle

Speaker Arch took time to personally recognize every attending State Senator and spouse-- a touching moment that underscored the respect and camaraderie in the room.
We also extended appreciation to:
* Our brave military members and first responders
* Generous event sponsors
* Senators running for re-election
* Other candidates and their spouses in attendance
* More than 30 bright students from UNL, UNO, and Council Bluffs, representing the next generation of conservative leaders

The night wrapped up on a high note after a delicious dinner, filled with laughter and entertainment from nationally known comedian Tom Shillue, whose sharp wit offered levity to the evening.
A huge thank you to every sponsor, attendee, and especially our State Senators, statewide officeholders, and elected officials who joined us. Your presence and enthusiasm fueled an unforgettable celebration of service and unity.
Together, we win elections--and nights like this remind us why we fight so hard.

For Nebraska, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
