_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| An overlooked danger in millions of homes | **FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share! Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria - up to 99.9999%

All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Breaking Mississippi’s Alcohol Monopoly
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msmomentum-12852326?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**Imagine if you had to wait weeks to get a new phone? Actually, that’s exactly how things were in the 1970s.** Back in the days when one corporation, AT&T, had a near monopoly on phone services - roughly from the early 20th century until 1984 - you’d often face a wait of weeks to get a new phone installed.

Since Ronald Reagan made the decision to break up the monopoly, there’s been fierce competition - and technological change - in telecommunications. So much so that we take it for granted that you can walk into a store and get a new phone instantly.

**The solution to the problem created by a monopoly seems so obvious, right? Get rid of the monopoly.**

So why do so many Mississippi politicians have such a hard time understanding what needs to be done when it comes to the issues plaguing liquor and wine distribution in our state?

**Just like with pre-1984 telecommunications, Mississippi’s government insists on maintaining a monopoly over the wholesale distribution of certain alcohol.**

So, guess what? Like with phones in times gone by, there are terrible delays and massive backlogs. Restaurants and retailers are unable to get their customers what they want when they want. Right now, there is a backlog of something like 200,000 cases. Think how many small businesses must be impacted by this incompetence?

I’ve spent weeks listening to various politicians prattling on about how these delays are due to technical glitches, or an old conveyor belt system, or billing errors, or a company contracted to process orders that isn’t up to it. Blah blah, yadda yadda.

When politicians get drawn into discussing the granular details of the distribution fiasco, they are missing the point spectacularly.

**The state of Mississippi should not be in the business of funneling alcohol wholesale distribution through a Mississippi Office of Alcoholic Beverage Control in the first place.**

No matter how much effort they put into ironing out the incompetence, having all products pass through a single warehouse before reaching private retailers will never be as efficient as allowing private retailers to handle their own distribution arrangements.

The justification for this insane system is the need to collect taxes. A moment’s reflection reveals how ridiculous that argument is. **With digital technology, the idea that we need to physically assemble products in one spot in order to levy a tax is daft.**

There are multiple ways in which Mississippi collects taxes without insisting that the thing being taxed pass through a single warehouse. How do you imagine sales taxes are collected every time someone in our state purchases something on Amazon?

No, the real reason for maintaining the system of state-controlled wholesale distribution is bureaucratic self-interest. **Those who earn a living running the ABC system have a vested interest in maintaining it, even if that means hundreds of local small businesses in our state suffer from their incompetence.**

The solution is not to “privatize” the process of wholesale alcohol distribution, but to eliminate the state-controlled process of wholesale distribution altogether.

Do that, and all those ancillary failures - the shambolic supply chain management, the unresponsive customer service - will take care of themselves. We don’t, after all, have politicians getting drawn into discussions about cell phone supply chains.

I have been very encouraged listening to various Mississippi commentators, like Richard Cross on SuperTalk, make the case for reform. **Richard magnificently dissected the failures of the current system and explained how it is a “textbook” failure of state monopoly.**

“Why,” Richard wanted to know, “is the state in the alcohol distribution business at all?” Well said.

One day the same logic needs to be applied to the government’s near monopoly on education, too. That is a conversation for another day...
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9ee6c65c13&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
In gratitude,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: James Talarico
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We cannot afford to let this moment slip by

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2807%2E4032634%2ESuViqq)
---
Democrats have put their faith in State Rep. James Talarico to turn Texas blue. (From one former teacher to another, congrats James!) Democratic turnout in this primary reached record levels — meaning that voters across the state are fired up about flipping this Senate seat. And now that James is squaring his shoulders for the general election against Jon Conryn or Ken Paxton, we need to do everything we can to make sure Democrats can build on that momentum and flip this seat. **This will be one of the most competitive and consequential Senate races in the country. Democrats need to flip four seats to take back our majority, put a strong check on the Trump Administration and deliver lower costs for working families. This race in Texas is a real opportunity to make that happen.** [**We cannot afford to let this moment slip by. So, will you please split a donation of $28 or anything you can to support James Talarico and our movement? Your support will ensure James can compete hard in the general election, we can flip the Senate, and we can finally unrig our system that favors billionaires over everyone else.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3494?amount=28&t=8&akid=2807%2E4032634%2ESuViqq)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3494?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2807%2E4032634%2ESuViqq)
---

---

---
James knows Texas. He grew up in Round Rock. He taught in San Antonio. He's spent years in the state legislature fighting for Texas families who feel like the system is rigged — because he's seen it firsthand, in classrooms and communities all across the state. And here's what sets James apart: he's refusing corporate PAC money. In a state as big and expensive as Texas, that is not an easy call, but it’s a righteous one. It means his campaign runs on grassroots supporters — from people who believe politicians should answer to voters, not corporate interests who want our politicians to make their lives easier or their bottom lines stronger. With the general election now underway, James will need to start with the strongest momentum possible. Winning movements are built on moments exactly like this one: When we all come together and lock arms with a candidate fighting to make the system better for **everyone.** [**So, will you please split a donation of $28 or anything you can to support James Talarico in Texas and our movement?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3494?amount=28&t=14&akid=2807%2E4032634%2ESuViqq) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

body:
Just as we’ve been saying, Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District is the best pickup opportunity Democrats have this year.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126839033/606119167/966921121?amount=20&refcode=email_030726_nj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjAxOTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjk1NjQ2ZmMtMmQxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FIYhonLbG8T6XeZ9zceTIN2Na9ERDWduCL5QKyuezq8=) "Mackenzie is the most vulnerable Republican incumbent." _That’s the takeaway of the National Journal’s latest report, Peter._ Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District is _the best_ pickup opportunity Democrats have this year in the country’s #1 battleground state. Bob Brooks has the momentum to flip it from red to blue, with his national endorsements to support from labor groups and community leaders. But here’s the big question: **Will we have the money to reach undecided voters and see this through?** Right now, Ryan Mackenzie has close to $2 million in the bank. Bob Brooks isn’t your typical politician. He doesn’t have a massive war chest to draw on, and that’s why he relies on donations to these emails. clean_body: Just as we’ve been saying, Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District is the best pickup opportunity Democrats have this year. = "Mackenzie is the most vulnerable Republican incumbent." That’s the takeaway of the National Journal’s latest report, Peter. Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District is the best pickup opportunity Democrats have this year in the country’s #1 battleground state. Bob Brooks has the momentum to flip it from red to blue, with his national endorsements to support from labor groups and community leaders. But here’s the big question: Will we have the money to reach undecided voters and see this through? Right now, Ryan Mackenzie has close to $2 million in the bank. Bob Brooks isn’t your typical politician. He doesn’t have a massive war chest to draw on, and that’s why he relies on donations to these emails. In just one month, voters in Wisconsin will cast their ballots for the state’s next supreme court justice. If you want to know how critical this seat is, just consider how powerful interests zeroed in on last year’s Wisconsin Supreme Court race. Elon Musk — the world’s richest man — personally put $25 million into the race to try to elect the MAGA-endorsed candidate. They lost because this pro-democracy movement fought back. Voters in the Badger State took to the polls and sent a clear message that a seat on their state supreme court is not for sale. Now, as another consequential election for Wisconsin approaches — the first of a monumental election year — we have to be prepared to fight like hell once again. Everything from abortion access to voting rights is at stake. **Let’s be clear: After they lost in Wisconsin last year, we know that the far right will use every tool at their disposal to try to defeat pro-democracy candidate Judge Chris Taylor. # [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260307-288&t=1&akid=288%2E12592%2E1LYRFi)
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260307_1.2JPsQl&amount=3&refcode=20260307-288&t=2&akid=288%2E12592%2E1LYRFi)
MAGA Republicans are (seriously!) working on a draft emergency executive order to declare a national emergency to allow President Donald Trump to take control over voting.
Their justification?
“ _A conspiracy theory that China interfered with the 2020 election._ ”
In reality we know that Trump and MAGA Republicans are seeing the polls just like we are. They know that Republicans are going to lose at the ballot box this fall.
That’s why they’re trying to rig elections across the country.
Right now, Trump is thinking “** _Why can’t I do it?_** ” He’s used to taking power even if it’s unconstitutional and even if it’s based on lies, disinformation, and conspiracy.
This is what we’re up against. And it’s why our work is so important. We refuse to let Trump control our elections.
[**Can you donate $3 today to support our work fighting back against Trump and protecting elections right here in Virginia? Early voting started yesterday, and anything you donate today makes a real impact as we ramp up our voter outreach.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260307_1.2JPsQl&amount=3&refcode=20260307-288&t=3&akid=288%2E12592%2E1LYRFi)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260307_1.2JPsQl&amount=3&refcode=20260307-288&t=22&akid=288%2E12592%2E1LYRFi)**
Thank you for your support,
Virginians For Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=23&refcode2=288_12592_1LYRFi&akid=288%2E12592%2E1LYRFi)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Has this ever happened to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Peter ,
Have you ever misplaced your passport? Your birth certificate? Maybe during a move, or one of those days when everything ends up in the wrong box. It happens – even the most important papers go missing sometimes.
Now imagine being told that because you can’t find one document at that moment, you lose your right to vote.
That’s exactly what Donald Trump’s SAVE Act is designed to do – forcing people to produce specific proof of citizenship just to register, even though millions of Americans don’t have those documents readily available.
And today Trump is pushing Senate Republicans to blow up the filibuster to force it through.
We can’t control what they try in Washington, but we can make sure we’re ready – building the turnout programs, legal teams, and voter outreach needed to protect the vote this year. Will you chip in to help power that work today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email03062026]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Team Pappas
subject: Only *one* can win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Chris Pappas and John Sununu are statistically tied in recent polls.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=5440%2E582294%2ERuxtPD)
Here's where things stand.
Chris Pappas and John Sununu are tied in the polls. But when the votes are counted on November 3rd, _only one of them will be New Hampshire’s next Senator._
**[Will you chip in any amount today to help Chris Pappas pull ahead and win this key Senate race? Your donation is powerfully important to our campaign »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260307_1.CaV12d&refcode=em20260307-1&t=2&akid=5440%2E582294%2ERuxtPD)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260307_1.CaV12d&amount=5&refcode=em20260307-1&t=21&akid=5440%2E582294%2ERuxtPD)**
**This race won’t end in a tie.** So everything we do between now and November matters. Every donation, every advertisement, every event, and every door knocked could tip us over the edge and secure a Democratic victory.
And make no mistake: New Hampshire is a swing state. Electing Chris to stand up for everyday Granite Staters WILL be an uphill battle.
**[Together we can break the tie, regain our momentum, and elect Chris Pappas. Please chip in today.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260307_1.CaV12d&refcode=em20260307-1&t=22&akid=5440%2E582294%2ERuxtPD)**
We’re glad to have you on this team.
— Team Chris Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260307-1&t=23&refcode2=5440_582294_RuxtPD&akid=5440%2E582294%2ERuxtPD)**

subject: This can’t wait any longer.

body:

| | Friend,
I don’t ever want to sugarcoat this for you.
Every day in Washington, I see how determined the Left is to tear down the values we hold dear. They are relentless. But so are we.
That’s why I’m asking you to take a moment with me today. **[Please read what I've shared:](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**
---
|

[READ NOW >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|

\- Senator Katie Britt

|

|

[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|

I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
|
---
[STAND WITH KATIE >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|

Fellow Conservative,

**_“Republicans Face Tough Battle Defending Senate Majority in 2026 Midterms”_** – one recent warning read.

Here is what I know: If we lose the Senate, the radical Left will ram through their agenda unchecked – and God help Montana and America if that happens.

As a Navy SEAL who fought for this country overseas, and now fighting for Montana in the Senate, I’m not letting that happen on my watch.

That’s why I’m personally asking you to split a donation across three battleground campaigns that will determine control of the Senate in 2026.**[[link]](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=100bd7c89352453396f0fda7d68a525c&_e=s5KgjNLrpzL0wTLCiuRnOpb3SRhgwdS8Volw74NxYVhXzsLu1KU6AEeYb1bLGsh90Kmtk0tYmIsluM2e5bHvggh5u4vWRTznO2sEHmmYp3zoexnuQfaBg-OojhAheSpZKKc-6jHbDrSTKFGHd7yZbTBcF3tXgQ12n81U97mfs53cuNziWcn8OIaIljB0GlKh0M9giLpqfdSiyxkuptw1H1vs1FmDsIDnPWQKGnoewDu2y31eWSLjEUW0FlULmRIF6O8-Q91EZZ7-qMFRdYzklvxRspHE2ej2L1eadNouUaIfHky0fU1bag7eSFh4V8gDGJF1Xm3RKdlgjybb2v-evIRR-fFcJE8n8KaG6TjVyAStI2Dqa_l_MTUe3WbWdJCGXnsGFafzsu6jPMmCkwc4WfZNn6ejHY0HieLEum4qfrKlRHCWP6pYZLA0BujvIthtLLjqD1EXBEtV7fB86NNaw7rZcfKeMHf_gUEXxMolXNS7EZtm1pCRMU59hwODkfJMTn-jqTY4hR8tw0vH7xGiM3jFufwzDkSjr946NR6JYkn36ZuR9yi_8dyu6HwubOgmyPThE0iwV4xs-H5yQ_uMiLQRecQ4yD_fIblU_-IBliKh-B51DPrpnOw5p9U_LcUsS5AgxWk2yEIwhKsAtdhN0W3U3YD9VbPeEJiIRnP_c_Ybfr2bitK_PyYcdoLLQZ-GeHjIP0UBuTYNWCB_EBeGCMUVrZSWS3hgZm3E3vhbgQY%3D)**
* **Ashley Moody** \- Florida’s former Attorney General, who has BEATEN the Left in court time and time again. She was appointed to fill Marco Rubio’s Senate seat, and Democrats hope to flip it this November.

* **Michael Whatley** – As Chairman of the RNC in 2024, Michael Whatley helped deliver Republicans the White House, the Senate, and the House. Now, he’s fighting to win the OPEN Senate seat in North Carolina. Democrats see it as their BIGGEST chance to flip a seat. We have to win!

name: Shane Jenkins, Stand in the Gap
subject: One day, 5 years ago, changed my life…
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1085211/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdVZjdFU3cXFtWA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDc/LbmNsbnpCU0trUg/qP2hpZHM9bmNiZ0JTYURxRjVLMFdscw/gaaw0pA/s9od8f26ccf)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Patriot,

Five years ago, I gathered with patriots from all corners of America to protest the certification of the 2020 election results.

All we wanted was for President Trump to get a fair shake, for mail-in vote counts to be redone, and to ensure no fraud had taken place. However, President Trump’s enemies saw us coming, and they were ready and waiting to pull off perhaps the biggest psy-op America has ever seen.

Capitol Police officers welcomed many J6ers into the building, with some even providing off-the-cuff tours as they ushered protestors through the halls of the Capitol.

All of a sudden, though, things took a very dark turn...
* A Capitol Police officer murdered Ashli Babbitt.
* Overzealous officers assaulted protestors.
* Rosann Boyland was trampled to death in the panic that ensued as the Capitol Police swiftly turned on peaceful protestors.

For many, like myself, this day marked the beginning of a years-long political persecution that tore families apart, devastated finances, and even denied many of us our freedom and our fundamental human rights.

It also motivated me to start Stand in the Gap — a commitment to stand in solidarity with and fight for those who are being overlooked or mistreated.

Our goal is to provide support and advocacy for those in need, ensuring they aren’t left to face their challenges alone.

[If you are willing to stand with me to help these patriots rebuild their lives, please join me today by donating whatever you can generously afford to help Stand in the Gap today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Stand in the Gap originally started to help reunite families with a loved one incarcerated due to J6.

**Now, our focus is on helping the recently released J6ers navigate the challenging process of re-entry into society after being incarcerated.**

Surprisingly, there are very few resources for people who are released from prison, particularly if they are conservative, America First activists, or who supported President Trump.

These J6ers are our neighbors. They are sons and daughters, brothers and sisters, mothers and fathers. It is up to us to ensure that they have the resources needed to rebuild their lives and reclaim their dignity.

We were founded to “stand in the gap” for those in prison and those navigating life after incarceration.

Our mission is to ensure that every J6er receives the help they need to heal – physically, mentally, emotionally, spiritually, and financially – to reintegrate into society.

But they need your help to rebuild their lives and reclaim their dignity.

[Please consider donating $10, $35, $50, $100, or any amount you can generously afford today. >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Sincerely,

Shane Jenkins
Founder and Executive Director of Stand in the Gap

P.S. Even with the pardons, you may not realize what life is like for many J6ers...
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Difficulties in finding a job
* Homelessness
* Loss of rights like voting or the right to own a firearm
* Lost time with their families
* Struggles to return to some semblance of a normal life

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who need to rebuild their lives.** That’s exactly what Stand in the Gap is helping them do.

Stand in the Gap helps ensure that political prisoners have the resources they need
to successfully reintegrate into society and return to their normal lives.

[Please donate $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today and help finally free the J6ers from the effects of their political persecution! >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1085211/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDc/LbmNsbnpCU0trUg/qP2hpZHM9bmNiZ0JTYURxRjVLMFdscw/gaaw0pA/s0o35b6ba47)

name: Kelly Morrison
subject: A dose of reality from a top medical journal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
Since my first year of medical school, I have read The Lancet . As one of the world’s leading medical journals, it is held in the highest regard and is among the most widely cited publications in medicine.
A few weeks ago, the cover of The Lancet named very directly what we all fear:
Screenshot of The Lancet Journal wit the quote The destruction that Kennedy has wrought in 1 year might take generations to repair, and there is little hope for US health and science while he remains at the helm. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109390/images/screenshots/lancet-journal.jpg]
“The destruction that Kennedy has wrought in 1 year might take generations to repair, and there is little hope for US health and science while he remains at the helm.”
Peter, I opposed RFK Jr’s nomination to lead HHS from the beginning. Since then, I have been on the front lines condemning his undermining of medical and scientific research, as well as the barrage of misinformation coming out of this administration under his leadership. I have repeatedly called for his resignation over the course of the past year. Aided by the Republican majorities in Congress, this administration has gutted Medicaid and made healthcare unaffordable for working Americans. RFK Jr has spewed misinformation and seriously undermined American’s trust in vaccines, and we are now facing the worst measles outbreak in America since the year 2000. RFK Jr and this administration have created a healthcare crisis, and as The Lancet stated, it could take generations to repair.
The first step in repairing this crisis is flipping the U.S. House of Representatives this November so we can slow down this runaway administration, conduct oversight, and begin the process of rebuilding. I am 100% committed to doing all I can to hold this seat and to support targeted races across the midwest to help flip the U.S. House.
Peter, every dollar I raise goes towards these efforts. I would be honored if you would chip in any amount today to support this work.
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you so much for your continued support, Peter.
With gratitude and resolve,
Kelly Morrison

Peter, did you see this message?

Our endorsed candidate, Callie Barr, is running against a congressman who actively denied the results of the 2020 election, voted to defund Planned Parenthood, and co-sponsored the “Life at Conception Act” to ban abortion with no exception for the safety or life of the mother.

Callie ran for this congressional seat last cycle, and was the first woman to win the Democratic nomination in her district's history. Her hard work and outreach created waves – it was one of the few red districts to shift blue in 2024 despite Trump leading the ballot. She didn't win, but she started a movement, and Her Bold Move is on a mission to help her finish what she started.

**Here’s the thing: This district stretches across a lot of land. It’s the 2nd biggest congressional district east of the Mississippi – and voters often live _miles_ apart. That means Callie must spend hours in the car driving across her district to meet voters.**

[**We know the price of gas isn’t cheap – and Callie is working hard on a strong gas/mileage budget so she can meet with as many voters as possible this year. Help us pay for Callie’s gas so she can drive the long distances across her district by rushing a split $20.26 or more contribution TODAY. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-barr-26/?refcode=EM_F_260307Fwd_N_AL_NO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=20.26)

Fueling this fight together,

Allison Liu
Chairwoman | Junior Board

Callie’s opponent voted for “The Big Bad Bill,” which is already having a devastating impact on her district’s rural hospitals, food accessibility, and the local economy. Because of his terrible positions and the chaos in Washington, there is a growing outcry for him to be unseated – making this district more winnable for a challenger than ever before.

**This is our chance to replace a far-right extremist with a firmly pro-choice, pro-WOMEN woman.**

She ran for this congressional seat last cycle as the first woman to ever win the Democratic nomination in the district's history. With her hard work, voter outreach, and incredible ability to lead a team, this was one of the few red districts in America to shift blue despite Donald Trump’s name at the top of the ballot in 2024. She didn’t win – but she built an incredible movement on the ground in her district.

This is infuriating, Peter. | **Proposal to lower Florida electricity bills dies after FPL lobbying, sponsor says** _\- Tampa Bay Times_
---
For the second year in a row, Florida Power & Light lobbied to death a bill in the state legislature that would have brought accountability to your electric bills. They didn't have to argue their case publicly. They just flexed their political muscle, and the legislation was quietly smothered.
**Meanwhile, 12 million Floridians are already locked into the largest utility rate hike in U.S. history.** And FPL is working overtime to make sure nothing stands in the way of keeping your bills high.
Our Attorney General should be fighting back. Instead, James Uthmeier is nowhere to be found.
**[That will change when I take office. As Attorney General, I will take on FPL and stand up for Florida families. If you’re ready to fight for lower electric bills and real accountability, chip in today to help power this campaign forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126846844/606146407/-88017659?refcode=em_JJR_FR_FPLHikeAffordability_030726&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWM0NDliMjktMzIxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SFiqaNoQcJNDcighWChXz5jurqh2ye-GyThFd9KUvMU=)**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I need to hear from you directly, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This will take just one minute.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)
| | | |
---
Peter,
Since we won our U.S. Senate primary in North Carolina earlier this week, the momentum behind our campaign has been **surging**. I am deeply grateful for this team.
While my MAGA opponent is backed by far-right super PACs and the GOP establishment, I’m building a grassroots movement powered by folks like you. Focused on your interests, concerns and dreams for the future.
**That’s why I need to hear from you directly. Your input is critical to making sure we can flip this seat and the Senate._[Will you take my new priorities survey and let me know what issues matter most to you in this election?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6943?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=7&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)_**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6943?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=8&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)
---
This is the most consequential race of 2026, Peter: Experts at _Politico_ say that our chances of taking back the Senate hinge on winning in North Carolina.
Far-right Republicans know I’m the biggest threat to the GOP’s hold on power – and now that we’ve entered the general election, they’re going all in to defeat me.
**The only way I can fight back and flip this seat is with an airtight campaign strategy informed by people like you._[Before the end of the day, will you take just one minute to share your thoughts with me?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6943?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=9&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)_**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6943?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=10&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)
---
Thank you for adding your voice.

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=2&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=3&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=4&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=709%2E124072%2EW47EkR)

### **Help us beat and replace the mainstream media! Support PolitiBrawl by becoming a paid subscriber today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..14qNDUZOIeyJT92kk3JMoJ953aPOf0KfLg4SVGD7euA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=190123434)
* * *
**By Wendy M. Yurgo**
Last week I wrote about Ivy League activists chanting for peace while Iranian women risked prison for freedom.
This week the world is watching two streets tell two different stories.
In one set of streets, Iranian women are ripping off mandatory hijabs, dancing, crying, waving the Lion and Sun flag, and celebrating what they believe may be the first real weakening of the regime that has governed their bodies for nearly half a century. In cities across the United States, Iranian diaspora communities have gathered in public squares, embracing strangers, thanking Americans, and expressing relief that the regime which has ruled their lives with brutality may finally be showing cracks.
In another set of streets, in major American cities, protesters are marching in outrage over the very strike that weakened that same regime.
The contrast could not be more stark.
Before 1979, women in Iran served as judges, lawyers, members of parliament, and professors. The Family Protection Laws of 1967 and 1975 raised the marriage age to 18 for girls, restricted polygamy, and expanded women's rights in divorce and child custody. Women entered universities in growing numbers, and civil courts governed family life.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Home Title Lock](https://substack.com/redirect/3be4afb2-f598-4eb0-b940-90d82c852b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3be4afb2-f598-4eb0-b940-90d82c852b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Today's thieves don't need to break in to steal from you.
A Burbank homeowner woke up to a nightmare: his $1.5 million home SOLD without his knowledge. No break-in. No warning. No clue it was happening. Scammers siphoned off nearly $1 million in proceeds, leaving the real owner and an unsuspecting buyer blindsided.
But this isn't a one-off crime: it's part of a growing wave of real estate fraud targeting homeowners nationwide. And because property records are public, ANY homeowner could be vulnerable.
**[To protect your home and prevent irreversible damage,](https://substack.com/redirect/3be4afb2-f598-4eb0-b940-90d82c852b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Homeowners are urged to monitor their records, check local filings, and watch for unexpected correspondence.
Beyond monitoring, Home Title Lock provides a comprehensive solution. Subscribers receive:
✅ 24/7 Monitoring of their Title Records
✅ Urgent Alerts
✅ Up to $1 Million in Title Restoration Services to fix the fraud
✅ Access to an expert title restoration team
✅ Peace of Mind
Home Title Lock offers homeowners more than just awareness, they gain active protection -the resources and legal expertise needed to reclaim their property and secure their equity.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/3be4afb2-f598-4eb0-b940-90d82c852b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3be4afb2-f598-4eb0-b940-90d82c852b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
Iran under the Shah was authoritarian in many ways, but for women the legal trajectory was forward.
The Islamic Revolution reversed that trajectory almost immediately.
Female judges were removed. The Family Protection Laws were dismantled. Mandatory hijab became law. Sharia replaced civil protections in family courts. A woman's testimony in many proceedings became worth half that of a man's. Inheritance rights were reduced.
Under Article 1041 of Iran's Civil Code, the legal marriage age for girls is thirteen, though with judicial and paternal consent, marriages can occur at even younger ages. Official statistics from Iran's Statistical Center have recorded tens of thousands of registered marriages involving girls under fifteen in individual years, including roughly 27,000 in recent reporting periods. International **[data from UNICEF show](https://substack.com/redirect/b109021e-459c-49e2-a8c4-471f09f83d45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that roughly 17% of Iranian women aged 20-24 were married before age 18.
Under Article 301 of Iran's Islamic Penal Code, a father who kills his child is exempt from qisas (the retributive death penalty) and typically faces only blood money. Article 630 provides legal justification for a husband who kills his wife and her partner if he claims to have caught them in the act of adultery. Domestic violence remains widespread, yet Iran lacks comprehensive legislation criminalizing it on par with modern Western standards.
This is not rhetoric. It is the legal architecture governing the lives of Iranian women.
Women who step outside those rules face brutal consequences: beatings by morality police for showing hair, acid attacks or so-called honor violence for defying expectations, detention where human rights groups have documented torture and sexual abuse, prison sentences, violent crackdowns, and in some cases death.
In 2022, after Mahsa Amini died in morality police custody for allegedly violating hijab rules, protests erupted across Iran under the slogan Woman, Life, Freedom. At least 551 people were killed in the ensuing crackdown, including dozens of women and at least 68 minors, according to Iran Human Rights. Teenage girls such as Nika Shakarami and Sarina Esmailzadeh were among the victims. Security forces deliberately targeted protesters' eyes with pellet guns. Amnesty International and others documented widespread torture and sexual abuse in detention.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9c2c9fc-fe3c-4958-a4b6-3c7d4ad99c23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Meanwhile, in American streets, some protesters condemn the strike that shook the Islamic Republic.
This is where the feminist establishment that dominates Western politics, media, and activism runs directly into a contradiction it cannot explain away.
For decades these organizations have insisted that bodily autonomy is sacred and non-negotiable. They mobilize instantly over corporate representation, sports eligibility, language disputes, and domestic policy debates. Yet that urgency evaporates when confronting a regime that legally halves a woman's testimony, permits child marriage at thirteen, and embeds leniency for so-called honor killings directly into its legal code.
In the West, activists march under police protection, surrounded by constitutional freedoms that allow them to condemn American power without consequence. In Iran, women who challenge the regime face batons, prison cells, and live ammunition.
One movement protests policy. The other risks death to challenge a system that governs women's bodies by law.
Nowhere is this contradiction more glaring than in the rhetoric of the American pro-abortion movement.
These are the same voices that chant "my body, my choice" with absolute moral certainty. They insist bodily autonomy is sacred. They organize marches, fund campaigns, and demand sweeping legal protections around that principle.
Yet when Iranian women live under a regime that dictates what they must wear, arrests them for showing hair, permits child marriage under judicial approval, and has beaten, tortured, and killed women who resist, the outrage from many of those same organizations becomes muted or strangely conditional.
Bodily autonomy, it seems, is treated as an absolute principle when debated in American courts but a negotiable one when women confront a theocratic state that polices their bodies by law.
For forty-seven years Iranian women have fought a regime that governs their bodies by law. If the loudest voices in the West cannot find their outrage there, then their movement was never about women at all.
The women dancing without hijabs understand exactly what freedom means. The women marching against it should ask themselves why.
* * *
**About the Author
** Wendy M. Yurgo is a Christian, attorney, entrepreneur, and the Founder and CEO of Revere Payments, a conservative fintech company serving many of the nation's leading faith based and freedom driven organizations. She writes about where faith collides with the systems shaping our culture, bringing a legal and executive lens to the most urgent issues of our time. Her work is rooted in light, guided by principle, and grounded in truth.
Follow Wendy on Instagram @wendyyurgo and X @paymentsSHEEO.

name: Scott Singer
subject: Peter, how could this be?

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The rich and powerful shouldn’t get special treatment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Peter,
**I’m sick of the two sets of rules in this country – one for the rich and well-connected, and one for everyone else.**
And I’m angry when I see politicians like my opponent, Jon Husted, protect their billionaire donors at all costs.
Here’s what happened: Husted received more than $116,000 in donations from Jeffrey Epstein’s co-conspirator Leslie Wexner.
Then recently, Wexner testified before Congress about his relationship with Epstein and admitted to backing Husted, saying, “I’m sure I helped him. I helped him politically.”
And it gets worse. Husted didn’t just take Wexner’s money – **he accepted a maximum donation _just weeks_ before voting to block the release of the Epstein files.**
You do the math.
This is why when people say the system is rigged, they’re right. Politically connected insiders avoid consequences as victims are pushed aside. Billionaires get tax breaks while working families pay more for health insurance. And elites do whatever the hell they want while regular folks are told to just be grateful and “earn more.”
Ohioans deserve better.
I’ve spent my career holding powerful interests accountable, and I’m not stopping anytime soon. But I need your help.
**[If you believe the rich and powerful shouldn’t get special treatment – and that the truth shouldn’t be hidden – please chip in $10 today split with Heartland Patriots to help us flip this seat in Ohio and bring accountability back to the Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101442?refcode=em20260307-10143&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=10&t=1&akid=10143%2E614464%2ErpdNS5)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101442?refcode=em20260307-10143&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10143%2E614464%2ErpdNS5)**
Thank you,
Sherrod

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

Peter, let me be clear:
Donald Trump and House Republicans have failed the American people.

Friend, I wanted to share this news _personally_ with you:
**The stakes of this race are huge. There are now FIVE Republicans running to flip New Mexico. **Several of them are using their own wealth to try to buy this race and bring an extreme agenda into our state. Several of them are using their own wealth to try to buy this race and bring an extreme agenda into our state. One self-funded multimillionaire candidate has even said he’ll put $2 MILLION of his own money into his campaign and one of my opponents in this race is EVEN funded by a Kristi Noem donor.
I urgently need your grassroots support to ensure my campaign can compete. _**[So please, will you chip in $5 right now to help me close the gap on my $15K midnight goal and win in New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5902?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&amount=5&t=2&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)**_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5902?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&t=3&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
---
**I’ll be honest: This is going to be a tough race.** It's already clear that the GOP is going to try to buy this race, and unlike my multimillionaire opponent, I can't just write myself a check.
I don’t come from wealth, friend. I have never had the means to self-fund a campaign, unlike my wealthy opponents. I was a single mom living paycheck to paycheck, relying on government programs like SNAP, WIC, and Medicaid to help keep my child fed and healthy.
**So I know what it's like to struggle, and I also know that it takes a village, in both life and in politics. I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks, and affordable, healthy food to eat.**
That’s exactly why I’m better prepared to lead. I understand affordability because I’ve lived it. I know how critical strong public schools, accessible healthcare, and safe communities are because my family relied on them. These issues aren’t abstract to me, they’re personal. And beyond my lived experience, I’ve led at the highest levels of government, serving in Congress and as U.S. Secretary of the Interior, where I took on tough fights and delivered real results for communities across the country. I know how to fight for working families — and how to get things done.
Experience matters. Leadership matters. And I’m ready.
That's why I’m running to be the next governor of New Mexico, to build a better future for working families. But I need your help to reach my midnight fundraising goal to make that a reality:
**I'm running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support from folks like you chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to help me go up against these self-funded multimillionaires.**_**[Please, will you chip in to help me win and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5902?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&t=4&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)**_
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6024?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&t=5&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
---
| | [Donate $35](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6025?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&t=6&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6026?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&t=7&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5902?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&t=8&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
---
Thank you,

Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2928?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&t=9&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?refcode=jtk294-fr-nd&t=10&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
---

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=11&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=12&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=13&akid=7984%2E400544%2Ee-YUES)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

name: Office of the Governor
subject: Maryland Will Hold the Line
body:
>From safer roads to saving consumers billions
---
| | | | | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/EXYjP9P1Bfz-Ewf8Dc9CoVPCZWM1UITETatu4i5IRks=447)
---
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fyoutube.com%2Fshorts%2FhL6z2mC3Mkc/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/kNYYPK93JF7mXRfYypMtqkNKByonzPfMn0Pv2ZAjK90=447)
---
My fellow Marylanders,
Weeks ago, I delivered my [fourth State of the State address](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FGpUQseIEdOA%3Ft=137/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/GurK0-pu2q32t3GyyWqSmo0g9AoVMA0r2d-_PVlFiA0=447). I talked about accomplishments from our first term and announced new actions we’ll be taking to protect our people from the relentless attacks from Washington, D.C. — while still delivering tangible results to improve Marylanders’ lives and lead our state forward.
Here are just some of the major wins we’ve delivered for Marylanders in February alone:
* We announced [significant progress toward safer roads](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2FGovernor-Moore-Announces-Maryland-Traffic-Fatalities-Drop-in-2025,-Reaching-Decade-Low-Levels.aspx/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/zvwdop1Hp5yLZkK-JP6uBu5sqRvu_DsArkoen_8EyxU=447), with traffic fatalities falling by around 18% statewide in 2025, according to preliminary data.

* The federal government [approved our broadband access and development plan](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Freel%2F1264532175662294/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/aj9wFw9Ch6J6ofqf9-9Q8U3hVmL73msa5Y09P_r-vII=447), giving us access to close to $80 million in federal funding to support our initiative to provide all Marylanders with affordable and equitable access to high-speed internet.

* We [secured a major win that will save consumers $27 billion](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=G9omsr4p29Y/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/q8ZhqYmymBjC1owhCQh5O3hKqqQvBdrGsRwBCZNkUlk=447) on their electricity bills, including millions of Marylanders, by having PJM extend the market price cap through the end of the decade.

* We [broke ground on the Marriott Downtown Frederick](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=I4sxI2Aw1XM/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/VRz5eHOcXDD9djAneeUKa-EyUQKN2iF7qe0AQF1LlAY=447), a full-service hotel and conference center that represents a major milestone in the economic development of Downtown Frederick.

* I [signed into law](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=dy2FJrGle6E/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/ZQCkP11wCM_yCYc2oHxCwEtAVHuocEHxjpTmUufZAiA=447) legislation prohibiting Maryland jurisdictions from deputizing officers for federal civil immigration enforcement activity.

* We announced our $4 million investment to help [prepare Maryland workers, employers, and community organizations](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2FGovernor-Moore-Announces-Program-Investments-to-Prepare-Maryland-Workers-for-AI-and-Emerging-Technology-Economies.aspx/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/8oS6EhavKTv7zJYxXwp8tOHYoavTxdPH6kEYbudN2HA=447) to succeed in a future shaped by emerging technologies.

* Attorney General Anthony Brown [filed a major lawsuit](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fshorts%2FJVDEa-SD-Yw/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/AOyE0Q8-pc9GKQtygVDBqnKn9rmYKPfiHg3Lwca52Y0=447) to stop the Trump administration’s unlawful construction of an ICE detention center.

And as we continue into March, we’re not slowing down.
Your Governor,
Wes Moore
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/2/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/Gacig92p8PcMnFsA19SELQh846tNgx6Zx_c9KOQ7Xm0=447)
---
[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=SgjuNdkgrUM/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/02SCMopbNJoaNVK480Wq8b7zPk_wIk295w06kl3x4iU=447)
### **[#ReadMoreMaryland Campaign](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=SgjuNdkgrUM/2/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/zsSp07ZqkjVvO5T0YDm_tQQdwHzQM3A2zSi9K7nYEuo=447)

**
First Lady Dawn Moore launched the "Read More Maryland" campaign this week — a statewide literacy campaign that aims to inspire Maryland students to read.
Share photos and videos on social media of you reading with a loved one by tagging First Lady @dawnflythemoore and using the hashtag “#ReadMoreMaryland”—and tag three more Marylanders to join in!
At the conclusion of the campaign, five young Marylanders and their families will be invited to Annapolis to show off their favorite book to First Lady Moore.
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2F7LcDxBoVZfY/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/q9SU5g6DrTERUt61vtvbrqb948oZcq95V6jIOpX2TA4=447)
---
### [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=uRocmLBHnTU/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/0txegktwBsqGVEyE5tExVqs6G70t0H80Mc9fw0WPABo=447)[DSCI Service Year Applications ](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2F7LcDxBoVZfY/2/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/_dHxaiGsf7y-hyrXMVY_aG_yW4cnE4KbARYzj7EpmZk=447)

In Maryland, we know that service will save us. If you know a young person looking to service their community, have them apply to join the hundreds of other young Marylanders from all across the state who are stepping up to serve our communities at [**serve.maryland.gov**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/http:%2F%2Fserve.maryland.gov/1/0100019cc8dc88a3-233560c0-df34-490a-8eb6-eda538a0f25b-000000/_UW8MjUSEVMvLUfjkS8iH1MU0WKGin5o4rJ5x9z5xGE=447) to apply.

clean_body: From safer roads to saving consumers billions | | | | | | | My fellow Marylanders, Weeks ago, I delivered my . I talked about accomplishments from our first term and announced new actions we’ll be taking to protect our people from the relentless attacks from Washington, D.C. — while still delivering tangible results to improve Marylanders’ lives and lead our state forward. Here are just some of the major wins we’ve delivered for Marylanders in February alone: We announced , with traffic fatalities falling by around 18% statewide in 2025, according to preliminary data. The federal government , giving us access to close to $80 million in federal funding to support our initiative to provide all Marylanders with affordable and equitable access to high-speed internet. We on their electricity bills, including millions of Marylanders, by having PJM extend the market price cap through the end of the decade. We , a full-service hotel and conference center that represents a major milestone in the economic development of Downtown Frederick. I legislation prohibiting Maryland jurisdictions from deputizing officers for federal civil immigration enforcement activity. We announced our $4 million investment to help to succeed in a future shaped by emerging technologies. Attorney General Anthony Brown to stop the Trump administration’s unlawful construction of an ICE detention center. And as we continue into March, we’re not slowing down. Your Governor, Wes Moore | | First Lady Dawn Moore launched the "Read More Maryland" campaign this week — a statewide literacy campaign that aims to inspire Maryland students to read. Share photos and videos on social media of you reading with a loved one by tagging First Lady @dawnflythemoore and using the hashtag “#ReadMoreMaryland”—and tag three more Marylanders to join in! At the conclusion of the campaign, five young Marylanders and their families will be invited to Annapolis to show off their favorite book to First Lady Moore. | | In Maryland, we know that service will save us. This operation has been greatly successful. We even took out the corrupt Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. That’s what peace through strength looks like. Will you stand STRONG with me as I protect our country? Right now, I’m asking everyone who approves of Operation Epic Fury to rally behind me with incredible messages of support. Peter,

The news is out: **Anthony D'Esposito is preparing to run against me again.**

Sources say he will resign from his inspector general post at the U.S. Labor Department — a job he only started in January — so he can launch another bid for Congress.

This will be our third time on the ballot against each other. He beat me in 2022. I beat him in 2024. And now he wants a rematch.

This race is going to be expensive and close. National Republicans see this district as a top pickup opportunity and they will come after us hard.

_Control of the House could come down to this race._

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I refuse to be silent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)
Friend, I have spent my life fighting back against the kind of injustices we are now witnessing under Donald Trump.
I was born at the start of a civil war. My family fled violence and spent years in a refugee camp before coming to the United States in search of opportunity. We worked hard to build a life. And I learned early on that democracy only works when ordinary people organize to protect it.
**That is why I am a proud member of the Congressional Progressive Caucus.**
Because if we are going to defeat authoritarianism and corporate greed, we cannot rely on politicians funded by billionaire-backed Super PACs who expect something in return. We have to elect leaders who are accountable to the people — leaders who will defend civil rights, stand up to ICE abuses, protect our social safety net, support unions, confront the climate crisis, and guarantee health care as a human right.
[**Will you split a contribution between my campaign and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC to help elect those kinds of leaders?**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-cpc-pac.KTODHk&source=em260307-1-90&t=2&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)
We are living through a moment when immigrant families are being targeted by aggressive ICE raids, when reproductive freedom is under attack, when workers are organizing for dignity and being met with corporate retaliation, and when billionaires are spending unprecedented amounts of money to protect their power in Washington.
**And Donald Trump is at the center of all of it.** He’s spreading lies, demonizing communities, and pushing a narrative rooted in fear and hate.
This is not abstract.
When the most powerful man in the world scapegoats immigrants, families live in fear. When corporate donors dictate policy, working people pay the price. When extremists chip away at our rights, it is everyday Americans who feel the consequences.
Right now, the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC is working to elect candidates across the country who will fight back against these assaults on our freedoms and put working people first.
But they cannot do it without grassroots support.
[**Friend, if you believe our democracy should belong to the people — not to extremists and not to billionaires — please split a contribution today between my campaign and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC. Even a small donation will help us organize, compete, and win where it matters most. >>**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-cpc-pac.KTODHk&source=em260307-1-90&t=3&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)
Big money will always try to dominate our politics.
But our movement has always been powered by regular people chipping in what they can, when they can, because they believe in something bigger than themselves.
If everyone reading this email gave just a few dollars, we could build the progressive majority we need to protect our communities and move this country forward.
Please make a split donation today.
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Ilhan Omar and CPC PAC:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-cpc-pac.SPXahi&refcode=em260307-1-90&t=22&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-cpc-pac.GuFKTm&refcode=em260307-1-90&t=23&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-cpc-pac.NNTant&refcode=em260307-1-90&t=24&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-cpc-pac.HmrL1j&refcode=em260307-1-90&t=25&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-cpc-pac.FLB0BK&refcode=em260307-1-90&t=26&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-cpc-pac.JA4anj&refcode=em260307-1-90&t=27&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**
---
****
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=30&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=2120_791427_fxm8pP&akid=2120%2E791427%2Efxm8pP)**.

body:

Folks,
**We have exactly one month until Election Day.**
We’re running ads. We’re reaching voters across Wisconsin. We’re making sure they know what’s at stake.
But this final stretch is _expensive,_ and we’re up against right-wing special interests who could pour in tens of millions of dollars without warning.
That’s why we’re humbly asking: [**Will you pitch in $10 today to help elect Judge Chris Taylor and secure our progressive majority?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260307_1_ak.zjS3Ib&amount=10&refcode=em20260307-1191&t=3&akid=1200%2E294397%2EU3Oskp)

Team Taylor

name: Andy Levin
subject: The same dark money forces that targeted me are going after Abdul
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260307-1-ak.rspqXh&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20260307-1797&t=2&akid=1805%2E251025%2EBGipRQ)
Hi Peter, it’s Andy Levin, former Congressman for Michigan’s 9th district.
I’m reaching out today because **[I’m hoping you’ll join me in supporting Abdul’s campaign for U.S. Senate](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260307-1-ak.rspqXh&amount=5&refcode=em20260307-1797&t=3&akid=1805%2E251025%2EBGipRQ)** , but first, I want to share something personal with you.
In 2022, I ran for re-election to Congress, and AIPAC spent millions of dollars that came mostly from Republican billionaires to defeat me — in a Democratic primary! They were threatened by our people-powered campaign that challenged corporate and dark money influence in our politics.
Unfortunately, we came up short. But the movement we built didn’t disappear. I’ve continued organizing because the fight to build a government that prioritizes people over profit is the cause of our lives.
**Now, those same forces are targeting Michigan’s Senate race. We can expect AIPAC to spend whatever it takes to stop a truth-telling candidate like Abdul.**
That’s why I’m backing Abdul and endorsing his campaign. **[Will you join me in helping generate the people-power Abdul needs to win this competitive primary by chipping in $10 today?](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260307-1-ak.rspqXh&amount=5&refcode=em20260307-1797&t=4&akid=1805%2E251025%2EBGipRQ)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260307-1-ak.rspqXh&amount=5&refcode=em20260307-1797&t=5&akid=1805%2E251025%2EBGipRQ)**
Peter, if we want our next senator to be someone who fights for working people, for healthcare, for clean water, and for a democracy not controlled by billionaire interests, Abdul is the best candidate for the job.
He’s the only candidate in this race who has never taken money from corporate PACs or AIPAC, and never will. That means we can trust him to fight for our best interests, but it also means he needs _us_ to fuel this campaign.
**I know firsthand what it looks like when dark money groups try to buy an election. Abdul is about to face that on an even bigger scale.**
But Abdul _can_ win this race. He’s polling competitively, he’s built a real coalition, and he has the moral courage we desperately need in this moment. This movement just has to show up for him.
[**So I’m asking — organizer to organizer, neighbor to neighbor — will you support Abdul’s campaign by contributing $10 or anything you can?**](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260307-1-ak.rspqXh&amount=5&refcode=em20260307-1797&t=6&akid=1805%2E251025%2EBGipRQ)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260307-1-ak.rspqXh&amount=5&refcode=em20260307-1797&t=25&akid=1805%2E251025%2EBGipRQ)**
Solidarity,
Andy Levin
Former Congressman for Michigan’s 9th district
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this help us stay connected with grassroots supporters like you, so thank you for taking the time to read this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Donald Trump doesn't want to see people like me in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
Hi there. Democratic Senate Candidate Raja Krishnamoorthi here. I know there’s a lot going on right now, and I’m sure you’re getting a lot of emails from candidates like me. But I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read this message to learn a bit more about me, and split a critical $25 donation now between me and Resist Reclaim Rebuild to flip the Senate blue >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
Let me start by reintroducing myself. I’m a racial, religious, ethnic minority immigrant with 29 letters in my name. Growing up in Peoria, Illinois, I often felt like an outsider because of my identity.
My mother always dressed in a sari. My parents spoke Tamil, a South Indian language, most of the time. We ate different food than everyone around us — we even traveled with our rice cooker.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
Despite our outward differences, the community in Peoria embraced us. I went to public schools in Peoria’s District 150 — there weren't a lot of people who looked like me playing sports back then, but I earned a starting spot on the football team my freshman year of high school.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
My parents worked incredibly hard to give us a better life, but fell on hard times. So, we lived for a time in Public Housing to keep a roof over our heads and depended on SNAP to eat.
Thanks to these essential safety net programs, we were able to make it through. That’s something I’ll never take for granted.
With the help of my community, government programs, and the money I saved working at McDonalds – I went to college, and eventually graduated from Law School.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
Growing up, every night at the dinner table, my father would say: “Think of the greatness of this country. Whatever you do, make sure this country is there for the next families who need it.”
Now, I’m raising my own family here in Illinois, and that’s the ethos I bring into Congress every day. Because every family – regardless of who they are, where they live, or how many letters are in their last name – deserves the chance to work hard and succeed.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
Honestly, there aren’t a lot of people who look like me or have stories like mine in the Senate.
Donald Trump and his far-right MAGA maniacs don’t want to see folks like me succeed, let alone be elected to the U.S. Senate.
But I refuse to let people like them win. So now, I’m running for the United States Senate to hold Donald Trump accountable and fight for a better future for hardworking Americans.
I have just a few short weeks remaining before my election day, and I hope I can count on you to join me in this fight. Please, before midnight, can you split $5, $25, or whatever you can afford between me and Resist Reclaim Rebuild so we can hit our midnight goals and flip the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
CHIP IN TODAY TO DEFEAT MAGA EXTREMISM! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-raja]
Thank you for standing with me,
Raja Krishnamoorthi
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.
PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW.RESISTRECLAIMREBUILD.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE.
Resist Reclaim Rebuild
1331 FLORIDA AVE NW
Washington, DC 20009
United States

Our 2026 Sustaining Membership team will be the backbone of the Republican party during these incredibly close midterms. When you join for just $35 , your membership fee goes directly to supporting patriots who are dedicated to furthering my father's America First agenda. ** **** If we lose our MAGA majority this year, my father's agenda - and his legacy - will be completely demolished. They might even remove him from office. Our country is hanging in the balance, and when you become a Sustaining Member, YOU become our first line of defense against the socialist Democrats. name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: True leaders put people first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

I've done a lot of traveling lately, speaking to organizations or state Democratic Parties, raising money for candidates in tough elections, and making appearances on cable and broadcast news.

The thing I talk about over and over again is what Democrats can be doing to push back on an out-of-control Trump Administration, talk to voters in every type of community—small and large, rural and urban—and win everywhere.

I often say I'm living proof that Democrats can win anywhere, having been elected three times in a state Donald Trump won by 31 points in 2024.

One of the things I tell Democrats they can do to earn the trust of voters and win elections in red and purple states? Spend 80% of your time talking about the things that matter to 100% of people. Those include:
* **Your job. Whether you're making enough to support your family.**

* **Whether you can afford your next doctor's appointment — for you, your parents, or your kids.**

* **The safety of the roads and bridges you drive every day, and whether your commute to work is longer because of traffic, or shorter thanks to good roads.**

* **The quality of education offered at the school where you drop your children off.**

* **Being safe and feeling safe in your neighborhood.**

These are the things that every American thinks about every day. And they happen to be the parts of American life that Donald Trump and the current Congress are either ignoring, or making worse, every day.

Peter, it has never been more important for strong Democratic candidates to compete in tough districts, so that we can win back the House and put a check on a federal government that has gutted healthcare for 17 million Americans to give tax cuts to the wealthy and is threatening to take over our free and fair elections.

In This Together PAC's mission is to help these candidates win, so our government can get back to focusing on the things that matter to 100% of its people.
