We’re going to need serious grassroots momentum from the very beginning of this race to defend OR-05. So I’m coming to you: [_**Will you chip in $5, $25, or even $50 today and become a Founding Donor of my re-election campaign? Democrats have no path to retaking the House without this seat, so every dollar will have a huge impact:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126865734/606200464/-2128870824?refcode=email_030726_launch&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBkZGQyODctNDgxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YW4D36FUfqspRNN8ZJsy8Uo5dQGnV5HK0pVkvffD69s=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126865735/606200465/-2128870824?refcode=email_030726_launch&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBkZGQyODctNDgxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YW4D36FUfqspRNN8ZJsy8Uo5dQGnV5HK0pVkvffD69s=)

Since my community sent me to Congress, I’ve put in the hard work to deliver meaningful results for Oregonians.
I introduced more than 15 bipartisan bills during my first term, four of which passed the House. This legislation has focused on lowering costs, protecting Oregon's environment, supporting students, improving healthcare, and addressing wildfire response.
I hosted more than 95,000 constituents across 26 town halls so far, including my 10-stop "Give 'Em Hell" Tour in response to the Trump administration — always working to ensure Oregonians’ voices are being heard.
I secured more than $160 million in federal funding for OR-05, including $34 million for clean drinking water, public safety, child care, and affordable housing.
And I’ve been a bipartisan bill mover, delivering results on key issues in a Republican-led House, while also going to the mat fighting for Oregonians.
**I'm ready and eager to continue this progress through 2028 and beyond — and I need you with me now more than ever.**
This will be my first election since we made history together in 2024. Republicans know that control of the House runs straight through OR-05, and they’re DETERMINED to flip this seat back to red and tighten their grip on the House.
**[Just like in 2024, I’m relying on the support of generous folks like you to help bring home another win for Oregon. name: Defend Our Courts
subject: MAGA’s Republic-ending Death Star moves through Congress
body:
The SAVE Act would disenfranchise millions of voters. In some states, it could end mail-in voting. It would also open the door to intimidating election workers with threats of prosecution.

---
| This is a full-blown EMERGENCY.
MAGA is moving fast to rig the upcoming elections. If Trump succeeds, our Republic could collapse before our very eyes.
And MAGA has unveiled the most dangerous piece of their election rigging strategy yet in Congress. It's called the SAVE Act:
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hVhjMukFoOclOnWf6D3nw0Srt6b2Xq75msL2c0c8wNlK4ggrB02DaEpozvj2inxc0b33U03382xVNLwori6D9dpn-Ru2fShuuSP1vnb14C8_Ly4LaAEK4gUxJfrQk3XBwEoIABQvEIlcSSEHc9spYdblysDsaY8ZWFNfKTiBmA5YvDn8fepgSXUvC2tN7MrPOFKrR-f37QYYUvMP0geh009mKckojWA-TdRhOj6pJunFg1pXEjbkUw2DGQSVYaGOeGef_xt9Dp2HvXuqlvvzzdqOi1iOCHrKQWT6_MUSr8OhFg-fYXe71zjEfffZlRkv5yxeAd7nfQ_GZSfcTAA8gb5FCraScJkIW5O0rc79HcIOYY9YDoFZQFIv3Znb04n59JA7CAPHXis=&c=pq4D3yRVOYrJ35d1fO20pD8hVrRE5P3oRrzRc-FGTIExtlzxD6HKig==&ch=Rx8-DmhVqjpOz_R4clkY8IGdVGo47ePFKReOJBJi19C2vVfLpcwJxw==)
---
| MAGA just introduced their equivalent of the Death Star, and it could destroy our Republic.
The SAVE Act would disenfranchise millions of voters. In some states, it could end mail-in voting. It would also open the door to intimidating election workers with threats of prosecution.
Right now, MAGA Senate Majority Leader John Thune is pledging to bring the SAVE Act to the Senate floor. MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson has already pushed it through the House.
But Democrats aren't without hope: There is one critical flaw in their plan. Election administration is a state responsibility, and state Supreme Courts will play a decisive role in how any federal voting law is interpreted and enforced.
That's why Defend Our Courts exists. In 2025, we successfully defended the pro-democracy majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court to safeguard election integrity in a critical swing state.
Now, MAGA billionaires are gearing up to spend millions to try and capture state Supreme Courts to advance Trump's election rigging plot in 2026. It will be an uphill battle.
But we have friends everywhere.

It would also open the door to intimidating election workers with threats of prosecution. | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | This is a full-blown EMERGENCY. MAGA is moving fast to rig the upcoming elections. If Trump succeeds, our Republic could collapse before our very eyes. And MAGA has unveiled the most dangerous piece of their election rigging strategy yet in Congress. It's called the SAVE Act: | == | MAGA just introduced their equivalent of the Death Star, and it could destroy our Republic. The SAVE Act would disenfranchise millions of voters. In some states, it could end mail-in voting. It would also open the door to intimidating election workers with threats of prosecution. Right now, MAGA Senate Majority Leader John Thune is pledging to bring the SAVE Act to the Senate floor. MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson has already pushed it through the House. But Democrats aren't without hope: There is one critical flaw in their plan. Election administration is a state responsibility, and state Supreme Courts will play a decisive role in how any federal voting law is interpreted and enforced. That's why Defend Our Courts exists. In 2025, we successfully defended the pro-democracy majority on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court to safeguard election integrity in a critical swing state. Now, MAGA billionaires are gearing up to spend millions to try and capture state Supreme Courts to advance Trump's election rigging plot in 2026. It will be an uphill battle. body:
Trump’s draft Executive Order could wipe the voter rolls clean.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rcCcOpt1HemluByVsPq-kOd1VDBg4122PWJeuxF-86nrutfHSGXKc36s02R8L-dGni8lJGoDKWrYHJLD_3mEc9JlrH67c52oCpGfstoDGMcj39zfewWJ_fVb0jk3Nbq706wKKswyYT0Xn9s0s2XalBY_X1vo2r5R9I8MBmcUp9mRK_2N_2nhnha9RHvsIZQTCew_LWbex-zGxxmU3IYEnrnGHt4I94sjVmPt9VsdAZrgTo_EBC4HFQ==&c=nnCMKb7g-vtIPVkQogqqVN_2iXGLVfV_MgOXkUvffJNbFiWsNWyvkg==&ch=N9OyhISQsLQf-XXvGoSMGAQAo863wCCCnbwrucQep328wNNxq4SaiA==)
---
|
Peter,
"You aren't registered to vote."
If MAGA gets its way, that is exactly what millions of Americans, people who have voted for years, even decades, could hear when they show up at the polls this November.
Last week, we warned you about this desperate move by MAGA. It turns out it is much worse than we thought. New reporting about the draft executive order circulating in MAGA circles reveals just how far they are willing to go to cling to power: schemes that could wipe voter rolls and trigger mass confusion before votes are even cast.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rcCcOpt1HemluByVsPq-kOd1VDBg4122PWJeuxF-86nrutfHSGXKc36s02R8L-dGni8lJGoDKWrYHJLD_3mEc9JlrH67c52oCpGfstoDGMcj39zfewWJ_fVb0jk3Nbq706wKKswyYT0Xn9s0s2XalBY_X1vo2r5R9I8MBmcUp9mRK_2N_2nhnha9RHvsIZQTCew_LWbex-zGxxmU3IYEnrnGHt4I94sjuylK4f0KTsQdErXR4THd_A==&c=nnCMKb7g-vtIPVkQogqqVN_2iXGLVfV_MgOXkUvffJNbFiWsNWyvkg==&ch=N9OyhISQsLQf-XXvGoSMGAQAo863wCCCnbwrucQep328wNNxq4SaiA==)
---

Picture it:
Lines wrapping around election offices as Americans scramble to confirm their registration. Voters turned away on Election Day. Millions of voices silenced.
It would be a nightmare for Democracy. But for MAGA, it would be a dream come true.
The institutions with the most immediate power to protect voters from MAGA's insidious election rigging scheme will not be SCOTUS, federal agencies, or politicians.
It will be state Supreme Courts.
Those courts will decide how elections are administered, how voter eligibility rules are applied, and whether citizens are allowed to cast their ballots when it matters most.
That's why Defend Our Courts was created.
In 2025, we helped lead the defense of the liberal majority on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court, protecting a critical electoral firewall in a must-win swing state.
Now the next test is here: The Wisconsin Supreme Court election on April 7th.
If we win, we can lock in a pro-democracy majority until 2030. If we lose, that firewall could collapse just months before the next presidential election. We cannot afford that risk.
[As MAGA plots an unprecedented escalation, we can't afford to give a single inch. Can you rush a contribution of $50, $25. or whatever you can spare right now to help defend the courts that are Democracy's last line of defense against MAGA's election rigging?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rcCcOpt1HemluByVsPq-kOd1VDBg4122PWJeuxF-86nrutfHSGXKc36s02R8L-dGbFHaw5qc6uS0en1BqpjsTHgFdJt6H2rKCMaW9Ed8H62zMPTPNfJco51WlEUEQg9mw3w59cKHEALWF5OLF617LShf4LB0JrV9CLhwUaaeyMHrsfWI5u_oLh_MoA4qfgi5gY59mcqTychjHBeaDvD8IYPbkuonhOrp33HS3Krd6FK7U2zeWJjAZrj_RmaDF-6o&c=nnCMKb7g-vtIPVkQogqqVN_2iXGLVfV_MgOXkUvffJNbFiWsNWyvkg==&ch=N9OyhISQsLQf-XXvGoSMGAQAo863wCCCnbwrucQep328wNNxq4SaiA==)

name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: how the FBI used Google data to arrest 1,575 people
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8299483/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvQTJXTUU0Nmh5Wg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDc/LbmNsbXBCU2FHbA/qP2hpZHM9bmNlekJTeVJQdFkxV29scw/gaaxe5A/sbr5bab005a)

On January 6th, 2021, 1000's gathered in Washington D.C.
Within weeks, the FBI arrested over 1,575 people.
How did they find them?
Their phones told the FBI exactly where they were.
The FBI didn't hack anyone's smartphone. They didn't need warrants.
They just asked Google for a list.
It's called a "geofence warrant."
The FBI draws a digital boundary around a location. The Capitol building, for example.
Then they ask Google: "Which phones were inside this boundary on January 6th between 1 PM and 4 PM?"
Google hands over the list. 1000's of names with complete location history showing exactly where each person went.
Most people arrested had no idea their phones were tracking them. They deleted photos. Stayed away from social media. Kept their heads down.
But their phones kept a complete record. And Google handed it over.
I'm not discussing the politics of January 6th.
What matters is the method.
Geofence warrants are used 1000's of times a year. For protests. Rallies. Public gatherings.
Any time law enforcement wants to know who was in a specific location, they ask Google.
The smartphone you're reading this on right at this moment is creating that list.
Every place you go. Every building you enter. Everything logged, timestamped, stored on Google's servers.
It doesn't matter if you disabled location settings. Your smartphone is still tracking you through cell towers, WiFi networks, Bluetooth connections.
The government can retrieve it with a single inquiry to Google.
You don't have to do anything wrong to end up on a list. You just have to be in the wrong place at the wrong time.
A protest turns violent three blocks away? Your smartphone puts you at the scene.
Someone commits a crime near where you visited? You're in the area.
Your smartphone proves you were there. And you're on a list.
That's why I use [The Ghostphone](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8299483/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVnaG9zdHBob25lLnN0b3JlLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDc/LbmNsbXBCU2FHbA/qP3JlZj1XQVJST09N/gaaxe5A/s9r99bae480)
[ ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8299483/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVnaG9zdHBob25lLnN0b3JlLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDc/LbmNsbXBCU2FHbA/qP3JlZj1XQVJST09N/gaaxe5A/s9r99bae480)
It's powered by GrapheneOS. The most secure mobile operating system available. Configured by security veterans with 15+ years of surveillance industry experience.
No Google tracking. No location logging. No data feeding the surveillance machine.
Works like a normal smartphone. Calls, texts, apps. But it doesn't create evidence against you.
Don't wait until your smartphone puts you on a list.
[Checkout The Ghostphone](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8299483/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVnaG9zdHBob25lLnN0b3JlLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDc/LbmNsbXBCU2FHbA/qP3JlZj1XQVJST09N/gaaxe5A/s9r99bae480).
Stay safe,

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8299483/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDc/LbmNsbXBCU2FHbA/qP2hpZHM9bmNlekJTeVJQdFkxV29scw/gaaxe5A/s4pe986cd2b)

body:
We deserve better.

subject: Saikat Snapshot: Here’s what we’ve been up to

body:
The truth is, it takes a lot to reach voters in every corner of San Francisco. But since no one can be everywhere at once, we wanted to share some highlights from the past month. | | |
---
| Hi folks,

Our campaign’s momentum has grown in all the right ways and I want to thank YOU for being part of it. We’re building a campaign made up of neighbors talking to neighbors about how we can make our city and country better. Saikat is working every day to make sure he reaches every voter in SF and builds the movement needed to deliver the change we all know is so necessary.

**Here are a few campaign highlights:**
### Honoring Black History Month
February may be over, but celebrating Black History isn’t restricted to a single month of the year. It lives in our neighborhoods, our culture, and our communities every day.

Last week, Saikat attended a Ramadan Iftar with the SF Muslim Community Center, as well as the Black History Month closing reception at City Hall.

### In the Media
>From chatting with creators and podcast hosts to writeups in the press, check out some of our favorite links:

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvBJsgoQJO9_stfQfbemoDVSfudlU6L-piQGFZhcbkpVOHN7ZWoYTjUeH93vusGaan3Mnm_V8lRvPqUFTvkZdwmq_YSDWLzI-3afjZozjoaSfC6OXd2I35k9zbI4twvDS5r9I2pPj4Eb1FGIy5V3nzzDEdt8NVlAQbp5e4VYgs6IwuJBwFDLre6tsb5nAnO7TlX0GDKhOiFhxH11OeHRG8EBAr4UDsO9x9EewMXjZnovcvi5zEDyFX1ZsF1HHish7O0rGM1R56KlkKcx3Otn5yg48aZpYwdzUjDwoM2Y1xfYkQ/4oq/T6RSLo2STVeleDuVMllmMw/h0/h001.K20shtezA3WxOs7wjWXr9Vhjc3yBO_9aDuXXHgpfB4w)

* 🎧 **_[Listen](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.s333gSbyhQmXsyCO3lhAD_wPGYpZmzFh1BtkTTXl-C6Nh8waVy53kJg01Xkoxnz90YaqbM_RcCoP_WhtIV203skC-_ckdmu5DgN1SHRlhvcH1nNx7NJ04u9FVhZ9qgkk3TIz3JzO5YvV0k0MoDh0fjoqpgMYmsQeIjCfnBEwCVjtfSJ-F0277XJWha_yVB7KoFQXzxGBXHDyNAaewpJsFfnmb6D6RkpF5Sf5_3O7CoNxwS-ebihO-k8g_EahcV1qYngafOcaYpFJdWM2JITs5wHJb6o96oCSrcbsllsAiH6CKPcxR35_sojH1RxLjNF8NEBPEt2X5ZpMyyTWQruVbA/4oq/T6RSLo2STVeleDuVMllmMw/h5/h001.0o5YvZShW1bVaH45PKHJqbSggq8kwioIvSeiIPeF4Bg)_** : Saikat discussed a larger vision for building an economy that works for everyone on the Better Future with Michael Mezz podcast.

### Comedy Show
_No Laughing Matter_ with Abby Govindan, Angel Jin, Natasha Vinik, and Davidson Boswell

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvAi9vpS-ycFwQxWhR3Ket-2AIXwFnX6HxRkCB2kgylBDm-SYdDL89tSMEaG8m5I5mu5235YqLhVK0tQBu9PiXGowNKkfxpkc7ae9Y4PNZTFXvVWS4sy6OZup0tPxAHMXcORnFWU6b3wQMYZ2PHbqwLbO5nJlzz-FC3PB0UwYhAMC-RX8o1tmIyROdC_v5VaBGPRZgyfJk8Ys01HsArW_NNqN4ehr12kolQf6Aceb5S5nbW3G-5eh2mgnI6hf8eq3aO_70U5f5PgVQ4P2ICuF0rKq5UUQQTGLi8Q1JW92emoeg/4oq/T6RSLo2STVeleDuVMllmMw/h8/h001.laDnjLFGGKyjYm175ghyrJjtztG_sYZ6DDWkLvMIfgs)
Even when times are rough, it’s joy that helps sustain us and keeps us going. That’s why we brought together four amazing comedians to help us laugh, socialize, and organize to fight for a better world.

If you couldn’t make it, **_[you can watch Saikat’s set here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvAi9vpS-ycFwQxWhR3Ket-2sLMvD9FXIkk3rds_jNwJ3BmhrJC7zGbw2X1sACPmvwMYwmfxKO4LbzGCBG33RlrDxm8Jo89f-kLYJH1OGRrwCY52peafQac7uomXoB0SVLkWTZhssKDyg2lwp0MnhjJKCHFcdvA_0CsYGTgaUlYbx3fdqoToCaIiE1kffJxvhI66-haHDmwIIrU9NLi4R7IwXH61OHiiAYqTPUqkLFRpVo1yECfYydY-5LSA8SUj_lhIhMJXBxRSvTRsxvbAup_kptIZmEf9OJTdQWYubORwfQ/4oq/T6RSLo2STVeleDuVMllmMw/h9/h001.qluzB3PRnradMUuiL9wXQmW2i0gh9eCQaBnHyGXFyug)_**

### Solidarity with UESF in the teachers strike

In February, UESF (United Educators of San Francisco) won a historic contract after a week-long strike — securing better wages, healthcare for their dependents, and more support for special education. The show of support from parents and the entire community was overwhelming, and it proved something we already knew: **when we fight, we win**.

But the fight isn't over. Saikat is running for Congress to fight for universal childcare and Pre-K, tuition-free public universities and trade schools, and better federal funding for our public schools. **If we have the money to pass a $900 billion defense budget, we have the money to make sure our public schools are fully funded forever**.

### Meeting with Voters across San Francisco
Saikat ramped up his streak of Town Halls in every corner of San Francisco. We’ve hosted 15 events and talked to more than 2,200 neighbors. Saikat’s having real conversations where voters can share their experiences and ask the questions that matter to them. We’re digging in on everything from affordability and housing to how to ensure AI actually benefits society, how to fight corruption, and deliver real change in Washington. (And we’ve always got pizza from Pasquale’s on deck).

Saikat has also been meeting voters nearly every weekday on small group virtual video calls.

Look: We have less than 100 days until the June primary – which means _now is the time to get involved!_

We’re knocking doors every single weekend, and phone banking even more frequently! **_[Can you chip in any amount – even $1 – to power our movement and help us reach voters?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9GgNqQBZQbHGys41Ff66GbQ7omrOFvOr9SBpsg46qazeFDZ3S7rD1rqFS9P4tVAgoXYrxY7pj8m_Ad1Ricftkt1CJAwV1VeLQVvoEqV-2bcfdXaKQUcj5WvzGdUXvqLpYSWvoHhRfBPZ9fPvbNC-JtQ8c6vSkzZk87o9sLYADSeJ8PYaZIObNe2o0vqUk8F3bCI0HldqRvhbPkecNf4yHdQu6MdjBHP6maUvlj3oEP2r7-y362AeKvU_-zxoj7kYEjd2bAiDYPFU7oSqHTXBPQm3xA53MRUGX-WLBoG-NwvRpJQEZbFf0M8d59fh57w9Bkne5UK0vvnCzQK27RFhEfirPq9bYUTAdd5bMOTpQPp42Y-gYiwT9AkbDUwqWe6ouKuaeLRHElWCLcKMSVpJ7/4oq/T6RSLo2STVeleDuVMllmMw/h10/h001.gVYVtfZzcP7qypzqo6_2eiGRHh95UJsJ40bWpQD4WhA)_**

He’s running for Congress to build a San Francisco that works for everyone—teachers, immigrants, service workers, and everyone else who makes this city the best in the world.

If you believe San Franciscans deserve affordable housing, universal healthcare, climate resilience, and public power: **_[volunteer with us](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe9suWVqtFb-BWoi2l0CARRcd_e4zXZseJAYE6YegEXxXBWdkSxe_yiJNsU21d0Z5_Ss1n5y1gS1Sd-3d8--fOoGd8ib36xiqh_QJ4cO5biobIo_YfuktQZQ5nkwOjchR6BeTGVTw9pf725GXmavqdqn9HpBvEPfTLDDDBPhxhH1WLnJInq2k_QDzNMIcNI1fMriDRckdTRQebFyiue2XehQ4WPSfnvwglBrk9rO2VIQE0b5OY6fQOnSj3KWwRf_ION9y9v6y9MyEHOVQyiN2o_r0KyQGw0ODK6gnN3xM1bHYfnsnU3vNxUt86OUSEqgOlkOautev_I4_R63UyaIFWX0kXvaDCBFhmqssw3-Jb5p/4oq/T6RSLo2STVeleDuVMllmMw/h20/h001.TjQr65dbJL3fHPNp24eIIsw7IhkcS_5lXxiHKc64s7A)_** and learn more about our campaign **_[on our website](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMe9suWVqtFb-BWoi2l0CARTrhcrxFm4sp-nVDL_iR0zRMbzp8tGImlVirc4jq3mE4bmmXqQAmtiY9EKXYzOsFkUIzY9MmSuUw2dYW52bgzJiWtenvv2m7aoPu4P3vTMoC8H4e8JjcgIl5hNBbmU7SStbklw7MQM6pifJrVYR29gHMl6v3WVDTNRZLt-ewOFMpM8lFpJoTu7CmfB8SfGECf-4c49eDedziWMhgZLmLsUeDwzgVRFq6nyz1Ww2Sodz9JI-0tYVTT43EmrLKWcIHGW3HK5VCop-5l3t2xms2qcHur66sIHRJmx9AzCFwvUBz3cQp8AasmuYbVKU3ZDlsmURt-PKWLIvyZp5Qd8fPCBu/4oq/T6RSLo2STVeleDuVMllmMw/h21/h001.KVfzNueQBqVI_q_qpOT2Kpb3cp7EEj58-M6yN6doaVE)_**.

clean_body: The truth is, it takes a lot to reach voters in every corner of San Francisco. But since no one can be everywhere at once, we wanted to share some highlights from the past month. | | | | Hi folks, Our campaign’s momentum has grown in all the right ways and I want to thank YOU for being part of it. We’re building a campaign made up of neighbors talking to neighbors about how we can make our city and country better. Saikat is working every day to make sure he reaches every voter in SF and builds the movement needed to deliver the change we all know is so necessary. Here are a few campaign highlights: Honoring Black History Month February may be over, but celebrating Black History isn’t restricted to a single month of the year. It lives in our neighborhoods, our culture, and our communities every day. Last week, Saikat attended a Ramadan Iftar with the SF Muslim Community Center, as well as the Black History Month closing reception at City Hall. In the Media From chatting with creators and podcast hosts to writeups in the press, check out some of our favorite links: 👀 : Saikat appeared on Hasan Piker's stream to discuss a broad array of issues, including the state of California politics, his vision for San Francisco, and the future of AI. 👀 : Saikat joined the Meidas Touch team to discuss how we have the resources to Abolish ICE, fund public transit, affordable housing, and Medicare for All. 📚 : In The Hill, a columnist asked: “Could the next AOC emerge from San Francisco?” While AOC is one of a kind, Saikat would be honored to join her in Congress. And last week, quoted Saikat Chakrabarti criticizing Trump's record prior to the State of the Union. 🎧 : Saikat discussed a larger vision for building an economy that works for everyone on the Better Future with Michael Mezz podcast. 🎧 : Saikat joined The Realignment to discuss why this moment requires more from government and politicians than “making the DMV work better.” 📚 : Saikat's plan to fight for the Free City College tuition program was covered by The Guardsman. Comedy Show No Laughing Matter with Abby Govindan, Angel Jin, Natasha Vinik, and Davidson Boswell Even when times are rough, it’s joy that helps sustain us and keeps us going. That’s why we brought together four amazing comedians to help us laugh, socialize, and organize to fight for a better world. If you couldn’t make it, Solidarity with UESF in the teachers strike In February, UESF (United Educators of San Francisco) won a historic contract after a week-long strike — securing better wages, healthcare for their dependents, and more support for special education. The show of support from parents and the entire community was overwhelming, and it proved something we already knew: when we fight, we win. But the fight isn't over. Saikat is running for Congress to fight for universal childcare and Pre-K, tuition-free public universities and trade schools, and better federal funding for our public schools. If we have the money to pass a $900 billion defense budget, we have the money to make sure our public schools are fully funded forever. Meeting with Voters across San Francisco Saikat ramped up his streak of Town Halls in every corner of San Francisco. We’ve hosted 15 events and talked to more than 2,200 neighbors. Saikat’s having real conversations where voters can share their experiences and ask the questions that matter to them. We’re digging in on everything from affordability and housing to how to ensure AI actually benefits society, how to fight corruption, and deliver real change in Washington. (And we’ve always got pizza from Pasquale’s on deck). Saikat has also been meeting voters nearly every weekday on small group virtual video calls. Look: We have less than 100 days until the June primary – which means now is the time to get involved! We’re knocking doors every single weekend, and phone banking even more frequently! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Organized people will defeat organized money, if we fight for real change. Let’s get to work. -Emily Emily Hyden Campaign Manager Saikat for Congress | | | | Saikat Chakrabarti was Bernie’s Tech Director, AOC’s first chief of staff, founded Justice Democrats, and helped bring the Green New Deal to life. He’s running for Congress to build a San Francisco that works for everyone—teachers, immigrants, service workers, and everyone else who makes this city the best in the world. If you believe San Franciscans deserve affordable housing, universal healthcare, climate resilience, and public power: and learn more about our campaign . name: Juliana Stratton
subject: I’m being attacked by the far-right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
These attacks aren't meaningless. They’re a coordinated effort to smear me and silence our movement — and to prop up my MAGA donor-backed opponent at the same time.
#
**I’m being attacked by the right and Trump’s MAGA allies nonstop, Peter.**
After our ad went live, Fox News picked it up on talk show after talk show. The far right came after me on social media. And an RNC spokeswoman went on the record to call me a “radical who would rather let criminals run rampant than make Chicago safer.”
These attacks aren't meaningless. They’re a coordinated effort to smear me and silence our movement — and to prop up my MAGA donor-backed opponent at the same time.
Let me be clear: I’m not intimidated or scared. But I am realistic.
When they attack us for speaking plainly about how Illinoisans feel, we have to respond with strength and by amplifying the truth.
That means keeping our ads on the air and making sure voters hear directly from me, not through their spin. It means proving that our ad isn't just boosting our momentum, it's going to lead us to victory.
And that takes resources — resources that only this grassroots team can build.
So in the face of these attacks, I’m asking:
**[Can you rush $5, split between my campaign for U.S. Senate and State Democrats Committee, today to help me respond with strength and keep our ads on air?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101497?refcode=em20260307-10145&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10145%2E614464%2EoTf8Pa)**

subject: My priority

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: Chip in before midnight to stop Doug Jones | Peter, Let me be crystal clear: this could be our LAST CHANCE to ruin the Democrats ' dreams. If that sounds enticing to you, Which dream am I talking about? The dream of flipping Alabama blue and corrupting the rest of America with their Woke Communist Ideology. Their golden boy, Doug Jones, entered the Alabama governor's race and is already showing hints at pulling off a miracle against me. Already, the Dems have dumped enough money behind Doug to cut my lead in HALF! We CANNOT take the Democrats lightly. If we keep kicking the can down the road, soon enough I'll be LOSING in the polls as Doug pulls ahead before election day. That's a reality that I refuse to live with. So I need your help RIGHT NOW. Not tomorrow, not next week, not next month. If we don't get serious about this campaign before midnight, it might be too late to stop the Democrats' momentum. | Thank you, Coach Tuberville - Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? subject: It goes beyond politics. It’s personal.

body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260307-61232&t=1001&akid=61232%2E1407376%2EMsdDRj ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260307-61232&t=1002&akid=61232%2E1407376%2EMsdDRj ]Demand Justice PAC

The courts decide everything. Who can vote. Who gets healthcare. Whose
rights are protected and whose aren’t.

But right now, Trump and his cronies are trying to turn the courts into
playgrounds for billionaires and political operatives, stacking them with
judges who will serve anyone but the people.

At Demand Justice PAC, we don’t sit back and hope someone else fixes it.
We investigate every nominee, expose their records, call out the
politicians — both Democrats and Republicans — who enable them. We shine a
light on the system-rigging, the backroom deals, and the lifetime
appointments that threaten your rights.

Because when loyalist judges are confirmed, it goes beyond politics. It’s
personal.

These judges are handpicked operatives by Trump himself who are ready to
rubber-stamp attacks on workers, voters, immigrants, and the people — all
to benefit the powerful.

And too many lawmakers? They’re happy to look the other way.

But that’s where we come in. We’re building a national movement to block
dangerous nominees, pressuring politicians relentlessly to do their jobs,
and turning outrage into results.

Every judge confirmed today locks in the battles we’ll face tomorrow.
Every day we wait makes it harder to defend the rights we rely on. That’s
why we need people like you — committed and ready to fight — powering this
movement.

clean_body: I was officially designated a top target by House Democrats. Now, House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries is saying they “expect to have an extension level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority. | Fellow American - I don’t have good news. FIRST: I was officially named a top target by House Democrats (DCCC) NOW: House Democrat Leader Hakeem Jeffries says they “expect to have an extinction level event” as part of their effort to take back the Majority. Let me translate what that means: they’re raising MILLIONS, and they’re going to spend it in districts like mine. They are not wasting any time. On the DCCC website, they have specific pages to fundraise against me: They’re doing this because they think my seat is easy to flip. We have to show them that’s not true. They believe that if they spend enough, they can buy this seat and move one step closer to handing the gavel back to the Left. I refuse to let that happen.... but I can’t do it alone, Fellow American. If we’re going to defend this seat and protect the Republican House Majority, we must build our grassroots war chest now. We need this before their millions start flooding in. Will you rush $10, $25, or even $50 today to help me fight back and prove this seat is NOT easy to flip? This is exactly how Democrats operate: target strong conservatives early, declare momentum, and scare up massive amounts of cash from liberal donors across the country. But we’re not for sale. Thank you for being in this fight with me, Greg Murphy, M.D. | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. name: News via Our Revolution
subject: Trump’s War, No Kings, and Taking Back Congress
disclaimer_text: paid for by the people who have the most
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: Trump’s War in Iran | Next No Kings! | ICE Out Now! |
Talarico | TX Victories | Must-Win Midterms | Exciting New
Endorsements | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is focused on building grassroots power to Fight Trump
& the Oligarchs with our 3 Point Strategy:

1. Fight Trump’s Oligarch Agenda - from Capitol Hill to City Halls

2. Elect Anti-Oligarch Champions up and down the ballot

3. Get Oligarch Money out of Politics and uplift the grassroots

Read below to learn how we’re carrying out our mission - and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1011&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]chip
in a donation to fuel this people-powered resistance.

★ ★ ★

Trump did not have the authority to drag us into another horrific war
— yet here we are with the GOP-led House and Senate blocking War
Powers efforts to restrict his unilateral military actions in Iran.

This is exactly why we need to TAKE BACK CONGRESS and elect
representatives who will stand up for peace — and invest in our
communities, not carnage and conflict abroad.

The primaries are happening now, and our movement is coming for the
midterms. Read on to learn how We the People are taking a stand — in
the streets, in the halls of power, and at the ballot box.

★ ★ ★

No Kings, No Oligarchs, No War.

About 100,000 tuned in to Our Revolution’s LIVE National Town Hall on
Monday to meet some of our endorsed candidates and organize for the
next No Kings nationwide day of protests.

Christine Wood of the No Kings coalition reported that 1,500 events
have been scheduled so far! And, we’re already training and
recruiting folks to break the 7 million turnout record set by the
last No Kings in October.

“When our families are under attack and rising costs are pushing
people to the brink, silence is not an option,” Christine said.
“That’s why millions have rallied under the banner of No Kings to
stand up to Trump’s growing authoritarianism.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35248?t=1012&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]GET INVOLVED - HELP MAKE NO KINGS THE BIGGEST DAY OF PROTEST IN
AMERICAN HISTORY

★ ★ ★

[3]Take Back The Party

★ ★ ★

Millions in the streets for No Kings will be a chance to make
connections and harness all this energy and righteous anger directly
into the midterms.

Jasmine Crockett didn’t win her race, but she joined our live call
Monday to rally our movement to keep up the fight. Both Jasmine and
Our Revolution are backing her former opponent James Talarico to flip
that Senate seat blue in Texas.

We have a real shot to take back the House AND the Senate in November
and block the worst of Trump during his final years in office — but
we have to dig into the groundwork NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36061?t=1013&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]DONATE TO HELP US ELECT TALARICO TO THE SENATE AND TAKE BACK
CONGRESS IN THE MIDTERMS!

★ ★ ★

One of our great candidates for Congress in Illinois, Patty Garcia,
told us on the live call Monday that she’s running to carry on the
progressive legacy of leaders like Bernie Sanders and Chuy García.

A proud member of a union family and immigrant advocate, Garcia grew
up on the Southwest Side of Chicago and says her working-class roots
drive her fight to put people over profit.

“Our democracy should belong to working people, not billionaires and
special interests,” she said.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution-endorsed Karina Villa joined the call to lay out how
she could hold corporations accountable if elected to be the next
Illinois Comptroller.

Karina pledged to crack down on state contracts with companies tied
to immigration enforcement abuses. “If you profit from ICE terror,
you are out — you cannot continue to receive money from this state,”
she said.

Villa has already flipped a Republican district from red to blue — as
the progressive in the race — and we have her back in this statewide
run.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution-endorsed Jane Kim joined our call to lay out the
importance of having a progressive California Insurance Commissioner,
an office overseeing a $3.3 trillion industry.

Jane emphasized that insurance must be affordable for everyone
because it’s essential to participating in the economy — whether
driving to work, opening a business, or buying a home.

She’s proposing bold reforms, including a public single-payer
disaster insurance program that would pool premiums publicly and
invest in community resilience instead of corporate profits.

These are the kind of innovative leaders that can make a real
difference in our lives and fight for our people. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33955?t=1014&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Chip in a
donation to make sure we get out every single vote!

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENTS

Our Revolution proudly endorses Summer Lee for reelection in PA’s
12th District — one of the boldest progressive voices in Congress!

Summer has signed on to our Defund the Oligarchs, Fund the People
resolution with Rep. Rashida Tlaib, and she’s all-in to take on
billionaire handouts and invest in healthcare, housing, and education
instead.

Our Revolution and Bernie have backed Summer from the start. People
power beat the corporate super PACs before and we can do it again.

★ ★ ★

We proudly endorse Eric Jones for Congress in CA-04!

Eric grew up in a military family that relied on Medicaid and food
assistance — and he’s never forgotten what working families face.

Now he’s running a people-powered campaign focused on affordability,
universal childcare, lower healthcare costs, workers’ rights, and
getting corporate money out of politics.

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is proud to endorse Anthony Driver for Congress in
IL-07, a South Side Chicago leader, labor champion, and progressive
organizer who has spent his career fighting for working people.

As Executive Director of the SEIU Illinois State Council, Driver has
led policy and organizing for 160,000+ union members, fighting for
better wages and stronger labor protections.

A Howard University graduate and lifelong South Side resident, Driver
is a proven movement leader who will stand with working people in
Congress — not corporate interests.

★ ★ ★

And, we’re endorsing Jared Ploger for Illinois State House HD-84, a
public school teacher, union leader, and community advocate fighting
for strong public schools and working families.

As president of Valley View AFT Council, Ploger has advocated for the
resources teachers and students deserve. He also served a decade on
the Oswego School Board.

A three-time Coach of the Year and longtime mentor to young people,
Ploger is the kind of leader we need in Springfield to stand with
teachers, students, and working families.

★ ★ ★

The 2026 midterms are pivotal to take power back from Trump and the
oligarchs who have rigged our economy and captured our democracy.

All of our candidates reject dark and corporate PAC money — and
they’ve all taken the pledge to Fight Oligarchy in office. These are
the kinds of fighters we need to win.

Check out our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35245?t=1015&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Endorsements Page for more, and pick up our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36062?t=1016&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]new
midterms sticker above to help fuel our voter turnout machine!

★ ★ ★

PRIMARY VICTORIES!

It was a nail-biter, but Analilia Mejia - former political director
for Bernie 2020 - won the primary for the congressional seat in New
Jersey’s 11th District!

This victory sent shockwaves through the establishment as Analilia
ran a people-powered campaign to defeat Big Money funded opponents.

After November, we’ll hopefully see her take the fight to Washington
DC!

★ ★ ★

TEXAS CHAMPIONS

Congratulations to our Texas champions who won their primaries on
Tuesday and now head to the general!

Congrats to Rev. Freddie Haynes III on his victory in TX-30! As
Jasmine Crockett’s pastor, he now heads to the general election to
carry the torch in her now-former seat in Congress.

Rooted in decades of pastoral leadership and community organizing in
Dallas, Rev. Haynes has long fought for voting rights, economic
justice, healthcare, and civil rights.

Now he’s ready to bring that fighting spirit to Congress.

★ ★ ★

ON TO THE GENERAL!

Sarah Eckhardt is running for TX Comptroller to lower costs, fight
corruption, and restore trust in government — by ending backroom
deals and stopping blank checks for special interests.

Dolores Lozano is running for Harris Co. Justice of the Peace (Pct.
2/Pl. 2) to protect tenants’ rights and ensure fairness for working
families navigating housing and small claims cases.

Clayton Tucker is running for TX Ag Commissioner as a rancher and
grassroots organizer who will protect land and water, support
regenerative agriculture, and ensure family farmers can thrive.

★ ★ ★

ON TO A RUNOFF!

Two of our Texas progressives came very close to victory — and now
head to a runoff election to clinch the deal!

Julio Salinas — a long-time organizer and Capitol staffer who is
running for Texas State House HD-41 to invest in education,
healthcare and good jobs with strong labor protections.

State Rep. Vikki Goodwin is a four-term progressive fighter who has
consistently put working Texans over corporate interests. Now she's
squaring off for Lt. Governor of Texas to deliver affordable housing,
healthcare and more.

Let's get both of these candidates over the finish line!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1017&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]This is a critical election year, and we have a lot of work ahead
of us. Donate any amount to make sure we have the resources to elect
these amazing candidates and defeat Trump and the GOP in the
midterms!

★ ★ ★

[9]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

U.S. Reps. Ilhan Omar and Jan Schakowsky just became the newest
cosponsor of our Defund the Oligarchs, Fund the People resolution in
Congress!

She joins Reps. Rashida Tlaib, Pramila Jayapal, Delia Ramirez, Summer
Lee, and others in this legislative push to draw a line in the sand.

Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese sat down with
Cenk Uyger on [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36063?t=1018&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]TYT to break down this exciting campaign — and the
governing strategy to achieve it.

We also just released new hard-hitting videos to expose the oligarchs
from [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36064?t=1019&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Big Tech, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36065?t=1020&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Crypto, the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36066?t=1021&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Epstein Class, and more!

Research from Our Revolution, first reported by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35233?t=1022&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]The Guardian,
shows that Trump’s mega-donors from the crypto, oil and gas, and
private detention industries poured nearly $700 million into electing
him and MAGA.

Since then, they’ve raked in more than $170 billion in tax breaks,
government contracts, and policy favors. That’s an 18,000% return on
investment — or $18 billion back for every $1 million spent in the
2024 election.

Our campaign isn’t just about exposing corruption — it’s about ending
corporate control of our government and cutting off the pipelines
that turn political power into private profit.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1023&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Chip in any amount to help fund the activists and organizers
doing this essential work.

★ ★ ★

Learn more about our research and the campaign at our new [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35230?t=1024&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Defund
Oligarchy website and sign on to be a [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35243?t=1025&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Citizen Cosponsor of the
resolution to push more members of Congress to publicly support it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35232?t=1026&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]We take ZERO money from billionaires and big donors. We rely on
the grassroots to keep up this great work. Chip in a donation today!

★ ★ ★

KEEP ICE OUT

Even as Trump is causing carnage abroad, his ICE troops are still
waging terror here at home — and ICE contractors are still making
billions off the cruelty.

Relentless grassroots resistance forced Trump to scale back ICE in
Minneapolis, but raids are still happening and leaving chaos in their
wake.

“The occupation decimated families and people’s ability to work and
to live," Our Revolution Minnesota Organizer Dieu Do told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36067?t=1027&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]local
news in Ohio “The need for mutual aid has skyrocketed — from rent and
mortgage support, to groceries and legal fees.”

“What we experienced in Minnesota was so traumatic and violent, it
will impact us for generations,” said Do. “The lesson we want to give
folks in other states is never forget who the real enemy is."

ICE is coming to city after city, and our coalition of activists and
organizers are fighting back — even notching some important
victories, like blocking Trump’s proposed ICE warehouses in Maryland,
Virginia, and other key states.

And in Pennsylvania, after four weeks of protesting outside city
meetings in Harrisburg, our coalition got a resolution to bar local
collaboration with ICE, as [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36068?t=1028&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]PennLive reported.

★ ★ ★

Thanks to you, WE ARE MAKING A DIFFERENCE. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36069?t=1029&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Pick up a few stickers
to keep fueling our anti-ICE work. We won’t leave our neighbors
behind!

★ ★ ★

TAX THE OLIGARCHS

Bernie Sanders rallied for the California Billionaire Tax with a
massive rally in Los Angeles — and now he’s partnering with Rep. Ro
Khanna to push for a Wealth Tax at the federal level.

Both would levy a one-time 5% tax on billionaires. Both would help
protect healthcare, education, and essential services that people
need.

In California, the tax would raise $100 billion. Bernie’s nationwide
Wealth Tax would raise $4.4 TRILLION!

Our Revolution is all-in to pass the ballot measure in California
this November — and we all need to have Bernie’s back as he wages the
fight in the Senate for tax fairness.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36070?t=1030&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]CLICK TO SUPPORT BERNIE’S WEALTH TAX

★ ★ ★

[23]Elect Candidates

★ ★ ★

We had a blast at the California Democratic Convention — and we're
fired up for 2026.

Our Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese took the stage to lay out
what it will take to defeat Trumpism and dismantle oligarch power —
not just with slogans, but with a governing strategy.

We connected with champions like Rep. Ro Khanna, Rep. Lateefah Simon,
and progressive leaders from across the Golden State — and we're
organizing with allies and candidates to build out the infrastructure
of our movement and build up momentum for the midterms.

★ ★ ★

In Maine, our endorsed candidate for governor, Troy Jackson, is
drawing a clear line.

Troy — a fifth-generation logger and lifelong fighter for working
people — is challenging his opponents to reject dark and corporate
money in the Democratic primary, Our Revolution's Larry Cohen writes
in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36071?t=1031&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Barnraiser.

“For me, this is about fairness,” Jackson said. “Governments
shouldn’t be bought and paid for by the people who have the most
money. Everyday people should have the same say in government that
billionaires have.”

That’s how the Democratic Party can win back trust — and how we can
win power for working people.

★ ★ ★

TELL DEMS: NO OLIGARCH MONEY IN 2026 PRIMARIES

Ultra-rich powerbrokers flooded our political system with nearly $5
BILLION between 2015 and 2024. It’s long past time to stop
billionaires from rigging our elections.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35247?t=1032&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Add your name to demand a ban on Dark Money in ALL Democratic
primaries in 2026!

★ ★ ★

[26]Action Center

★ ★ ★

BIG NEWS! The next No Kings Day is coming up fast on March 28th.
We’re already organizing for massive turnout nationwide — and need
your help!

Now is the time to get involved and help us plan events in your
cities and towns. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35248?t=1033&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Sign up to make this the biggest No Kings Day
ever!

★ ★ ★

Bernie founded Our Revolution to organize everyday people to take on
corporate power and elect an inspiring new generation of leaders —
from AOC to Zohran.

That’s why Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team (CAT) is mobilizing
volunteers across the country to pressure Congress, turn out voters,
and confront oligarchs poisoning our democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/28759?t=1034&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Plug in with our Citizen Action Team to help turn grassroots
energy into real political power.

★ ★ ★

HOT NEW MERCH!

We’re just WEEKS AWAY from the next No Kings Day — and preparations
are underway to make it the largest peaceful protest in American
history!

Pick up the NEW No Kings, No Oligarchs sticker to help fund the work
to train event organizers, mobilize mass turnout, and provide gear
and support on the big day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36072?t=1035&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]GRAB YOUR MERCH!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34909?t=1036&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport20260307.y1Q4MZ&t=1007&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport20260307._W2Cxc&t=1008&akid=10346%2E5885482%2Eha_aPC ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Trump’s War in Iran | Next No Kings! | ICE Out Now! | Talarico | TX Victories | Must-Win Midterms | Exciting New Endorsements | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is focused on building grassroots power to Fight Trump & the Oligarchs with our 3 Point Strategy: 1. Fight Trump’s Oligarch Agenda - from Capitol Hill to City Halls 2. Elect Anti-Oligarch Champions up and down the ballot 3. Get Oligarch Money out of Politics and uplift the grassroots Read below to learn how we’re carrying out our mission - and [ ]chip in a donation to fuel this people-powered resistance. ★ ★ ★ Trump did not have the authority to drag us into another horrific war — yet here we are with the GOP-led House and Senate blocking War Powers efforts to restrict his unilateral military actions in Iran. This is exactly why we need to TAKE BACK CONGRESS and elect representatives who will stand up for peace — and invest in our communities, not carnage and conflict abroad. The primaries are happening now, and our movement is coming for the midterms. Read on to learn how We the People are taking a stand — in the streets, in the halls of power, and at the ballot box. ★ ★ ★ No Kings, No Oligarchs, No War. About 100,000 tuned in to Our Revolution’s LIVE National Town Hall on Monday to meet some of our endorsed candidates and organize for the next No Kings nationwide day of protests. Christine Wood of the No Kings coalition reported that 1,500 events have been scheduled so far! And, we’re already training and recruiting folks to break the 7 million turnout record set by the last No Kings in October. “When our families are under attack and rising costs are pushing people to the brink, silence is not an option,” Christine said. “That’s why millions have rallied under the banner of No Kings to stand up to Trump’s growing authoritarianism.” [ ]GET INVOLVED - HELP MAKE NO KINGS THE BIGGEST DAY OF PROTEST IN AMERICAN HISTORY ★ ★ ★ [3]Take Back The Party ★ ★ ★ Millions in the streets for No Kings will be a chance to make connections and harness all this energy and righteous anger directly into the midterms. Jasmine Crockett didn’t win her race, but she joined our live call Monday to rally our movement to keep up the fight. Both Jasmine and Our Revolution are backing her former opponent James Talarico to flip that Senate seat blue in Texas. We have a real shot to take back the House AND the Senate in November and block the worst of Trump during his final years in office — but we have to dig into the groundwork NOW. [ ]DONATE TO HELP US ELECT TALARICO TO THE SENATE AND TAKE BACK CONGRESS IN THE MIDTERMS! ★ ★ ★ One of our great candidates for Congress in Illinois, Patty Garcia, told us on the live call Monday that she’s running to carry on the progressive legacy of leaders like Bernie Sanders and Chuy García. A proud member of a union family and immigrant advocate, Garcia grew up on the Southwest Side of Chicago and says her working-class roots drive her fight to put people over profit. “Our democracy should belong to working people, not billionaires and special interests,” she said. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution-endorsed Karina Villa joined the call to lay out how she could hold corporations accountable if elected to be the next Illinois Comptroller. Karina pledged to crack down on state contracts with companies tied to immigration enforcement abuses. “If you profit from ICE terror, you are out — you cannot continue to receive money from this state,” she said. Villa has already flipped a Republican district from red to blue — as the progressive in the race — and we have her back in this statewide run. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution-endorsed Jane Kim joined our call to lay out the importance of having a progressive California Insurance Commissioner, an office overseeing a $3.3 trillion industry. Jane emphasized that insurance must be affordable for everyone because it’s essential to participating in the economy — whether driving to work, opening a business, or buying a home. She’s proposing bold reforms, including a public single-payer disaster insurance program that would pool premiums publicly and invest in community resilience instead of corporate profits. These are the kind of innovative leaders that can make a real difference in our lives and fight for our people. [ ]Chip in a donation to make sure we get out every single vote! ★ ★ ★ NEW ENDORSEMENTS Our Revolution proudly endorses Summer Lee for reelection in PA’s 12th District — one of the boldest progressive voices in Congress! Summer has signed on to our Defund the Oligarchs, Fund the People resolution with Rep. Rashida Tlaib, and she’s all-in to take on billionaire handouts and invest in healthcare, housing, and education instead. Our Revolution and Bernie have backed Summer from the start. People power beat the corporate super PACs before and we can do it again. ★ ★ ★ We proudly endorse Eric Jones for Congress in CA-04! Eric grew up in a military family that relied on Medicaid and food assistance — and he’s never forgotten what working families face. Now he’s running a people-powered campaign focused on affordability, universal childcare, lower healthcare costs, workers’ rights, and getting corporate money out of politics. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is proud to endorse Anthony Driver for Congress in IL-07, a South Side Chicago leader, labor champion, and progressive organizer who has spent his career fighting for working people. As Executive Director of the SEIU Illinois State Council, Driver has led policy and organizing for 160,000+ union members, fighting for better wages and stronger labor protections. A Howard University graduate and lifelong South Side resident, Driver is a proven movement leader who will stand with working people in Congress — not corporate interests. ★ ★ ★ And, we’re endorsing Jared Ploger for Illinois State House HD-84, a public school teacher, union leader, and community advocate fighting for strong public schools and working families. As president of Valley View AFT Council, Ploger has advocated for the resources teachers and students deserve. He also served a decade on the Oswego School Board. A three-time Coach of the Year and longtime mentor to young people, Ploger is the kind of leader we need in Springfield to stand with teachers, students, and working families. ★ ★ ★ The 2026 midterms are pivotal to take power back from Trump and the oligarchs who have rigged our economy and captured our democracy. All of our candidates reject dark and corporate PAC money — and they’ve all taken the pledge to Fight Oligarchy in office. These are the kinds of fighters we need to win. Check out our [ ]Endorsements Page for more, and pick up our [ ]new midterms sticker above to help fuel our voter turnout machine! ★ ★ ★ PRIMARY VICTORIES! It was a nail-biter, but Analilia Mejia - former political director for Bernie 2020 - won the primary for the congressional seat in New Jersey’s 11th District! This victory sent shockwaves through the establishment as Analilia ran a people-powered campaign to defeat Big Money funded opponents. After November, we’ll hopefully see her take the fight to Washington DC! ★ ★ ★ TEXAS CHAMPIONS Congratulations to our Texas champions who won their primaries on Tuesday and now head to the general! Congrats to Rev. Freddie Haynes III on his victory in TX-30! As Jasmine Crockett’s pastor, he now heads to the general election to carry the torch in her now-former seat in Congress. Rooted in decades of pastoral leadership and community organizing in Dallas, Rev. Haynes has long fought for voting rights, economic justice, healthcare, and civil rights. Now he’s ready to bring that fighting spirit to Congress. ★ ★ ★ ON TO THE GENERAL! Sarah Eckhardt is running for TX Comptroller to lower costs, fight corruption, and restore trust in government — by ending backroom deals and stopping blank checks for special interests. Dolores Lozano is running for Harris Co. Justice of the Peace (Pct. 2/Pl. 2) to protect tenants’ rights and ensure fairness for working families navigating housing and small claims cases. Clayton Tucker is running for TX Ag Commissioner as a rancher and grassroots organizer who will protect land and water, support regenerative agriculture, and ensure family farmers can thrive. ★ ★ ★ ON TO A RUNOFF! Two of our Texas progressives came very close to victory — and now head to a runoff election to clinch the deal! Julio Salinas — a long-time organizer and Capitol staffer who is running for Texas State House HD-41 to invest in education, healthcare and good jobs with strong labor protections. State Rep. Vikki Goodwin is a four-term progressive fighter who has consistently put working Texans over corporate interests. Now she's squaring off for Lt. Governor of Texas to deliver affordable housing, healthcare and more. Let's get both of these candidates over the finish line! [ ]This is a critical election year, and we have a lot of work ahead of us. Donate any amount to make sure we have the resources to elect these amazing candidates and defeat Trump and the GOP in the midterms! ★ ★ ★ [9]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs ★ ★ ★ U.S. Reps. Ilhan Omar and Jan Schakowsky just became the newest cosponsor of our Defund the Oligarchs, Fund the People resolution in Congress! She joins Reps. Rashida Tlaib, Pramila Jayapal, Delia Ramirez, Summer Lee, and others in this legislative push to draw a line in the sand. Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese sat down with Cenk Uyger on [ ]TYT to break down this exciting campaign — and the governing strategy to achieve it. We also just released new hard-hitting videos to expose the oligarchs from [ ]Big Tech, [ ]Crypto, the [ ]Epstein Class, and more! Research from Our Revolution, first reported by [ ]The Guardian, shows that Trump’s mega-donors from the crypto, oil and gas, and private detention industries poured nearly $700 million into electing him and MAGA. Since then, they’ve raked in more than $170 billion in tax breaks, government contracts, and policy favors. That’s an 18,000% return on investment — or $18 billion back for every $1 million spent in the 2024 election. Our campaign isn’t just about exposing corruption — it’s about ending corporate control of our government and cutting off the pipelines that turn political power into private profit. [ ]Chip in any amount to help fund the activists and organizers doing this essential work. ★ ★ ★ Learn more about our research and the campaign at our new [ ]Defund Oligarchy website and sign on to be a [ ]Citizen Cosponsor of the resolution to push more members of Congress to publicly support it. [ ]We take ZERO money from billionaires and big donors. We rely on the grassroots to keep up this great work. Chip in a donation today! ★ ★ ★ KEEP ICE OUT Even as Trump is causing carnage abroad, his ICE troops are still waging terror here at home — and ICE contractors are still making billions off the cruelty. Relentless grassroots resistance forced Trump to scale back ICE in Minneapolis, but raids are still happening and leaving chaos in their wake. “The occupation decimated families and people’s ability to work and to live," Our Revolution Minnesota Organizer Dieu Do told [ ]local news in Ohio “The need for mutual aid has skyrocketed — from rent and mortgage support, to groceries and legal fees.” “What we experienced in Minnesota was so traumatic and violent, it will impact us for generations,” said Do. “The lesson we want to give folks in other states is never forget who the real enemy is." ICE is coming to city after city, and our coalition of activists and organizers are fighting back — even notching some important victories, like blocking Trump’s proposed ICE warehouses in Maryland, Virginia, and other key states. And in Pennsylvania, after four weeks of protesting outside city meetings in Harrisburg, our coalition got a resolution to bar local collaboration with ICE, as [ ]PennLive reported. ★ ★ ★ Thanks to you, WE ARE MAKING A DIFFERENCE. [ ]Pick up a few stickers to keep fueling our anti-ICE work. We won’t leave our neighbors behind! ★ ★ ★ TAX THE OLIGARCHS Bernie Sanders rallied for the California Billionaire Tax with a massive rally in Los Angeles — and now he’s partnering with Rep. Ro Khanna to push for a Wealth Tax at the federal level. Both would levy a one-time 5% tax on billionaires. Both would help protect healthcare, education, and essential services that people need. In California, the tax would raise $100 billion. Bernie’s nationwide Wealth Tax would raise $4.4 TRILLION! Our Revolution is all-in to pass the ballot measure in California this November — and we all need to have Bernie’s back as he wages the fight in the Senate for tax fairness. [ ]CLICK TO SUPPORT BERNIE’S WEALTH TAX ★ ★ ★ [23]Elect Candidates ★ ★ ★ We had a blast at the California Democratic Convention — and we're fired up for 2026. Our Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese took the stage to lay out what it will take to defeat Trumpism and dismantle oligarch power — not just with slogans, but with a governing strategy. We connected with champions like Rep. Ro Khanna, Rep. Lateefah Simon, and progressive leaders from across the Golden State — and we're organizing with allies and candidates to build out the infrastructure of our movement and build up momentum for the midterms. ★ ★ ★ In Maine, our endorsed candidate for governor, Troy Jackson, is drawing a clear line. Troy — a fifth-generation logger and lifelong fighter for working people — is challenging his opponents to reject dark and corporate money in the Democratic primary, Our Revolution's Larry Cohen writes in [ ]Barnraiser. “For me, this is about fairness,” Jackson said. “Governments shouldn’t be bought and paid for by the people who have the most money. Everyday people should have the same say in government that billionaires have.” That’s how the Democratic Party can win back trust — and how we can win power for working people. ★ ★ ★ TELL DEMS: NO OLIGARCH MONEY IN 2026 PRIMARIES Ultra-rich powerbrokers flooded our political system with nearly $5 BILLION between 2015 and 2024. It’s long past time to stop billionaires from rigging our elections. [ ]Add your name to demand a ban on Dark Money in ALL Democratic primaries in 2026! ★ ★ ★ [26]Action Center ★ ★ ★ BIG NEWS! The next No Kings Day is coming up fast on March 28th. We’re already organizing for massive turnout nationwide — and need your help! Now is the time to get involved and help us plan events in your cities and towns. [ ]Sign up to make this the biggest No Kings Day ever! ★ ★ ★ Bernie founded Our Revolution to organize everyday people to take on corporate power and elect an inspiring new generation of leaders — from AOC to Zohran. That’s why Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team (CAT) is mobilizing volunteers across the country to pressure Congress, turn out voters, and confront oligarchs poisoning our democracy. [ ]Plug in with our Citizen Action Team to help turn grassroots energy into real political power. ★ ★ ★ HOT NEW MERCH! We’re just WEEKS AWAY from the next No Kings Day — and preparations are underway to make it the largest peaceful protest in American history! Pick up the NEW No Kings, No Oligarchs sticker to help fund the work to train event organizers, mobilize mass turnout, and provide gear and support on the big day. [ ]GRAB YOUR MERCH! ★ ★ ★ [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

_How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard._

clean_body: Peter, President Trump wants to abolish President Trump wants to abolish DST and make Standard Time permanent so that there is more daylight in the morning. Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time. How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard. Abolish DST \- Make DST Permanent \- No Change \- More daylight in the morning year-round for our circadian rhythm, more daylight in the evening year-round for recreational activities, or no change? President Trump has already revealed his plans, so now it's your turn to share your thoughts and represent your area. Thank you, Time Change Focus Group * Paid for by the Conservative Battleground Fund PAC (conservativebattlegroundfund.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 2272 Palm Dale Dr SW Wyoming, MI 49519 |

Democrats are winning across the country. On Tuesday night, we saw a massive upset in Arkansas, where Democrats clinched a double-digit swing to flip a Republican seat from red to blue. That marks the 27th seat we’ve flipped since Donald Trump returned to the White House. **This reminds me of when I first ran for Congress in 2018 and flipped a seat held by a Republican incumbent. I know what it takes to win in tough districts and build a blue wave that cannot be ignored.** [_**If you’re ready to take this momentum into November and flip the House, chip in now!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126867797/606206769/2012217392?&refcode=E28663-20260307-DemocratsWinning-SL-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmNiNDFkODUtNGYxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pe0G3m1u2b4GNANY50LIEzdDg5XFPG89ljpiVz5JJOo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126867799/606206772/2012217392?&refcode=E28663-20260307-DemocratsWinning-Image-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmNiNDFkODUtNGYxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pe0G3m1u2b4GNANY50LIEzdDg5XFPG89ljpiVz5JJOo=) [KEEP THE MOMENTUM GOING »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126867801/606206774/2012217392?&refcode=E28663-20260307-DemocratsWinning-SB-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmNiNDFkODUtNGYxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pe0G3m1u2b4GNANY50LIEzdDg5XFPG89ljpiVz5JJOo=) **At this moment, as Donald Trump moves to consolidate power, Democrats must stand united. We cannot get complacent. We have to stay energized. Republicans are going to spend millions to keep their narrow grip on the House majority, and we can’t let our message be drowned out.** Taking back the House starts by protecting the seats we already have. I represent a district in the Central Valley where MAGA Republicans have been trying to make inroads for years. This is the reddest part of California and the GOP’s top target for picking up seats. clean_body: But we can’t get complacent. | = | Peter, I am feeling so encouraged by the election results this week! Democrats are winning across the country. On Tuesday night, we saw a massive upset in Arkansas, where Democrats clinched a double-digit swing to flip a Republican seat from red to blue. That marks the 27th seat we’ve flipped since Donald Trump returned to the White House. This reminds me of when I first ran for Congress in 2018 and flipped a seat held by a Republican incumbent. I know what it takes to win in tough districts and build a blue wave that cannot be ignored. = = = At this moment, as Donald Trump moves to consolidate power, Democrats must stand united. We cannot get complacent. We have to stay energized. Republicans are going to spend millions to keep their narrow grip on the House majority, and we can’t let our message be drowned out. Taking back the House starts by protecting the seats we already have. I represent a district in the Central Valley where MAGA Republicans have been trying to make inroads for years. This is the reddest part of California and the GOP’s top target for picking up seats. That’s why their attacks against me have been relentless. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Let’s keep up the momentum! — Josh *

body:
Good work deserves respect. So does change.

| |
---
Hey there, Lou was a constituent who came to hear Seth speak — he wasn’t sure who he was going to vote for. Lou has been a Democrat his whole life. He respects Senator Markey. He thinks he’s done a good job, and he believes that work deserves respect. But Lou also said something important: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126868818/606210898/2090747700?refcode=260307_tm_listen_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzBlNjRhMC01MDFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20iozBU1RjkJfL6fksA2ziMigBk7f8iulSYLQUa_Qi8=) He said the problem with too many national Democrats right now isn’t effort, it’s ideas. Democrats haven’t put forward a clear plan that people can actually respond to. **Not just words of opposition–but a real plan.** What changed his mind about who to support was that Seth offered exactly that. Real ideas on affordability, defending democracy, innovation, and the future of Massachusetts. Not just pushing back, building forward. Lou put it plainly: **It’s time for action, and thus, it's time for a change.** He said it as someone who’s been around a long time. As someone who respects experience — and also understands that at a certain point, the party needs new leadership. **[If you believe Massachusetts deserves leadership with a plan for what’s next, help us keep this campaign moving.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126868819/606210899/2090747700?refcode=260307_tm_listen_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzBlNjRhMC01MDFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20iozBU1RjkJfL6fksA2ziMigBk7f8iulSYLQUa_Qi8=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126868826/606210906/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260307_tm_listen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzBlNjRhMC01MDFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20iozBU1RjkJfL6fksA2ziMigBk7f8iulSYLQUa_Qi8=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126868827/606210907/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260307_tm_listen&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzBlNjRhMC01MDFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=20iozBU1RjkJfL6fksA2ziMigBk7f8iulSYLQUa_Qi8=)

**➤➤ URGENT: Texas Republicans changed voting rules — then blocked protections** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126868956/606211444/38783915?refcode=em-3.7.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzZlMzMzOC01MDFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XdnYUefr3z_fyjt0jaFAC8HDZhlXvngwsR5DEdMtjuU=)**
* * *
Friend, Texas lawmakers pushed through changes to election rules and then rejected proposals that would have protected voters and clarified how those rules should be implemented. **Election experts warn this combination is dangerous** : changing procedures without safeguards can create confusion, long lines, ballot problems, and unnecessary barriers for voters. And Texas is one of the largest voting states in the country. When states with millions of voters alter election procedures without protections, **the ripple effects can be enormous** – especially in a presidential cycle and midterm elections where turnout is high and margins are tight. This is exactly why Democratic Secretaries of State matter so much. They are the officials who fight for clear election rules, transparent processes, and systems that ensure every eligible voter can cast a ballot that counts. Will you stand STRONG with me as I protect our country? Right now, I’m asking everyone who approves of Operation Epic Fury to rally behind me with incredible messages of support. subject: Senator Mullin is standing with me
