body:
Senator Markwayne Mullin didn't have to get involved in this race, Peter.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/mwm-endorsement-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260306_mwm-endorsement_sb?&utm_medium=GAP&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260307_mwm-endorsement_indirect>
He's one of the toughest conservatives in the U.S. Senate, with his own
battles to fight. But he looked at what's happening in New Hampshire and
decided to stand with us —because he knows this seat can change the balance of
power in Washington.
>> CHIP IN TODAY AND HELP US FLIP THIS SEAT <<
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/mwm-endorsement-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260306_mwm-endorsement_sb?&utm_medium=GAP&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260307_mwm-endorsement_indirect>
That means something to me. And I hope it means something to you, too.

Our state deserves better than a senator who votes with Chuck Schumer. We
deserve someone who will go to Washington and actually fight for secure
borders, for your wallet, for your rights.

Senator Mullin believes we can win this. I believe we can win this. But we
need you in our corner.
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/mwm-endorsement-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260306_mwm-endorsement_sb?&utm_medium=GAP&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260307_mwm-endorsement_indirect>

The left has us in their crosshairs. They will spend whatever it takes to
hold this seat, and we need to be ready to match them dollar for dollar.
>> CHIP IN TODAY AND HELP US FLIP THIS SEAT <<
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/mwm-endorsement-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260306_mwm-endorsement_sb?&utm_medium=GAP&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260307_mwm-endorsement_indirect>
I don't take your support for granted. Every contribution is a vote of
confidence that New Hampshire is ready for a change.

Let's show them what we're made of.

| Here’s something I didn’t expect about being in Congress: the amount of attention that photos of me taking a rideshare to work would get. (I also love taking a scooter!) [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/FrLiPLc9_De52eKGGmBB1A~~/AAPPABA~/dKxod795T2IvVaTiZMy5e4hqx5wOn4h0xo1HmdZPaTeQEUYWU7s8yOJ8wBI1QVR3h-tORt6jc3F4xLCP8YzZXUXLCDVYO-ujVPTpdl90Dr49KOTHBrahki8DauAlavIxU2iymLOFknyXvpXPfnqefxu15CAYYcCtfQTS4J5gXac2l77jSGzXprg8aN5zvPsPFYtqa0e9V1q_SdNxBf1SKp43iWR0_qJBTHXh4qQ8tPusO-vmVQKZ0MysZ34N6ta-Uv6_44znVDBqjzgLXktZOAuzlK90eOt8YPJ3wg6r2ELhHuUvhoT8Wwd8gCRjmxkqHqnISToOL5n1DKuLhb9SgsvUlrt24IINcJadRpLLDwE~) But I get it. This isn’t the typical way members get to the Capitol. Actually, there’s a few things I do a bit differently.
* **As a longtime organizer,** I run a year-round organizing program that builds young, progressive power across Florida, 24/7/365.
* **As the only Gen Z member,** I personally know what it's like to be a part of the gun violence generation. Fighting to end gun violence IS personal to me.
* **As someone who grew up working class** and drove for Uber just to make ends meet while running for Congress, I know the policies we need to _uplift_ working class folks - not demonize them.

**And on top of it all, I don’t take Corporate PAC or special interest dollars.** I got here by relying on people like you. Together, we built a youth-powered, grassroots movement – one dollar at a time. Yet, a lot of people still think that because I do things a bit differently (or honestly, because I’m young and wasn’t born rich) that I don’t deserve to be here at all. **[**_But I know that with your help, I’ll stay here the same way I got here: one dollar at a time. So please, will you make a $27 donation today so I can keep fighting in Congress for _all_ of us - not just the few? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/FrLiPLc9_De52eKGGmBB1A~~/AAPPABA~/dKxod795T2IvVaTiZMy5e4hqx5wOn4h0xo1HmdZPaTeQEUYWU7s8yOJ8wBI1QVR3h-tORt6jc3F4xLCP8YzZXUXLCDVYO-ujVPTpdl90Dr49KOTHBrahki8DauAlavIxU2iymLOFknyXvpXPfnqefxu15CAYYcCtfQTS4J5gXac2l77jSGzXprg8aN5zvPsPFYtqa0e9V1q_SdNxBf1SKp43iWR0_qJBTHXh4qQ8tPusO-vmVQKZ0MysZ34N6ta-Uv6_44znVDBqjzgLXktZOAuzlK90eOt8YPJ3wg6r2ELhHuUvhoT8Wwd8gCRjmxkqHqnISToOL5n1DKuLhb9SgsvUlrt24IINcJadRpLLDwE~)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/o24OfV0h-kis62pR8CRgRw~~/AAPPABA~/eUZmrlwd-x6GxZacG2SIWwXQsTIXlOWpCwpLvnmKp7R-TCwkM56Z72Lqp29MkoCMrdGofjlD_eKAAIYZc2j4rcFBsFtl9m4KLWqnem3HN-FEQeAjp5y3aJJRPj4pbZ2OF3wiD42KvKPgbmaaeE8tiRPfjfVgi5mDNXdjWh7yCmvurCVjeBkcrswgEMqv1xYw09DKX1CWhbvfJvn4k3hilPQ3IDKl_AFbond-tmrTe5qSNO5zvXI36RRT3mOUVkYneTK8EnsMHoq0khVSYhdzJAwxcoSqaCW42WxEPdMAbXMAvSyothS9wPEOTEhW9Y9Xw0FObJaDRUysdfZRpjjF1vnB5dvMV2y3k2c4SYgy9WHCXd2qxXMi_bh8OC-8IkfH)

clean_body: | ~ | Here’s something I didn’t expect about being in Congress: the amount of attention that photos of me taking a rideshare to work would get. (I also love taking a scooter!) ~ But I get it. This isn’t the typical way members get to the Capitol. Actually, there’s a few things I do a bit differently. As a longtime organizer, I run a year-round organizing program that builds young, progressive power across Florida, 24/7/365. As the only Gen Z member, I personally know what it's like to be a part of the gun violence generation. Fighting to end gun violence IS personal to me. As someone who grew up working class and drove for Uber just to make ends meet while running for Congress, I know the policies we need to uplift working class folks - not demonize them. And on top of it all, I don’t take Corporate PAC or special interest dollars. I got here by relying on people like you. Together, we built a youth-powered, grassroots movement – one dollar at a time. Yet, a lot of people still think that because I do things a bit differently (or honestly, because I’m young and wasn’t born rich) that I don’t deserve to be here at all. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Grateful for your support, Rep. name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: Good news... Bad News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
**Here is the good news:** When we started this primary campaign, virtually no one in the political establishment or corporate media thought we had a chance to win. But we built a grassroots movement capable of turning out voters all across Texas, and together, we won the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate.
**Here is the bad news:** We're basically broke.
That's not hyperbole. The truth is that we had to spend down to basically nothing in order to win this primary. We weren’t going to take any chances, and it paid off.
Now we start the general election in a very difficult position: We don't have a fraction of the resources it will take to win and both Republicans in this race and their super PACs will be attacking James endlessly because he is the Democratic nominee.
There is, quite truthfully, no more strategic time for you to make a contribution to James Talarico's campaign than today. Right now. In response to this email.
If everyone reading this donated $5, $50, or whatever they could afford, we'd immediately have the resources we need to start the general election.
Unfortunately, not everybody gives, so we're counting on James' supporters and people who understand how important this race is to chip in what they can today.
What do you say?
**[Can James Talarico count on you to contribute to our campaign for U.S. Senate today? Our average donation right now is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that everyone who cares steps up to do what they can today. It's our only chance.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-general-launch.jRB70q&refcode=em260306-1-ak&t=1&akid=496%2E1347274%2Ea2YZdy)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Justice Democrats
subject: These four Democrats just let Trump get away with it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First, Democratic leaders Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries slow-rolled a
vote on Rep. Ro Khanna’s War Powers Resolution long enough to let Trump
start a war with Iran.

Then, after the U.S. joined Israel in attacking Iran last weekend —
including bombing a girls’ school and killing more than 150 children —
many Democrats hemmed and hawed that while this act of war is
unconstitutional, they still support it.

Now, four warmongering Democratic members in the House joined all but two
Republicans in voting against the War Powers Resolution, allowing Trump’s
illegal and murderous war to continue.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260307.A2IxP5&refcode=em20260307-37537&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37537%2E1203867%2EOFBmwk ]Tweet by Craig Caplan: House defeats the Massie-Khanna Iran war powers
resolution to block future U.S. military action against Iran without
Congressional approval. 2 Republicans voted Yes: Davidson (OH) &
resolution co-author Massie (KY); 4 Democrats voted No: Golden (ME),
Cuellar (TX), Landsman (OH), & Vargas (VA)

These spineless Democrats just proved not only are they willing to let
Trump’s abuse of power go unchecked, but they actually want the U.S. to
wage another forever war abroad, all at the expense of innocent civilians
and servicemembers. If they want war so badly, they should go to war
themselves.

This is the problem with the Democratic Party establishment. Too many
so-called Democrats get in line with Republicans and the pro-war lobby
like AIPAC to bankroll the war machine and corporate interests that profit
off it, while putting lives at risk and defunding our healthcare, housing,
and jobs at home.

That's why we need more Democratic primaries. We’re fighting to send 10
additional anti-war, progressive champions to Congress this year to
actually hold the fascist-in-chief accountable and stop more forever wars
like this one.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260307.A2IxP5&refcode=em20260307-37537&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37537%2E1203867%2EOFBmwk ]Our next two primary elections are less than two weeks from now. Help
us go up against AIPAC, corporate Super PACs, and warmongering Democrats
and build our pro-peace coalition in the halls of power: rush
$5 or more now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260307.A2IxP5&refcode=em20260307-37537&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37537%2E1203867%2EOFBmwk ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260307-37537-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37537_1203867_OFBmwk&akid=37537%2E1203867%2EOFBmwk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37537%2E1203867%2EOFBmwk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Shapiro for Governor HQ
subject: Want to know what the far-right is thinking?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
When you work in politics like we do, you hear a lot of rumors

Derek — When you work in politics like we do, you hear a lot of rumors. Some of them are true. Some of them are just noise. All of that is to say — we’ve been keeping one ear close to the ground throughout this entire election year. And the rumor we’ve been hearing again and again? **The far-right is feeling confident._Very_ confident.** Listen, we’re confident too. We’re confident that — with the help of grassroots supporters like you — we can win on Election Day. **But we can’t become overconfident, Derek.** We can’t take these midterms for granted. _We have to work like Pennsylvania’s future depends on it._ [_**Please, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can? **\---------- Forwarded message from The Democratic Party of Georgia ----------**
Peter,
Miracle Rankin and Jen Jordan have officially launched their campaigns — **and they are already off and running, building incredible momentum across Georgia.**
They’re speaking directly to what so many of us feel: that the government has stopped working for the people.
That the rules don't apply equally anymore, and that those in power seem to operate outside the law rather than within it.
That's exactly why these Georgia Supreme Court seats matter so much — and on May 19th, **we have a chance to elect judges who will restore that fundamental trust.**
Miracle and Jen are in this for one clear reason: to ensure our government adheres to the law and the Constitution — **no exceptions.**
They’re the independent voices we need to hold power accountable, and they’re in a strong position to win. **But to keep this momentum going, we need to match their energy with real resources right now.**
[Peter, will you chip in $10 today to help us win these two key Supreme Court seats? subject: I’m looking for Peter!
body:

I’m sharing this with you because I know you are a solid America First patriot.
My team was just reviewing the list of dedicated patriots who have completed the Official Trump Voter Profile, and your name was NOWHERE to be found.

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Re: Kristi Noem
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
Her tenure is symptomatic of the entire Trump administration
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126869386/606212989/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGJkZGM2NS01NDFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gpIYBzB8UjYmV9oILOitn2sHaMH2DZ-HsclOgAuYwyU=&emci=ba8ac1f7-a519-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=24bddc65-541a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=9818364)
---

| | It's safe to say that Kristi Noem's tenure as Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security was a disaster. Kristi Noem used taxpayer dollars for her personal benefit. She funneled no-bid contracts to her friends. She helped oversee an alarming partnership between DHS and Silicon Valley that would use biometric data to spy on Americans. And she attempted to gaslight the public about the killings of Renee Good and Alex Pretti, rushing to label them "domestic terrorists" when we all saw video evidence of what happened. Kristi Noem's firing as head of the DHS was long overdue. But the grift, corruption, lying, and authoritarianism that marked her tenure are symptomatic of the _entire_ Trump administration — and Trump is going to keep pushing the same horrific **policies** that Noem was carrying out on his orders. The rot still runs deep. **I won't let Trump turn the page from the failures that he owns just as much as Noem.** I've no doubt Trump may cycle out more officials as the controversies and crimes pile up. **We owe it to the American people to bring all wrongdoing to light, hold public hearings, and when necessary, have trials.** Because what's happened for the past year under folks like Noem must _never_ be allowed to happen again. More soon, _Ron_ P.S. I meant what I said on Thursday, when news of Kristi Noem's firing broke. clean_body: Her tenure is symptomatic of the entire Trump administration | | | | It's safe to say that Kristi Noem's tenure as Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security was a disaster. Kristi Noem used taxpayer dollars for her personal benefit. She funneled no-bid contracts to her friends. She helped oversee an alarming partnership between DHS and Silicon Valley that would use biometric data to spy on Americans. And she attempted to gaslight the public about the killings of Renee Good and Alex Pretti, rushing to label them "domestic terrorists" when we all saw video evidence of what happened. Kristi Noem's firing as head of the DHS was long overdue. But the grift, corruption, lying, and authoritarianism that marked her tenure are symptomatic of the entire Trump administration — and Trump is going to keep pushing the same horrific policies that Noem was carrying out on his orders. The rot still runs deep. I won't let Trump turn the page from the failures that he owns just as much as Noem. I've no doubt Trump may cycle out more officials as the controversies and crimes pile up. We owe it to the American people to bring all wrongdoing to light, hold public hearings, and when necessary, have trials. Because what's happened for the past year under folks like Noem must never be allowed to happen again. More soon, Ron P.S. I meant what I said on Thursday, when news of Kristi Noem's firing broke. = | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: They’re still lying to you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The Department of Justice should be pursuing accountability, cracking down on corruption, and defending the Constitution. But under this administration, the DOJ is a tool for attacking enemies and covering up wrongdoing.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9611%2E5257348%2E-dLRJr)
Derek, There is still a lot we don’t know about the remaining Epstein Files, but there’s something we know for sure:**this administration can’t stop lying.** From Donald Trump to Pam Bondi to Kash Patel and Howard Lutnick, and countless others — they're all a pack of liars. Despite their boasting and claims that they were more than prepared to release the files, they have continued to conceal damning information about influential people who victimized young girls. They also lied about the scope of the files left unreleased — claiming that it was because they wanted to protect the victims. And yet, the files were released without even redacting all their information — _including names and nude photographs_ — which only further victimized them. We have to stand up to this abuse of power, to defend our country and its people. To demand justice and accountability. To fight back. I have and I always will. Because this fight isn’t over. It’s just beginning, and I won’t back down. [_**I’m asking you to help me continue to hold Trump accountable by chipping in any amount you can.**_](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5917?t=4&akid=9611%2E5257348%2E-dLRJr) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [ CHIP IN $10 NOW ](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5918?t=5&akid=9611%2E5257348%2E-dLRJr)

Time and time again, we’ve seen that this administration cannot be trusted. They aren’t interested in justice or protecting the American people — their only interest is covering for Donald Trump and his friends.
Derek, it’s time to stop waiting for results and fight back together.
— Adam

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Abolishing ICE is the only answer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Everyday, there’s another outrageous abuse, another family traumatized by ICE. Enough is enough.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260307-5963-footer&t=1&akid=5963%2E420207%2EtvXNTn)
Peter,
I want to share a story that’s been weighing on my heart.
Maria Antonia Guerra Montoya, a 9 year old traveling with her mom for a family vacation to Disney World, was pulled off of her flight by immigration officers.
She was detained for questioning, separating her from her mother for hours. Maria Antonia and her mother were then trapped in an airport holding room for nearly 42 hours, terrified and confused, before being transported to a federal detention facility in Dilley, Texas – the same one where 5-year-old Liam Conejo Ramos was held. Maria Antonia and her mother spent months waiting in detention, where she fainted twice from lack of food. They lived in constant fear that they could be separated or never leave at all.
What should’ve been a joyful family trip became a terrifying and traumatizing moment they’ll never forget, and never should’ve had to endure.
**Every day there’s another story like this. Another outrageous abuse, another member of our community subject to unnecessary trauma, and another family left reeling from ICE’s reign of terror.**
And every time, Kristi Noem and her DHS jump on twitter claiming they’re victims of the media, or that we don’t have the full story. But we see what’s happening with our own two eyes. We’ve seen the irreparable harm caused by the cruelty of ICE.
We can’t pretend that oversight, better training, or endless reviews will fix a system that is fundamentally flawed. The rot is too deep — the only answer is to completely dismantle ICE and CBP, and rebuild a humane, accountable immigration system from the ground up.
[**Please join me in adding your name to this petition calling to end the chaos and cruelty of ICE and CBP once and for all.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/abolish-ice-and-cbp/?sourcecode=em20260307-5963&amount=3&t=2&akid=5963%2E420207%2EtvXNTn)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/sign/abolish-ice-and-cbp/?sourcecode=em20260307-5963&t=3&akid=5963%2E420207%2EtvXNTn)**
We owe it to Maria Antonia, Liam, Renee, Alex, and countless others who have suffered under the cruelty of ICE and CBP to demand a system that protects families instead of tearing them apart.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260307-5963-footer&t=4&refcode2=5963_420207_tvXNTn&akid=5963%2E420207%2EtvXNTn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=5963%2E420207%2EtvXNTn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=5963%2E420207%2EtvXNTn)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Keeping it up
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Hi friend,

Before we get too far along in March, I want to say thank you.

February was a strong month for this campaign because of supporters like you. Together, we built momentum, expanded our reach, and proved that this campaign can compete and win in one of the most competitive districts in the country.

But here’s the reality. As we ramp up our operations, every month has to be stronger than the last.

MAGA special interests are already lining up. Their wallets are fat, and they are ready to pour money into this race to try to drown out Nellie’s voice and flip this seat.

We don’t have their money. What we have is a grassroots team willing to step up again and again. And we wouldn't want it any other way.

With gratitude,

Nellie

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=260307_np_febty]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=e3e976e8-571a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=e3e976e8-571a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]
Checks may also be mailed to:
Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/QcG518LlG0yfilVoJO5ZLg2?unsubscribedata=lhjJvmQGUy5OMrntkzZDqx2DZx8%2BXy3b%2F850W6fbN0KCutJtTOZnVVZUTApvMOz53JHorI8M0O0VGp%2B3U5KeJFJrEtHC5Bogo4dEJA%2FddbPuPpIbI4Xjo2DtRLjKl49XJGJoSXtu7kFUMJDPQyBQD3JomjgUXUNNmCMyAoQP%2FIQ55id2caCVhPLPssoP%2BeurizgAFOevZ1v52fcqBzE9dGoMN8%2BllL9o%2BYmE7y0t7OSV1mqrJrUc82ihkdKYlZjYBaZStOZD0Tk%2FX5NvLtNIIaXGjYxGhnSo4WoTTwvQbUhVVD5aWpKN9%2Bx1U%2FQ6tknBbAxjtfJafk%2FVMqxuuO47l4XyhH1Uu0I5DHb6vj9859XnE%2BlLTP5hWsZVBtZ%2F1tV5yI4AKsV5r9h%2FhEKvdQWj%2BI6%2FPrNnVtAFzDd%2FFuNs%2F4IiAPH3PuV3vgFfjbW7ZK6%2B] . When I moved to Charleston over 15 years ago, I actually thought of Lindsey as a statesman.
I didn’t agree with him on policy, but I thought he had some integrity.
Now? I can barely stomach watching him speak. He’s the embodiment of everything that’s wrong with the Republican Party – spineless, shameless, and completely out of touch.
He stands for nothing. _That’s the opposite of me._
I’m a pediatrician and a mom. I’m not a career politician. I’m running for Senate because I know exactly why I’m here: to fight for kids, healthcare, for our future.
**I know tough fights, and even if the path is hard, I believe Lindsey Graham has to be held accountable. He doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years.**
[**_I’m going to need everyone reading this to chip in $10 or $25 before midnight so we can show strength at this critical moment. So, we set an ambitious goal to get 10,000 grassroots donations before the end of the day. name: Michael Gates for Attorney General
subject: California parents have rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL GATES FOR ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026
body:
The U.S. Supreme Court just delivered a massive, humiliating defeat to Gavin Newsom and Rob Bonta, blocking their unconstitutional anti-parent law. Now it’s time to finish the job and fire Bonta. [ ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/EVnWnPBzS6sy4P60poAobPN16yR19754GS3SZ92jLj2O8oei8iEdaujEBrNLjii-Gvc06kIWD8MEjEmtTcw_t4quLfS7xNeCrSBsLgVszLtqL-b7H7jl2IX6adO_DYBEnBduCDtQwCS4ipIppkkfiH0QcDPfiI85_go_lniD4yyH6AnQnU3a5FWZFajQgVrq_gdVJ6WjoGIkPa-QTnMPlUtT0bLncesFT_Ven4FiII3N3WMGTHeMVotCn4wL-oJrFSlmNGpGXKRY8mkESEXHZLp8702W26cAWXrh9tA6nr3ogsad9t0Zuu7qL_L_Z8hEzDKjPN7OsUElhsbTq5tcKCmNB4qDBd67W5dW3DyW292s-I6Yar6w5KGzZk1HTIySat1i6B_cNOm_ffW60Kykx45mK5JH6_WHZ-6vNCWkNRCIo8Z76z5hlaw9gKuV6d-6pADfOhfiZwQoxNAiyGFR_LW2zl7aPK1ltTTbwxXzF6BAiosgJUe91D1V0ns7iJZcKa1yGfEslAoAkwv_ee_W0g_hyp-6lI-siWWeXV02ienFhKIXp5NFUVoBpQ/_bbDrcAHUkifJUyD0tmeSeIynk3Xy68Z/18)

Peter, Gavin Newsom and Rob Bonta just suffered a massive, humiliating defeat at the U.S. Supreme Court. The High Court officially BLOCKED California's law that prohibited schools from notifying parents if their child identifies as another gender. This is a monumental victory for parental rights, and it is a fight I have been leading from the very beginning. In 2024, I brought a sister case on behalf of Huntington Beach to challenge the state mandate that forced teachers to keep secrets from parents about their own children. Now, the U.S. Supreme Court has vindicated our case. But the truth is, it should never have gotten this far. The current Attorney General, Rob Bonta, actively weaponized his office _against_ parents. Instead of protecting families, **Bonta defends an evil law that robs mothers and fathers of their basic right to raise their children.** I am running to defeat Bonta because California parents deserve an Attorney General who fights for them -- not for radical leftist groups. [Will you chip in today to help me defeat Rob Bonta and protect parental rights in California? »](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/bi7mvvTbvsEdy_FY2JxnwIxcZ_OD7kcBfKgfuuD9kYOAqpjJV6-kTNA_DG5-1X8LZV5nY5cfldBIEov62wYch6qhsxFPyY8hXD48ANBwPsKKk1KQwUEqAQkjOFuZ6RcGXKbPNr3drjQ46P6In2MxTdOgTlTsqCxzda4HBhYkuON3B0KuP73ctFtpk-ECL31RNN5AwQRzUtCDsAC8HkFZ4FY2K-Xt5duSi02zDf85rn9jHlbsCMgjSYS6AiBW1NpOHXTZVhyspIjEgt7nxWCFHRBqFbO-7aEpyct4ZEUw4LclO1M8lpXc2xXiXfa-4XYJGWiPCaXKvbKI-z4F1EkTph8aJLkI_K2shEdEQIdJMqkd3-jovK-KrmbTWZZwL4ksfThgR0JsW8XW5E3ugtrNb5BqeNtIrPYiT8dT1TIj5sV1_phqDzc6NEC4mRB7QM8NEiLLzcWFLUT8jJRTxmntQ0YU6M4QmNkZas8egCucTIy_zeNKKfAdvwKzqtO7gJ-wj1KncDwcFJUee-legMMZ4MLjVyFzFAdRiJSITEj0EZQnGIhsxfv0DelZeA/oS4qZkHYwWS1fRID-NQZKMEtVaPqVnA9/18) As your next Attorney General, I will continue to protect parents, and this unconstitutional nonsense will end on DAY ONE. I promise you that. Let's win this fight.

clean_body: The U.S. Supreme Court just delivered a massive, humiliating defeat to Gavin Newsom and Rob Bonta, blocking their unconstitutional anti-parent law. Now it’s time to finish the job and fire Bonta. Peter, Gavin Newsom and Rob Bonta just suffered a massive, humiliating defeat at the U.S. Supreme Court. The High Court officially BLOCKED California's law that prohibited schools from notifying parents if their child identifies as another gender. This is a monumental victory for parental rights, and it is a fight I have been leading from the very beginning. In 2024, I brought a sister case on behalf of Huntington Beach to challenge the state mandate that forced teachers to keep secrets from parents about their own children. Now, the U.S. Supreme Court has vindicated our case. But the truth is, it should never have gotten this far. The current Attorney General, Rob Bonta, actively weaponized his office against parents. Instead of protecting families, Bonta defends an evil law that robs mothers and fathers of their basic right to raise their children. I am running to defeat Bonta because California parents deserve an Attorney General who fights for them -- not for radical leftist groups. As your next Attorney General, I will continue to protect parents, and this unconstitutional nonsense will end on DAY ONE. I promise you that. Let's win this fight. Justice is coming, Michael Gates Republican for California Attorney General | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MICHAEL GATES FOR ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID 1486227 3843 S Bristol St #604 Santa Ana, CA 92704 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

name: John Fetterman
subject: James Talarico

body:
Something big is happening in Texas.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?refcode=jtk440-bu-fl-header&t=1&akid=10637%2E434096%2EgyuRly)
| | |
---
I’ll be direct, Derek:
Today, I’m asking you to split a donation of $5 between me and James Talarico – the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Texas. He’s building an unprecedented grassroots movement, and he needs our help. **[Will you chip in?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52990?t=2&akid=10637%2E434096%2EgyuRly)**
| | [CHIP IN $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52990?t=3&akid=10637%2E434096%2EgyuRly)
---
James is an eighth-generation Texan, a former middle school teacher, and a Presbyterian seminarian. He believes that the biggest divide in our country isn’t left vs. right – it’s top vs. bottom.
I couldn’t agree more. 💯
James knows what it takes to bring people together and fight for the working class and not the ultrawealthy and special interests, because he’s done it before. **Now, he’s ready to keep up this critical work in the Senate, and I’m proud to support him.**
Here’s the problem: The GOP and right-wing megadonors are already pouring in MILLIONS to try to crush his momentum, and **unless we fight back now, we’ll lose our best chance to help Texas elect a senator who *actually* cares about working people.**
**[So please, Derek, have James’ back like you’ve always had mine. With Senate control on the line, will you split an urgent donation of $5 or more now to help us win in Texas and retake power for working people?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52990?t=4&akid=10637%2E434096%2EgyuRly)**
Thank yinz,
John Fetterman 💙
| |

| | [Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2026?refcode=jtk440-bu-fl-footer&t=5&refcode2=10637_434096_gyuRly&akid=10637%2E434096%2EgyuRly)

He’s building an unprecedented grassroots movement, and he needs our help. | | James is an eighth-generation Texan, a former middle school teacher, and a Presbyterian seminarian. He believes that the biggest divide in our country isn’t left vs. right – it’s top vs. bottom. I couldn’t agree more. 💯 James knows what it takes to bring people together and fight for the working class and not the ultrawealthy and special interests, because he’s done it before. Now, he’s ready to keep up this critical work in the Senate, and I’m proud to support him. Here’s the problem: The GOP and right-wing megadonors are already pouring in MILLIONS to try to crush his momentum, and unless we fight back now, we’ll lose our best chance to help Texas elect a senator who actually cares about working people. Thank yinz, John Fetterman 💙 | | | | | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Why I’m running this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Hi there,

I’m running for re-election this November, and I want to tell you why. But first, I have a quick ask: Can you chip in $ or whatever you can to help us start this race strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2603?amount=]

When I first ran for Congress, I made a promise: to put people over politics, to fight for lower costs and safer communities, and to always put Jersey first over partisan agendas or national noise. That promise hasn’t changed .

While some in Washington are still playing games, I’ve been focused on results. I’ve helped lower health insurance premiums, pushed back against rising costs and Trump’s tariffs, and took real steps to make our communities safer and more affordable.

But here’s the truth : this November will be tough. Extremists are already organizing and targeting this seat, and if we don’t show early strength, they’ll flood this district with attacks.

That’s why I’m asking again, will you chip in $ to help us defend our Jersey Values and show we’re ready for the fight ahead? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2603?amount=]
CONTRIBUTE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2603?amount=]

I’m running because I still believe public service should be about delivering, not dividing. And I’ll never stop working for the people of New Jersey.

Thanks for being in this with me,

Josh

He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Team Jena
subject: re: our new video
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friends,
We just released our new campaign video! Watch it here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email]
In the video, Jena discusses how Trump’s 2016 win inspired her to run for office, and how she has been fighting for Colorado and our democracy. She is ready to keep up the fight as Attorney General so she can protect the Colorado way of life for generations to come.
Watch the video here, and read Jena’s message below. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email]
Thanks,
Team Jena
----- Original Message ------
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email]
We just released our new campaign video!
WATCH THE VIDEO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email]
Peter,
I grew up in rural Colorado, where community wasn’t just a word, it was a way of life. Neighbors looked out for each other. Hard work mattered. You learned early that if something wasn’t right, you stood up and did something about it.
Those values shaped who I am.
Those values are why I’ve dedicated my career to public service, and why standing up to Donald Trump on the frontlines is so important to me. Since Trump was first elected, we have seen constant attacks on our elections, democracy, and rights and freedoms as Americans.
But I’ve fought back.
Learn more about what I’ve done as Secretary of State and how I plan to keep this important work going as Attorney General in our new campaign video. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email]
The decision to run for Attorney General became clear to me once I became a mom. Fighting for the future generations has never been more important.
Colorado needs a leader who won’t back down. Watch our new campaign video today, and chip in to help us win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg-video?refcode=260306-email]
Let’s keep going.
Jena
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

| | Hey, it’s Jayce from Team Elaine! A couple of big developments have shaken up the race for Virginia’s 2nd Congressional District in recent weeks. Here’s where things stand as of today, 3/7:
* New maps were released ahead of a redistricting ballot referendum in Virginia. While most districts changed significantly, VA-02 is the sole exception. **The race here remains a dogfight.**

* **The DCCC added Elaine to their prestigious Red to Blue program!** This grants us access to better tools and strategies to reach voters all over the district, but it also brings a higher level of GOP scrutiny to our campaign.

* **Sabato’s Crystal Ball maintained its toss-up rating for VA-02** , calling it a “classic swing district” in both the old and new House maps.

* A week into March, **we’re 14% of the way to our End-of-Quarter FEC goal**. We’ll have to do better over the next three weeks in order to hit that target and cement Elaine as the strongest candidate in the field.

Elaine is the candidate who can beat Jen Kiggans in November, but more importantly, she’s the kind of courageous leader our state and country badly need right now. I’m doing everything I can to help her win this battleground race so she can get back to fighting for Virginia families, and I hope I can count on you to help us navigate the challenges ahead. name: Team Molder
subject: Not everyone is looking for a fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
Some people just want the job done.

| | | | |
---
Peter, There are two very different approaches to leadership on display right now. Not just nationally, but right here in TN-5. As mayor, Chaz’s approach has been simple: focus on solving problems. That means answering calls from constituents, working across differences, and doing the day-to-day work that actually helps a community function. [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/wwvq2Ple90ADrlw3PksL8Q~~/AAUS1hA~/sMWF5Cje2DpzYTQDftqYEftGzhs2HbLj-eWnV4Raipl_yIqzgX9BMcQKj6z6E96jJRFmRu1X3ulbYbu98roSj5NU0Da0LOQLdzWbRrjMws9WO8QYbg4JlvQXRqzOQDybaX1VAm537rB-Q_i7ALZxVHl6SQblepGgZ7Ykjt_FPmXL2mRUehDpFH9txsOVQ4Z9xdwfnd0grGGIv0LD84P-TcFHAjEN9pD4-JaD-tY4Er8ngcQ_AQ6CEO967Aei3LSvfE7OngNB9GPpI8MqqOAkAg~~) In Washington, we’re seeing something else. Our opponent has clashed with constituents, brushed off criticism, and leaned into confrontation instead of accountability. It creates headlines, but it doesn’t move this district forward. That difference matters. It’s also why this race was named Red to Blue. Not because of noise, but because people see a better way forward. But being “in play” only matters if we build on it. If you believe TN-5 deserves steady leadership that focuses on solving problem not amplifying them, we’re asking you to help us keep this race competitive. clean_body: Some people just want the job done. | | | | | Peter, There are two very different approaches to leadership on display right now. Not just nationally, but right here in TN-5. As mayor, Chaz’s approach has been simple: focus on solving problems. That means answering calls from constituents, working across differences, and doing the day-to-day work that actually helps a community function. ~~ In Washington, we’re seeing something else. Our opponent has clashed with constituents, brushed off criticism, and leaned into confrontation instead of accountability. It creates headlines, but it doesn’t move this district forward. That difference matters. It’s also why this race was named Red to Blue. Not because of noise, but because people see a better way forward. But being “in play” only matters if we build on it. If you believe TN-5 deserves steady leadership that focuses on solving problem not amplifying them, we’re asking you to help us keep this race competitive. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | ~ | ~ | ~ | ~ | This race is about choosing problem-solving over chaos. — Team Molder | | ---|---|--- About Chaz Molder Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. As mayor, he founded the Columbia Mayor’s Youth Council to promote civic engagement among young people and emphasizes the importance of being present and responsive to the community. | | | ~~ Click~~ to receive fewer emails. body:
Trump’s assault on Social Security is ramping up >>
| **First,** Trump slashed Social Security staffing by nearly 11%.

**Then,** Social Security Offices across the country shuttered due to lack of staffing. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104420?t=6&akid=23208%2E878179%2EbyNk3O) **NOW,** the benefits of millions of Americans are hanging by a thread, and if there isn’t massive public outrage ANYTHING is on the table, from **privatizing Social Security to raising the Retirement Age.**

Friend, we need more people to know that their Social Security is in danger and _we need your help._ [Rush $7 to prevent Trump from getting away with his “quiet” cuts! >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104420?t=7&akid=23208%2E878179%2EbyNk3O) | [RUSH $7 TO SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104420?t=8&akid=23208%2E878179%2EbyNk3O)
---
Most Americans – _76%_ – don’t know that Social Security is profoundly underfunded, but you know who does? Trump’s billionaire donors, **who see a huge opportunity.**

**Privatizing Social Security would be a windfall for Wall Street while leaving everyone else without a critical safety net.**

But most people are tuned out, friend, so it’s up to us to mount a defence against Trump and his billionaire cronies. If enough people step up we can still stop them. [Rush $7 to Save Social Security! >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104420?t=9&akid=23208%2E878179%2EbyNk3O)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: National Republicans and corporate PACs are going to pour millions of dollars into Colorado to try and take back this seat.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
I’m not a standard politician.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126871502/606219485/1664162816?amount=15&refcode=email_030726_pour_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE2Y2UxNy01YzFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXgG2VvhauZSJKDtvFp-23mmkwKm8RNC07FHrFg1raQ=) John Hickenlooper here. Have a sec? 🍻 I’m not your standard politician. For years, I was a geologist. Then, our company got bought, and we all got laid off. I took every scrap of savings in my bank account, even put my house up as collateral, to open a restaurant (with a brewery) in downtown Denver. We were known for our flagship brews, like Timberline Pale Ale and Sagebrush Stout. We charged just $2.25 a pint. I loved the brewpub. I loved bringing people together from all over with different opinions and creating a team to deliver them something special, something they would tell their friends about. And let me tell you, there was nothing we couldn’t solve over a nice, cold beer. I didn’t run for office for fame, or money, or power. I ran for Senate because I wanted to bring people together and _actually_ get stuff done. And turns out, a heck of a lot of Coloradans were tired of Washington politicians standing up for their ultra-wealthy donors instead of delivering progress for regular families like yours and mine. **But look, we already know that National Republicans and corporate PACs are going to _pour_ millions of dollars into Colorado to try and take back this seat. ** We’ll need a serious people-powered movement to keep pushing back against their attacks and prevent another MAGA extremist from winning this seat and trampling all over everything we care about. [_**So today, I’m _tapping_ into the strength of this great team we’re building and humbly asking if you’ll help me keep my momentum _brewing_. Can you help us prevent our fundraising from going _flat_ by chipping in to my Senate campaign today? **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126871503/606219486/1664162816?amount=15&refcode=email_030726_pour_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE2Y2UxNy01YzFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXgG2VvhauZSJKDtvFp-23mmkwKm8RNC07FHrFg1raQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126871504/606219487/1664162816?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_030726_pour_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE2Y2UxNy01YzFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cXgG2VvhauZSJKDtvFp-23mmkwKm8RNC07FHrFg1raQ=)

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Dark money isn’t waiting — neither should you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260307-289&t=1&akid=289%2E12592%2E0h-Hjo)
Earlier this week, MAGA Republicans poured _a quarter million dollars_ to stop voters from having a say in how congressional maps are drawn. This isn’t just political spending — it’s dark money funneled through a C4 group whose consultant previously ran campaigns for **Ultra MAGA Inc.** and even defended Rudy Giuliani.
Why are they doing this? Because MAGA knows that when voters have the power to approve maps and fight back, Trump and his allies lose their advantage. _They’re trying to buy the outcome of the midterm elections instead of letting voters decide_.
That’s why your support is so critical. The YES on Fair Elections amendment will give Virginians the power to review and approve congressional maps before the midterm elections, not politicians. A YES vote on April 21 doesn’t just protect Virginia voters — it levels the playing field nationwide. The people, not partisan politics, should decide.
[**We need your help. Every dollar you give will support voter education, protect the future of our elections, and stop Trump’s power grab. Please chip in today to fight back against dark money to secure fair maps in Virginia.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260307_2.LJwGhz&amount=3&refcode=20260307-289&t=2&akid=289%2E12592%2E0h-Hjo)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260307_2.LJwGhz&amount=3&refcode=20260307-289&t=21&akid=289%2E12592%2E0h-Hjo)**
Thank you for standing up for our democracy,
Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=22&refcode2=289_12592_0h-Hjo&akid=289%2E12592%2E0h-Hjo)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=289%2E12592%2E0h-Hjo)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=24&akid=289%2E12592%2E0h-Hjo)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=289%2E12592%2E0h-Hjo)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

Team,
The two ICE detention centers coming to our part of Pennsylvania would overwhelm the water and sewage systems of the small towns they're being built in.
The PA Department of Environmental Protection just said that these facilities would drain drinking water sources and pollute waterways because _**they would cause raw waste to leak into our streets and rivers.**_
That's why our state government is [taking action](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/37643732-28ed-467b-bd73-3fd854f84e2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to stop these facilities from going forward - but Dan Meuser should have done that at the very start.
Instead he said these ICE camps would have a "very positive impact" on our district. What is positive about raw waste in the streets???
The more we learn about these facilities, the more concerned the people here get. But our congressman still hasn't done a thing to stop them. He hasn't even held a town hall on this because he's too scared to face us. **He doesn 't want to hear the tough questions or look his constituents in the eye when they ask why he hasn't lifted a finger to stop facilities known for abuse from coming to wreak havoc on our communities.**
Time to stop the silence and the sh*t.
**[If you want a representative who will fight for you and won't let raw sewage flood your driveway, chip in to support my campaign today!](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e6ee9b90-547f-4bd2-91e8-68671c795d5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[CHIP IN TO STOP THIS SH*T](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e6ee9b90-547f-4bd2-91e8-68671c795d5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
- Rachel Wallace

name: Harry Dunn
subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-HARRY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-HARRY]
Hey, it’s Harry Dunn. I want to share some personal news with you.
Today, I’m launching my campaign for Congress to represent Maryland’s 5th District.
In just a moment, I’m going to personally ask you to chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can afford. MAGA billionaires are going to rush to buy this seat and maintain House Control – but their deep pockets are no match for the grassroots power we’re going to build. I’m counting on you to be a Day One Donor and help win this seat for the people of Maryland and hand Donald Trump an embarrassing loss by winning back Democratic House control. Can I count on you to split a donation between me and Resist Reclaim Rebuild to become a Founding Donor to my campaign today? Let me explain: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-harry]
CHIP IN TO BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR TO MY CAMPAIGN! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-harry]
As a Capitol Police Officer and as an American, January 6th, 2021, was the darkest day of my life. I was immersed for what felt like countless hours in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, death, fear, blood, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, and bigotry.
The wounds that my heroic fellow officers endured are still healing. But my commitment to ensuring the strength of our democracy has only deepened.
It’s the reason I’ve decided to run for Congress for Maryland’s 5th District.

name: Jasmine Clark
subject: Add your name: Call on Trump Admin to recognize advanced nursing degrees as professional degrees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260307-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260307-rs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260307-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260307-rs]
As an instructor in Georgia State’s nursing school, I’ve spent years teaching and supporting the students who keep our healthcare system alive. I know how hard they work, how much they sacrifice, and how urgently our state needs more advanced practice nurses — not fewer.
So when I saw this headline...
https://secure.ngpvan.com/4OI02pK92kOTd_uWTjBgFg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4OI02pK92kOTd_uWTjBgFg2]
...I felt sick.
Under Donald Trump’s new proposal, advanced nursing degrees would no longer count as “professional,” meaning students would lose access to the federal loans they need to pursue graduate education. Loan limits would be slashed in half. Thousands of future nurse practitioners, nurse midwives, CRNAs, and clinical nurse specialists could be forced to take on massive private debt — or give up their dreams entirely.
This is not just bad policy.
It’s dangerous — for patients, for hospitals, and for the future of healthcare in this country.
Georgia already faces provider shortages. Rural communities already wait weeks for care. And now Trump wants to create even fewer advanced practice nurses?
We cannot allow this to go unanswered.
The American Nurses Association has already sounded the alarm, and more than 200,000 nurses and patients have raised their voices. Now I’m asking you to add yours:
Will you sign the petition demanding the Department of Education reverse this reckless decision and recognize advanced nursing degrees as the professional degrees they are? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4OI02pK92kOTd_uWTjBgFg2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4OI02pK92kOTd_uWTjBgFg2]
Our nurses deserve respect. Our students deserve opportunity. And our healthcare system deserves investment — not sabotage.
Thank you for standing up for science, for students, and for the people who keep us healthy.
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260307-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
Jasmine Clark for Georgia
4370 Lawrenceville Hwy #96
Lilburn, GA 30048
United States

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Good News During Tax Season: Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100171483.172379.112&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16764)
**Do You Qualify for the Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit?** _Some good news for your wallet during tax season_ **Before you file your taxes this year, find out if you 're eligible for the Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit!** Governor Shapiro and state Democrats have implemented a new tax credit that could put money back in your pocket. [The Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16765) is designed to support Pennsylvania residents who are feeling the pain of rising costs. [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16766) **What is the Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit?** The new tax credit is modeled after the federal Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC). If you qualify for the federal EITC, you automatically qualify for the Pennsylvania version. It's worth 10% of whatever your federal credit amount is. Don't leave money on the table- eligible Pennsylvanians will see an average return of $240 dollars, with some families qualifying for a credit of up to $805 dollars. **Do I Qualify?** Eligibility depends on your income, your filing status, and how many kids and/or dependents you have. Visit our website to [use the Eligibility Calculator to see what your refund could be.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16767) **Keep in mind: Even if you don't owe any state taxes, you could still qualify for this tax credit.** **How Can I Get My Tax Credit?** If you file online, most tax software (and the [state's myPATH system](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16768)) will calculate the tax credit for you automatically when you claim your federal EITC. If you file on paper, the Department of Revenue will calculate and remit the tax credit for eligible filers. **Who Can Help Me File My Taxes?** Our office has partnered with the [Campaign for Working Families (CWF)](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16769) to help residents file their taxes and make sure everyone is taking advantage of every tax credit available to them. CWF has two drop off locations in our district where you can drop off your tax documents and then hear back from CWF to review your tax forms and get them filed. **Call 215-454-6483 or visit**[**www.CWFPhilly.org/Tax-Site**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16770) **to schedule your appointment!**
* * *
**ACHIEVE-Ability** _5901 Market Street, 4 th Floor, Philadelphia, PA_ Hours: \- Monday through Thursday, 10am - 5pm \- Saturday, 10am - 2pm **CHOP Karabots** _4865 Market Street, Philadelphia, PA_ Hours: \- Tuesdays and Thursdays, 5pm - 7pm \- Saturday, 9am - 1pm
* * *
If you have questions about the [Working Pennsylvanians Tax Credit or any other issues related to filing your state taxes, call our office.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16767) Our team is happy to connect you with helpful experts and resources. **Follow us on**[**Facebook**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16772)**,**[**Instagram**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16757)**,**[**TikTok**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16758)**, **[**X**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16760)**, and**[**BlueSky**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171483.172379.112&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16761) **for more on what 's happening in your community!**
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes
---
| | |
---
District Office
2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131
Phone: 215.879.7777
Fax: 215.879.7778
| |
---

Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: I know Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I know the challenges that Pennsylvanians are facing right now.

Derek, I know Pennsylvania — and I know the challenges Pennsylvanians are facing right now. I grew up in Montgomery County, watching my parents give back to our community — my father as a pediatrician, and my mother as an educator. In ninth grade, I met my future wife, Lori. We even had our first date at Goodnoe Farm Dairy Bar, a small business in Bucks County. We’ve been together ever since. Pennsylvania is a special place, full of people who just want to support their families, feel safe in their communities, be paid a living wage, and provide a better life for their children. That’s the Pennsylvania I know. It’s the Pennsylvanians I grew up with, and continue to see on the campaign trail. Those are the people I’m fighting for. Pennsylvanians across the Commonwealth who just want a real shot to get ahead. The freedom to chart their own course and the opportunity to succeed. I love Pennsylvania, Derek — it’s my home. That’s why I’ve spent my entire life working to make it better for everyone who lives here. As a State Representative, as County Commissioner, as Attorney General, and now as your Governor. [_**But take it from someone who’s won a lot of tough elections over the years: I can’t win a swing-state like Pennsylvania on my own. I need every member of this team to stand behind me, chip in, and help us reach millions of voters before time runs out. clean_body: I know the challenges that Pennsylvanians are facing right now. Derek, I know Pennsylvania — and I know the challenges Pennsylvanians are facing right now. I grew up in Montgomery County, watching my parents give back to our community — my father as a pediatrician, and my mother as an educator. In ninth grade, I met my future wife, Lori. We even had our first date at Goodnoe Farm Dairy Bar, a small business in Bucks County. We’ve been together ever since. Pennsylvania is a special place, full of people who just want to support their families, feel safe in their communities, be paid a living wage, and provide a better life for their children. That’s the Pennsylvania I know. It’s the Pennsylvanians I grew up with, and continue to see on the campaign trail. Those are the people I’m fighting for. Pennsylvanians across the Commonwealth who just want a real shot to get ahead. The freedom to chart their own course and the opportunity to succeed. I love Pennsylvania, Derek — it’s my home. That’s why I’ve spent my entire life working to make it better for everyone who lives here. name: Letlow for Louisiana
subject: Jefferson Parish Republican Executive Committee Endorses Julia Letlow for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julia Letlow for Louisiana
body:
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | |

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
March 7, 2026[katherine@julialetlow.com](mailto:katherine@julialetlow.com)
**Jefferson Parish Republican Executive Committee Endorses Julia Letlow for U.S. Senate**
**BATON ROUGE, LA** \- Today, Congresswoman Julia Letlow announced that she has received the endorsement of the Jefferson Parish Republican Executive Committee in her campaign for the United States Senate.
The Jefferson Parish Republican Executive Committee, one of the largest Republican organizations in Louisiana and representing a critical GOP parish, voted to endorse Rep. Julia Letlow for the U.S. Senate. Multiple candidates addressed the committee during the meeting, but Rep. Letlow emerged as the only candidate to receive the committee’s endorsement.
Rep. Letlow thanked the committee for its support and emphasized the importance of grassroots Republican leaders in building momentum for her campaign.
_“I am incredibly honored to receive the endorsement of the Jefferson Parish Republican Executive Committee,”_**said Rep. Letlow.** _“Jefferson Parish Republicans know what’s at stake in this election. Together, we are fighting to continue to secure our borders, lower costs for Louisiana families, defend our freedoms, and put American citizens first in Washington.”_
The endorsement adds to growing support for Rep. Letlow including President Donald Trump, Governor Jeff Landry, and Republican leaders and grassroots activists across Louisiana as her campaign continues to gain momentum statewide.
For more information, visit [JuliaLetlow.com](https://julialetlow.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=70758973fc60553eda6683b43&id=30c07ee88b&e=95355a072c).
###

Friend,

The GOP thinks Arizona is its base.

→ They've used this state as a testing ground for their most extreme policies.
→ They've had some of their largest supportive organizations set up base here.
→ They've poured millions into false ad campaigns, thinking Arizonans won’t see through their games.

But we know better.

We see their record on kitchen-table issues like healthcare and the everyday costs families are struggling to manage. We feel the impact of their policies in our daily lives, and we won’t be fooled by political games or empty rhetoric.

Arizonans deserve leadership that focuses on real solutions, not distractions. We’ve had enough, and we are ready for change.

It’s time to show the GOP who Arizona really is. If you’re ready to fight back and build something better, chip in to my campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=260307_mgw_base_l1]

About Marlene Galan-Woods
Marlene Galán-Woods is a former broadcast journalist and mother of five who has lived in Arizona for the past 36 years. Her parents fled communist Cuba looking for a better life. Their risk paid off and allowed Marlene to pursue her career as a broadcast journalist which brought her to Arizona. She met the love of her life, Grant Woods, and they raised a family together before he passed away in 2021. Marlene is running for Congress to stand up to extremists and be a voice for all Arizonans. If elected, Marlene will be the first Latina to represent Arizona's 1st district in Congress.

clean_body: [] Friend, The GOP thinks Arizona is its base. → They've used this state as a testing ground for their most extreme policies. → They've had some of their largest supportive organizations set up base here. → They've poured millions into false ad campaigns, thinking Arizonans won’t see through their games. But we know better. We see their record on kitchen-table issues like healthcare and the everyday costs families are struggling to manage. We feel the impact of their policies in our daily lives, and we won’t be fooled by political games or empty rhetoric. Arizonans deserve leadership that focuses on real solutions, not distractions. We’ve had enough, and we are ready for change. It’s time to show the GOP who Arizona really is. If you’re ready to fight back and build something better, chip in to my campaign today. [] Give $25 >> [] Give $50 >> [] Give $100 >> [] Give $250 >> [] Give $500 >> [] Give other >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately Let’s prove that Arizona can’t be taken for granted. — Marlene [] About Marlene Galan-Woods Marlene Galán-Woods is a former broadcast journalist and mother of five who has lived in Arizona for the past 36 years. Her parents fled communist Cuba looking for a better life. Their risk paid off and allowed Marlene to pursue her career as a broadcast journalist which brought her to Arizona. She met the love of her life, Grant Woods, and they raised a family together before he passed away in 2021. Marlene is running for Congress to stand up to extremists and be a voice for all Arizonans. If elected, Marlene will be the first Latina to represent Arizona's 1st district in Congress. name: McConkey for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Combat Veteran. ER Doctor. Running for NC Lt. Governor.
body:
I’m stepping up for North Carolina

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f5213ff61792/combat-veteran-er-doctor-running-for-nc-lt-governor?e=85d38939ad)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
# Purpose-driven Leadership for NC!
---
[|
---](https://joshmcconkey.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=32d970c41aaf07b292cd66a0f&id=b92150ec1c&e=85d38939ad)
| |
**This race is a clear choice for North Carolina. My opponent, Rachel Hunt, has aligned herself with Roy Cooper and Josh Stein and the policies that closed schools, churches, and small businesses across our state. I’m running to restore purpose-driven leadership that puts North Carolina families, workers, and communities first. With your help, we can win this race and move our state forward.**
---
| |
I recently joined **Newsmax and NewsNation**. Watch here.

## **Newsmax’s National Report**

[**What really happened in Cuba?**](https://joshmcconkey.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=32d970c41aaf07b292cd66a0f&id=00bdb784f0&e=85d38939ad)

## **RAV’s Steve Gruber Show**

[**This must be what the French felt like on D-Day**.](https://joshmcconkey.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=32d970c41aaf07b292cd66a0f&id=1938bc76e5&e=85d38939ad)
---
| [Contribute Now!](https://joshmcconkey.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=32d970c41aaf07b292cd66a0f&id=d126bac76c&e=85d38939ad)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
## Experienced Leadership for North Carolina!
---
| |
Dr. (Colonel) Josh McConkey is a respected US Air Force Reserve Colonel, physician, and a passionate advocate for leadership and community service. He is running for Lt. Governor, committed to using his extensive military and medical experience to serve his constituents and strengthen our country.Dr. McConkey's leadership philosophy is rooted in his over two decades of service in various leadership roles in the military. He understands the importance of strong leadership in achieving success and making a positive impact on people's lives. His leadership ethos, "Be the Weight Behind the Spear," emphasizes the importance of hard work, dedication, and a strong sense of purpose in achieving success.
As a physician, Dr. McConkey understands the importance of healthcare access and affordability for all Americans. He has seen firsthand the effects the opioid crisis has had across our country and is committed to working towards policies that will increase access to mental health and improve our healthcare system.In 2007, he deployed to Iraq to provide medevac support as a flight surgeon, later transferring to the Air Force Reserves to train as a Critical Care Air Transport physician. In 2019, Josh promoted to Colonel while serving at the rescue squadron in Portland, Oregon. After moving to North Carolina in 2012, Josh served his fellow veterans at the VA hospital in Durham and as an assistant Professor at Duke University.Josh and his wife, Elsa, have three children and now reside in Apex, North Carolina.
---

Newsmax’s National Report RAV’s Steve Gruber Show | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Experienced Leadership for North Carolina! | | Dr. (Colonel) Josh McConkey is a respected US Air Force Reserve Colonel, physician, and a passionate advocate for leadership and community service. He is running for Lt. Governor, committed to using his extensive military and medical experience to serve his constituents and strengthen our country.Dr. McConkey's leadership philosophy is rooted in his over two decades of service in various leadership roles in the military. He understands the importance of strong leadership in achieving success and making a positive impact on people's lives. His leadership ethos, "Be the Weight Behind the Spear," emphasizes the importance of hard work, dedication, and a strong sense of purpose in achieving success. As a physician, Dr. McConkey understands the importance of healthcare access and affordability for all Americans. He has seen firsthand the effects the opioid crisis has had across our country and is committed to working towards policies that will increase access to mental health and improve our healthcare system.In 2007, he deployed to Iraq to provide medevac support as a flight surgeon, later transferring to the Air Force Reserves to train as a Critical Care Air Transport physician. In 2019, Josh promoted to Colonel while serving at the rescue squadron in Portland, Oregon. After moving to North Carolina in 2012, Josh served his fellow veterans at the VA hospital in Durham and as an assistant Professor at Duke University.Josh and his wife, Elsa, have three children and now reside in Apex, North Carolina. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) |2026| |McConkey for Lt Governor|. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Go Heels!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
body:
The biggest and best rivalry in college sports.
| | | | |
---
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6938?t=6&akid=711%2E124072%2EBRhc_o)
Peter,
We’re just hours away from tip-off in tonight’s UNC-Duke basketball game (**_the_** biggest and best rivalry in college sports), and it’s got me thinking ... When I was Governor, folks often came up to me and said, “You’re the Governor of the whole state – how do you delicately handle all of these rivalries?”
My answer is simple: “I’m Roy Cooper, and I’m a Tar Heel.”
**You will know where I stand – when it comes to sports, and everything else.**
I’m running for Senate to make life better for working families across North Carolina – and whether you’re a Tar Heel, a Blue Devil or part of the Wolfpack, I’m fighting for you.
**_[If you’re ready to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue and fix what’s broken in Washington, will you chip in $5 to my grassroots campaign before the big game? I can’t do this without you.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6939?t=7&akid=711%2E124072%2EBRhc_o)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6938?t=8&akid=711%2E124072%2EBRhc_o)
---
Thank you,

Roy
| |
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=1&akid=711%2E124072%2EBRhc_o)**

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
The latest release of the Epstein files – and what it’s hiding
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874139/606227474/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjI5MjViZC02YjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xxosl_pAGeL46Sb_TTskN7zqAQw3x1nYdevxolVhWco=)
Recently, the Department of Justice released millions of pages related to Jeffrey Epstein — and then claimed the job was done.
It's not.
**The DOJ has now admitted it reviewed six million pages but chose to release only half. That is a direct violation of the law Congress passed requiring full disclosure. And it raises a disturbing question: what are they hiding — and who are they protecting?**
**[Add your name to my petition right now to demand the full release of the Epstein files and real accountability from the Trump DOJ.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874140/606227475/1627786981?refcode=260307_RG_doj-admits-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjI5MjViZC02YjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xxosl_pAGeL46Sb_TTskN7zqAQw3x1nYdevxolVhWco=&emci=bd40b231-631a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=c62925bd-6b1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=16877361)**
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874141/606227476/1627786981?refcode=260307_RG_doj-admits-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjI5MjViZC02YjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xxosl_pAGeL46Sb_TTskN7zqAQw3x1nYdevxolVhWco=&emci=bd40b231-631a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=c62925bd-6b1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=16877361)
Donald Trump has been obsessed with shutting down scrutiny of the Epstein case. Documents mentioning him have appeared, disappeared, and reappeared. Survivors’ names were left exposed. Meanwhile, the DOJ insists this is about “protecting victims.”
That’s simply not true.
We deserve answers. Survivors deserve accountability. And the law demands full compliance.
**That’s why I’m calling on the Department of Justice to immediately release all remaining Epstein files, submit its legally required report to Congress, and stop playing games with the truth.**
**[Please, sign your name on my petition right now to join the call.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874142/606227477/1627786981?refcode=260307_RG_doj-admits-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjI5MjViZC02YjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xxosl_pAGeL46Sb_TTskN7zqAQw3x1nYdevxolVhWco=&emci=bd40b231-631a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=c62925bd-6b1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=16877361)**
This investigation is not over. In fact, it's just beginning.
Robert Garcia
