name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: President Trump is lying about Portland
body:
I won’t let Trump lie about Portland.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874145/606227509/-569431239?refcode=260307-portland-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGRjYmQwNC02YzFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMsVq5z6U8KlSTBbX20Ai0zQVwAKTX6L9lPBUBss-ls=)
---
| | For months now, President Trump has been attacking Portland — misrepresenting our city, demonizing our neighbors, and using fear to score political points. And now we know how that narrative has been built.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874146/606227510/-569431239?refcode=260307-portland-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGRjYmQwNC02YzFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMsVq5z6U8KlSTBbX20Ai0zQVwAKTX6L9lPBUBss-ls=)
---
**_In other words, the outrage machine is lying about our city to scare people._** Trump has relied on this distorted coverage to claim Portland is “like living in hell,” to threaten sending in the National Guard, and to label Oregonians “paid terrorists” and “paid agitators.” _But that is not the Portland I know._ Portland is beautiful, vibrant, and resilient. It’s where families build their futures and communities come together. Like every major city, we face real challenges — but spreading lies about our city only makes them harder to solve. Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join me. Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject Donald Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874147/606227511/-2038292801?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGRjYmQwNC02YzFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMsVq5z6U8KlSTBbX20Ai0zQVwAKTX6L9lPBUBss-ls=&emci=38aae4db-6b1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=2ddcbd04-6c1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=30662126)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874148/606227512/-2038292801?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGRjYmQwNC02YzFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMsVq5z6U8KlSTBbX20Ai0zQVwAKTX6L9lPBUBss-ls=&emci=38aae4db-6b1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=2ddcbd04-6c1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=30662126)
---
No matter how long these attacks continue, Oregon will stand together and defend our values. Thank you, Tobias ReadSecretary of State, Oregon

clean_body: I won’t let Trump lie about Portland.| | | = | | For months now, President Trump has been attacking Portland — misrepresenting our city, demonizing our neighbors, and using fear to score political points. And now we know how that narrative has been built. = In other words, the outrage machine is lying about our city to scare people. Trump has relied on this distorted coverage to claim Portland is “like living in hell,” to threaten sending in the National Guard, and to label Oregonians “paid terrorists” and “paid agitators.” But that is not the Portland I know. Portland is beautiful, vibrant, and resilient. It’s where families build their futures and communities come together. Like every major city, we face real challenges — but spreading lies about our city only makes them harder to solve. Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing. No matter how long these attacks continue, Oregon will stand together and defend our values. Thank you, Tobias ReadSecretary of State, Oregon = = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Rose For Congress
subject: Major Milestone! And more...
body:
The voter guide gets us on the radar, But it’s the presence on the ground that wins elections.

| | | | | [|
---](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=1c28e9bbd4&e=8c53948e4c)
| | | | | |
## Another Campaign Milestone
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | Hi everyone,
**I have some incredible news to share** : we’ve filed our candidate statement of qualifications and will be featured in the official voter guides for **all nine counties** across the 2nd District!
This is a major milestone. It means that when voters sit down to do their research before casting their ballots, they will see our vision for a bolder future for People, Peace, and Planet as an alternative to the incumbent.
---
| [|
---](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=a70dba0891&e=8c53948e4c)
| |
**But while the voter guide gets us on the radar, it’s the presence on the ground that wins elections. We need to make sure that everywhere a voter looks—from the city centers to the rural roads—they see that there is a candidate fighting for them.**
[**As the only Bernie-Democrat in this race, we don’t have the corporate backing that others do. Our strength comes from our message and our visibility. Can you contribute a few dollars today so we can make sure Rose is seen and heard in all 9 counties of CA-02, from Del Norte County to Marin County and across the Northstate?**](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=90853f6268&e=8c53948e4c)
As Rose has been travelling across the District this week meeting voters, our volunteers have been hitting the phones and putting signs up, but we need to keep that momentum surging!
**This is about Medicare For All, holding the Epstein Class accountable, ending the wars, dismantling ICE, crushing corruption and bringing the power to the people, where it belongs. But our message only works if people hear it. Let’s make sure they can't miss it.**
[**If you donate using a link in this email, you’ll have the option to automatically RSVP a sign, join our sign install team, or just donate. Send a donation now to help our campaign spread across District 2.**](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=1358d2e978&e=8c53948e4c)
---
[|
---](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=6289703165&e=8c53948e4c)

In solidarity,Rose Penelope YeeCandidate, US Congress CA-02

Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. body:
I grew up in a small town where my parents would put Johnny Cash on the record player and crack open a Busch Light every now and then.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874533/606228515/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDZhNThlOC03MDFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=713NgT4gXoy5us38CGmvWg1kpYE7h_pkXey_yr97mug=)

Peter,

You know the old saying that **"you should vote for the candidate you could see yourself having a beer with?"** In politics, that line gets tossed around as a shortcut for likability.

**I grew up in a small town where my parents would put Johnny Cash on the record player and crack open a Busch Light every now and then.** Sometimes on a Friday after work, friends and family would come by to have a couple of beers with my parents, while the kids played hide and seek in the dark. Those were good times.

But I saw firsthand how that joy can dampen when the bills start piling up and nothing seems affordable anymore. I saw the quiet conversations after the music stopped, when the cost of groceries, gas prices, or whether or not someone can afford to keep the lights on, gave way to sighs of frustration.

That's what I'm hearing as I travel across our district. People aren't asking for anything extravagant. They want steadiness. They want an economy where they can grow. All they ask is for someone in Washington to see them. Instead, they see Mariannette Miller-Meeks standing with corporate donors and special interests while families are left wondering who is standing with them.

I'm not running to win a popularity contest or to convince you to grab a drink with me (although I wouldn’t mind that!). **I'm running in the hopes that one day, my work in Congress will make it easier for you to take some time to relax and enjoy life with your friends and loved ones.** Whether that means cracking open a cold one or sitting on the porch talking long after the sun goes down.

**[If that sounds like the kind of future you can get behind, make a donation to support my campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126874534/606228516/-2011951990?refcode=em26_260307_beer_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260307_beer_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6d6a58e8-701a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDZhNThlOC03MDFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=713NgT4gXoy5us38CGmvWg1kpYE7h_pkXey_yr97mug=)**

Thank you,

Christina

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

## Gold and Silver Prices Rocketed Mining Value in Alaska to All-Time High in 2025 – RedState
Up here in the Great Land, we are nowhere near tired of winning yet. Market prices for gold and silver are rising, and while that may have mixed effects on some aspects of the financial markets, it’s pretty great for Alaska miners. The output of Alaska’s mines shot to new heights in 2025. name: Voter Action Project
subject: MAGA's bills keep getting worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: House Republicans propose stricter voting requirements as Trump administration eyes the midterms [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=030726_1&amount=25]
Folks, we've been warning you about the SAVE Act since it was introduced, since it's a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote.
Well, there's a new champion in the " anti-voting legislation " category with the introduction of the Make Elections Great Again (MEGA) Act. The new bill goes far beyond even the SAVE Act, with the MEGA Act now being called " the most extreme voting restrictions ever proposed at the federal level ."
The name also tells you everything you need to know about the target audience for this bill. With Trump focused on re-litigating the 2020 election, this legislation would give him all the power he would need to take federal control of the upcoming midterms .
PITCH IN $35 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE MEGA ACT ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=030726_1&amount=35]
While the SAVE Act focused almost exclusively on requiring voters to produce documentary proof of citizenship when registering, the MEGA Act is far more sweeping. It would:
* Impose a strict photo ID requirement to vote
* Create a centralized voter surveillance system in every state
* Mandate constant voter roll purges, gutting the “Motor Voter” law that expanded access to voter registration
* Bar states from counting ballots that arrive after Election Day
* Ban universal mail voting, in which states mail a ballot to all registered voters
* Bar the federal funding for voter registration by outside groups
* Unleash lawsuits against election officials
Estimates said the SAVE Act could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. The MEGA Act would be much, much worse.
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop the MEGA Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=030726_1&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=030726_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=030726_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=030726_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=030726_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=030726_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=030726_1&amount=35]
The scariest parts of the MEGA Act are how it goes after so much more than proof-of-citizenship at registration. States aren't mandated to provide ID to eligible citizens, but the MEGA Act would require citizens to show the right kind of ID every time they went to vote. This creates inequality, like in Texas, where you can vote with a hunting license ( which doesn't require proof of citizenship ) but you can't vote with a college photo ID.
This bill targets voter registration as well, demanding that eligible voters re-prove their citizenship every election, while also requiring states to " take affirmative steps... on an ongoing basis " every 30 days to check and verify their voter rolls. How would they check them? Using a nationwide federal database controlled by MAGA partisans, of course . And the bill calls for all these measures to be in place before we vote in November's general election.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights said about the SAVE Act. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
His words ring even more true about the MEGA Act. This bill is nothing less than an all-out partisan assault on our fundamental right to vote . If made law, this bill would codify MAGA's power for decades to come, invalidating millions of eligible voters and ending our democracy for a generation or longer.
None of us can afford to sit on the sidelines, Team, and watch our fundamental right to vote die. Fight back against these cynical vote suppressors with $35 or whatever you can before it's too late >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=030726_1&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=030726_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=030726_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] ABC: House Republicans propose stricter voting requirements as Trump administration eyes the midterms [] Folks, we've been warning you about the SAVE Act since it was introduced, since it's a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote. Well, there's a new champion in the " anti-voting legislation " category with the introduction of the Make Elections Great Again (MEGA) Act. The new bill goes far beyond even the SAVE Act, with the MEGA Act now being called " the most extreme voting restrictions ever proposed at the federal level ." The name also tells you everything you need to know about the target audience for this bill. With Trump focused on re-litigating the 2020 election, this legislation would give him all the power he would need to take federal control of the upcoming midterms . PITCH IN $35 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE MEGA ACT ➜ [] While the SAVE Act focused almost exclusively on requiring voters to produce documentary proof of citizenship when registering, the MEGA Act is far more sweeping. It would: Impose a strict photo ID requirement to vote Create a centralized voter surveillance system in every state Mandate constant voter roll purges, gutting the “Motor Voter” law that expanded access to voter registration Bar states from counting ballots that arrive after Election Day Ban universal mail voting, in which states mail a ballot to all registered voters Bar the federal funding for voter registration by outside groups * Unleash lawsuits against election officials Estimates said the SAVE Act could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. The MEGA Act would be much, much worse. Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop the MEGA Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] The scariest parts of the MEGA Act are how it goes after so much more than proof-of-citizenship at registration. States aren't mandated to provide ID to eligible citizens, but the MEGA Act would require citizens to show the right kind of ID every time they went to vote. This creates inequality, like in Texas, where you can vote with a hunting license ( which doesn't require proof of citizenship ) but you can't vote with a college photo ID. This bill targets voter registration as well, demanding that eligible voters re-prove their citizenship every election, while also requiring states to " take affirmative steps... on an ongoing basis " every 30 days to check and verify their voter rolls. How would they check them? Using a nationwide federal database controlled by MAGA partisans, of course . And the bill calls for all these measures to be in place before we vote in November's general election. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights said about the SAVE Act. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” His words ring even more true about the MEGA Act. This bill is nothing less than an all-out partisan assault on our fundamental right to vote . If made law, this bill would codify MAGA's power for decades to come, invalidating millions of eligible voters and ending our democracy for a generation or longer. None of us can afford to sit on the sidelines, Team, and watch our fundamental right to vote die. Fight back against these cynical vote suppressors with $35 or whatever you can before it's too late >> [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: Caitlin Rourk
subject: If we’re serious about flipping this seat…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
It’s time to move now.
| Hi friend, Caitlin Rourk here, and the Voter Protection Project said I could reach out.

Earlier this week, I became the Democratic nominee for Congress in TX-10.

And now, we get to work. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104392?t=6&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM) This race is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to flip this seat. For the first time in 20 years, it’s an open seat, and that changes everything.

A window like this is rare. And if we use it wisely, it could decide this race.

[Will you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign right now so we can immediately start building our general election operation?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104393?t=7&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM)

We won this primary the same way we intend to win in November: with people power.

I’m a mom, an Army veteran, and a proud Texan. I’ve worn combat boots and packed school lunches. I’ve balanced service and family. I know what working families are up against because I live it.

Central Texas deserves leadership that listens, shows up, and gets things done, not politics as usual.

Over the next few months, we’re defining this race. We’re introducing our campaign to voters on our terms, building a volunteer army, and locking in support well before the election in November.

We earned this moment, and now we need to make it count.

[So I’m asking again, friend: will you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help us seize this once-in-a-generation opportunity?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104393?t=8&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Caitlin Rourk and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104394?t=9&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104395?t=10&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104396?t=11&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104397?t=12&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/104398?t=13&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM)
This race is winnable. And we’re not wasting a single day.

Let’s get to work.

— Caitlin
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=23204%2E878179%2EQS_QrM)

name: Dr. Jasmeet Bains
subject: The impacts of policy that falls short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jasmeet Bains for Congress
body:
As a family doctor, I see people of every age, of every profession, of every race, and every socioeconomic class.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126875208/606231083/981257658?refcode=header-img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY2ZGU2MzEtNzYxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8WyJOn9UV5FOMkfAEoUffkRTsS75iRC4VPHuwu-7JWg=)
---
Friend,

As a doctor, **I see the impacts of policy that falls short every day at work.**

After finishing my medical training, I wanted to be a part of the solution to improve access to healthcare in rural areas.

As a family doctor, I see people of every age, of every profession, of every race, and every socioeconomic class. I take care of people who have lifelong chronic illnesses, who struggle with mental health, and who are grappling with affording healthcare.

And serving as the Chief Medical Officer for the Central Valley, I’ve been deployed during fires to take care of firefighters. When I’m deployed, I’m the only doctor with a team of EMTs and a couple of nurses.

[My experiences have shaped my views on policy on issues including accessible and affordable healthcare and emergency preparedness, and it’s why I’m running for Congress. CA-22 needs to send a doctor to Congress. Will you support my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126875209/606231084/-4170759?amount=25&refcode=jbfc_20260307_emdf_e1_t0_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY2ZGU2MzEtNzYxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8WyJOn9UV5FOMkfAEoUffkRTsS75iRC4VPHuwu-7JWg=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126875210/606231085/-4170759?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=jbfc_20260307_emdf_e1_t0_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY2ZGU2MzEtNzYxYS1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8WyJOn9UV5FOMkfAEoUffkRTsS75iRC4VPHuwu-7JWg=)

clean_body: As a family doctor, I see people of every age, of every profession, of every race, and every socioeconomic class. | = Friend, As a doctor, I see the impacts of policy that falls short every day at work. After finishing my medical training, I wanted to be a part of the solution to improve access to healthcare in rural areas. As a family doctor, I see people of every age, of every profession, of every race, and every socioeconomic class. I take care of people who have lifelong chronic illnesses, who struggle with mental health, and who are grappling with affording healthcare. And serving as the Chief Medical Officer for the Central Valley, I’ve been deployed during fires to take care of firefighters. When I’m deployed, I’m the only doctor with a team of EMTs and a couple of nurses. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Dr. Jasmeet Bains | | Paid for by Dr. Jasmeet Bains for Congress (www.drjasmeetbains.com) 8200 Stockdale HWY STE M-10 #252 Bakersfield, CA 93311 Please, consider making a =. body:
polls show voters are increasingly fed up with Trump’s chaos

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2385%2E49239%2EwhAvty)

Null, this is important:

We're about a month into Donald Trump's second year being back in office, and we need to know what this grassroots team thinks of the Trump administration's actions so far. **[We launched a one-click poll, and we need 3,000 responses by midnight tonight:](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/14925?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=2385%2E49239%2EwhAvty)**
**DO YOU APPROVE OF DONALD TRUMP?**

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: March e-Newsletter
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ea99322ca3d7/march-e-newsletter?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | **2026 March e-newsletter**
####
---
|
* County installs purple Narcan boxes to combat overdose deaths

* Caltrain honored for electrification, secures $50M loan to stay afloat as voters weigh tax measure
* Youth with Unitedly help county usher in Lunar New Year
* Illegal fence removed at Thornton State Beach

---
| | |
---
|
# “The beach belongs to the public and today marks the beginning of the end of Lucky Luke’s defiance and intimidation as Daly City begins to dismantle and haul away his monstrous, threatening fence that was erected in violation of the California Coastal Act.”
# **\- Supervisor David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2026 March e-newsletter** **Illegal fence removed at Thornton State Beach** Dear friends, I was proud to join Daly City officials and horseback riders at Thornton State Beach Feb. 20 as an illegal fence erected by “Lucky” Luke Brugnara was dismantled. Brugnara is a convicted felon facing federal charges in a pandemic-relief related fraud scheme who was also recently arrested by Daly City police for being a felon in possession of a firearm. It was a day for the walkers and horseback riders to reclaim access to Thornton State Beach which was restricted for a month by an illegal fence erected by a con man and swindler. The beach belongs to the public and the fence was erected in violation of the California Coastal Act. There is only one trail down to the beach from Olympic Way in Daly City. This multi-use trail is a popular destination for recreation extending from the scenic bluffs and cliffs overlooking Thornton State Beach all the way down to the water. As a nearby resident, I routinely hike down to the beach from the parking area at the end of Thornton Beach Loop but the chain link fence restricted trail access to the beach for more than a month. The I-Team’s Dan Noyes has been working on an extensive story with the owners of the property who say that Brugnara has taken advantage of tensions in the family that owns much of the land leading to Thornton State Beach. The story also indicates the transfer of one small slice he got “for free” may not be legal in the first place, which the San Mateo County District Attorney’s Office is now investigating. See the ABC story here: [https://abc7news.com/post/felony-charges-filed-thornton-state-beach-fence-case-new-questions-real-estate-investor/18659658/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=7ca2c22225&e=c0babbc643 "https://abc7news.com/post/felony-charges-filed-thornton-state-beach-fence-case-new-questions-real-estate-investor/18659658/")
**Youth with Unitedly help county usher in Lunar New Year**

It was my honor to sponsor a proclamation last month recognizing Feb. 17 as Lunar New Year in San Mateo County and to present the proclamation to several youth from the nonprofit Unitedly.

Unitedly is one of the few organizations in the county dedicated specifically to advancing equity for Asian families and communities.

Unitedly strengthens Asian communities and the broader community by increasing visibility, support, and participation across education, civic life and local systems. It works alongside residents, government and community agencies to ensure systems are inclusive, culturally and linguistically responsive and accessible.

Lunar New Year is a time of renewal, reflection, and hope. It is a celebration rooted in family, tradition, and the passing down of culture from one generation to the next.

As we welcome the Year of the Horse, a symbol of strength, hard work, and progress, may we carry those same qualities forward as we continue building a county where every family feels seen, valued and at home.

Special thanks to Jace Lam and Owen Chan who gave the Board of Supervisors a presentation on the item and to Noah Chan, Koji Suzuki, Dexter Tay and Kiara Nitao who joined them during the presentation.
I also want to acknowledge Alyson Suzuki and Conny Zhu with Unitedly, as well as the students’ families who attended the meeting. With that, Happy Lunar New Year! **Caltrain honored for electrification, secures $50M loan to stay afloat as voters weigh tax measure**

Caltrain has secured a $50 million loan from the Metropolitan Transportation Commission to stay afloat for another year as it waits for voters to decide a long-term regional tax measure on the November ballot that if approved will keep the rail line solvent for years to come.

The loan comes on the heels of Caltrain being honored by the General Contractors of California for its electrification project. Caltrain received the Owner of the Year Award, while Caltrain contractor Balfour Beatty US received the award for a Heavy Civil Project with a budget over $100 Million and the Excellence in Partnering Award.

The event recognized award-winning construction projects and industry leaders from across the state, highlighting excellence in safety, collaboration, and the delivery of critical infrastructure that strengthens California’s communities.

These are not the first awards given to the Electrification Project since I joined the Caltrain Board of Directors last year. Caltrain received the 2025 Sustainability Award from Sustainable San Mateo County, the American Public Transit Association’s Commuter Rail Safety Gold Award and the Build America Highway & Transportation Renovation Award from the Associated General Contractors of America. Kudos to Caltrain for being the fastest-growing transit agency in the country. **County installs purple Narcan boxes to combat overdose deaths**

San Mateo County is taking a new approach to reduce overdoses by installing purple boxes stocked with free Narcan at transit hubs and public spaces.

Thank you to Dr. Ronni Brown with San Mateo County Behavioral Health and Recovery Services who says Narcan should be in everyone’s first aid kit just like aspirin is.

Health officials purchased 21 purple boxes to be distributed throughout the county, including at the Redwood City Transit Center, a major hub for SamTrans buses and people experiencing homelessness.

There have been multiple overdoses at Sequoia Station in recent years which prompted BHRS to install a purple box at the transit hub. Each purple box holds up to 72 free Narcan doses with instructions on how to use them.

Funding comes from legal settlements with opioid manufacturers and distributors and the majority of SamTrans bus drivers and staff are trained in how to use Narcan, according to BHRS.

San Mateo County has had its share of accidental overdoses, with 2021 being the worst year at 120 deaths. The county says Narcan is partly responsible for fewer deaths in 2024, when 54 people died. See a news report here about the county’s effort to combat overdoses: [https://abc7news.com/post/san-mateo-county-installs-purple-narcan-boxes-help-prevent-overdose-deaths-heres-look-how-works/18641775/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=2e52c2c23d&e=c0babbc643) In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
San Mateo County Board of Supervisors
---
| | | |
---
| _Copyright © 2026 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=9cd3abf02c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=9cd3abf02c).

This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.
**_[So my good friend Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I got to talking. clean_body: way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1baf1fb-1eed-49c6-b44f-90f1042c718f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's easy to loose hope. Especially in today's environment . It's so tense and feels like the whole world is sighing and taking a long breath. Waiting to exhale for another 50 something days until the election. We are tense and on the defense waiting for what our future holds. We are loosing a grip on reality and America feels like it's about to slide off a cliff. We are all watching our beautiful city on a hill fall from within.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.NhMaSGjK-Pj6CIakOcIkS7ZKqVzEUUVSRhQjzCtQgXc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=190219097)
It feels hopeless at times and scary. I watch the news daily wanting to be informed, but after I watch I feel an unease and have a negative feeling the rest of the day pondering what in Gods great earth is going on or going to happen?!

There are two candidates that are offering change, but I feel like hope is deferred. I feel a sense of sadness barely holding on. Will there be change or have we been seeing the decay of society long past the recovery stage?

I know this post sounds down and out because I'm usually talking about hope and creativity. There is another prospective though. **This is not news to God**. He isn't surprised by this conundrum we have found ourselves in. He expected this.

Remember the late 70s early 80s with Jimmy Carter? We were in about the same state of affairs. High interest rates, long gas lines, hostages, a weak leader as president and a feeling of malaise. Even though I was very young I could still feel the angst and stress from my parents. It's like the whole world was sighing.
Then all of a sudden an amazing strong leader came onto the scene that took charge, cleaned house and kicked butt! He offered Hope and a sense of unity, strength and American patriotism. Ronald Reagan. The USA slowly but surely got back on track.

America is strong. We have seen so many ups and downs and weathered the storms.

The reason why? We still cling to hope and faith. Those 2 emotions stem from God's love. God is hope. He is in control and knows each of our needs and our hearts. This country was built upon Judeo/Christian values. That is why it has worked. That is the only reason it has worked.
Where there is God there is freedom and liberty. Without Him we don't have either.
Cling to God. The author of life, liberty and freedom.

Work hard, do the right thing, pray and somehow God will turn this county around. I still continue to have hope.
Join me in this faith walk. Long live Hope, Freedom and America!

Flamingo salad
**INGREDIENTS**
* I can Cherry Pie filling
* I large can crushed pineapple (drained)
* I can eagle brand sweetened condensed milk
* 2 cups mini marshmallows
* I cup Chopped pecans
* I 8oz tub of cool whip

**DIRECTIONS**
Mix together folding in gently. Refrigerate for 2 hours then serve. Enjoy!

_Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer._

clean_body: Let’s fuel this campaign straight through November. | = Peter, This week, Gina Hinojosa WON her competitive primary race for governor. This victory proves what we’ve known all along: Gina is exactly the right leader to defeat a radical Republican and flip the Texas governor’s office in 2026. Now comes the hardest part: winning in November. She’s up against wildly unpopular Republican Gov. Greg Abbott, but he has near endless financial resources. 2026 can be the year we flip Texas — but only if we invest early and build real momentum now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, EMILYs List | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. clean_body: | | | Peter — If you care about protecting our border, DO NOT SKIP THIS. This is Abraham Enriquez. And now I’m honored and humbled to announce that the National Border Patrol Council , the official union representing the brave men and women who guard our southern border, officially endorsed me! These are the heroes who put their lives on the line every single day. They’re arresting the: >> CRIMINAL ILLEGAL ALIENS >> GANG MEMBERS >> HUMAN TRAFFICKERS Who terrorize our streets and poison our communities with deadly fentanyl. They know who’s all talk and who will actually fight for them in Congress. Because they know I stand with President Trump 100%. I will cement Trump’s border policies into permanent law. I will never back down, never apologize, and never let the Radical Left open our borders again. Border security is national security. A nation that cannot control its border is a nation that will not survive. Dark money billionaires like George Soros DUMPED MILLIONS into Texas because they understand one truth. If they flip this seat, they flip the House, and Trump’s entire America First agenda collapses onto life support. , we can DEFEND our BORDER and ensure President Trump has the backup he needs in Congress. Peter, this is one of the most important races in America right now. I’m counting on you. Super Tuesday victories prove our ground game is already delivering results early in the season.
**This isn't luck.**
It's the relentless work of our grassroots army: ballot chasers knocking doors, registering new conservatives, and turning out voters in key districts and battleground states across the country.
But the expenses associated with training chasers, mapping precincts, and mobilizing volunteers continue to rack up. We rely on patriots like you to fund these initiatives and take our efforts to the next level.

For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Peter, I apologize for the raw honesty, but I have been speaking with the top brass, and the prognosis isn't good. The liberals know this is the _most_ important Senate race in the country, and they are pouring in a tsunami of outside money to block President Trump’s agenda. Honestly, I’m distraught. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126876519/606234574/2072070277?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.03.07_Humble-Beginnings_B3_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmI3M2FiNy03ZjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GGyHigsWrqR475z0zSkjXVdZ6dWOGXBnKbqUbUvcmZ8=)
These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can [unsubscribe here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/K-_-4uI0EkWyg9pVsZKBKQ2?unsubscribedata=SjOjUDZdyOtQmxUyvIFVbDN3s2AENYRB%2FXNA7fZ6IUrEUD9QXDagvk1QEtec3uNzqk8E%2BS0bPCJD6axR9WPfMapbKT89DqYbKNlWItjZa%2BKS20Bzt9H%2BuS3jCmKGR0tqIbidVuliQX%2FpATxtk1JbXcLtaO2pJi7lT1YnRWK0b3%2BdX09wZp7Xzpr8iy%2B5gLHRiYbcmVIKs9br6x0t1lzd9Sfh%2FwtG6FCfVZhIgfZ367tlCMVOFfVbpCR4wMxWKKvtgUqfMBUl%2BWBZ0GpUv4yHTRHPCzHJX1kehZ4O1Vhx%2Fzp3SmHBVqfwM2GizxP7NUTrgi4P6gCTHH71cHwRtRYguWqpuMZQJmINBgbYzs18dnSCklqgoKCwvP4hO6Auysli7i9FqO7gxv6IvvzuVwLzDuF27zda8Tkl7FSTYTFkxQOgiNvY4dCaGVXAxpG%2BBW53).
Peter, I know there are a lot of emails in your inbox, but this isn't a typical fundraising email. If you have a couple of minutes, I'd like to share my story with you. My parents immigrated to the U.S. from India when I was a baby in search of the American Dream and a better life for their kids. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126876520/606234575/-2026962184?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.03.07_Humble-Beginnings_B3_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmI3M2FiNy03ZjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GGyHigsWrqR475z0zSkjXVdZ6dWOGXBnKbqUbUvcmZ8=) They worked incredibly hard to achieve that dream. But when my father lost his income, we fell on hard times. We lived in public housing and depended on food stamps to eat. I got my first job delivering newspapers, and worked at McDonald’s to help put myself through college. And thanks to support from our community and excellent public schools, I went on to graduate from law school and become Illinois' first Indian-American Congressman. **So Peter, I don't come from wealth or power. I come from humble beginnings. ** I'm a product of what happens when our government services, like public schools and food stamps, work as they should. So when Donald Trump goes after essential, life-saving programs, when he launches an assault on immigrant families – _I take it personally._ **I'm running for Senate because I refuse to let everything that made my story possible be ripped to shreds by this out-of-control President.** But I can't do this alone. If you’re ready to send an unmistakable message that this country REJECTS Trump’s cruelty and chaos, then I'm asking for just $3 today. [**_My election is just 10 days away, and every dollar you can spare really counts right now. All I’m asking for is $3, Peter, and I’d really appreciate it if you could make that work before midnight. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126876521/606234576/-2026962184?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.03.07_Humble-Beginnings_B3_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmI3M2FiNy03ZjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GGyHigsWrqR475z0zSkjXVdZ6dWOGXBnKbqUbUvcmZ8=) | | [ DONATE $3 → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126876522/606234577/-2026962184?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.03.07_Humble-Beginnings_B3_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmI3M2FiNy03ZjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GGyHigsWrqR475z0zSkjXVdZ6dWOGXBnKbqUbUvcmZ8=)

Thanks for standing with me,
Raja Krishnamoorthi
| Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class.

clean_body: = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can . Peter, I know there are a lot of emails in your inbox, but this isn't a typical fundraising email. If you have a couple of minutes, I'd like to share my story with you. My parents immigrated to the U.S. from India when I was a baby in search of the American Dream and a better life for their kids. = They worked incredibly hard to achieve that dream. But when my father lost his income, we fell on hard times. We lived in public housing and depended on food stamps to eat. I got my first job delivering newspapers, and worked at McDonald’s to help put myself through college. And thanks to support from our community and excellent public schools, I went on to graduate from law school and become Illinois' first Indian-American Congressman. So Peter, I don't come from wealth or power. I come from humble beginnings. I'm a product of what happens when our government services, like public schools and food stamps, work as they should. So when Donald Trump goes after essential, life-saving programs, when he launches an assault on immigrant families – I take it personally. I'm running for Senate because I refuse to let everything that made my story possible be ripped to shreds by this out-of-control President. But I can't do this alone. If you’re ready to send an unmistakable message that this country REJECTS Trump’s cruelty and chaos, then I'm asking for just $3 today. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for standing with me, Raja Krishnamoorthi | Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class. But Republicans will spend MILLIONS to flip this seat red. We need every single person reading this email to do their part to fight back against Trump and Flip the Senate Majority BLUE. = | | = | = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Trump talking smack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Peter –– Donald Trump came to Georgia.
The White House sent him here to do damage control on tariffs and health care.
But he just couldn’t help himself: instead of trying to defend his price-inflating tariffs and insurance-premium-doubling health care policy, he resorted to repeating conspiracy theories about the 2020 election — an election he lost in Georgia despite pressuring Georgia election officials to “find” him more votes.
Maybe he’s been watching the rallies I’ve been holding across Georgia, where thousands have turned out in opposition to his corruption and depravity. Because he took a moment to throw some insults my way.
Now, Donald Trump has been insulting me for a long time. But this time, it didn’t seem like his heart was in it. I think you could see in his eyes and hear in his voice that he knows he’s lost the American people. That he knows his Presidency is slipping away. That he can feel Georgians, and people nationwide, preparing to deliver a decisive rebuke of historic abuses of power.
Because as I travel across Georgia, what I hear is more and more people of every background and belief reject Trump’s chaos and corruption. And it's not just Democrats and independents. It’s Republicans too!
More and more Republicans take me aside, or they call me on the phone. They tell me they don’t like where this President has taken us. And they tell me they’re going to support a Democrat for the first time.
But here’s the thing: as he gets more desperate, his abuses become more dangerous. From sending Tulsi Gabbard on ballot raids in Fulton County, Georgia, to threatening a national takeover of elections, we have to be ready for anything.
We have to turn out LANDSLIDE margins of victory ... victories so decisive that no scheme or plot hatched in the White House can foil the will of the people.
And we have to defend voting rights with unprecedented tenacity and resources.
**I need your help to do these things.**
**[If you’re able to, please split $10 right now between Heartland Patriots and my reelection campaign for U.S. Senate. Most people donate $30 but any amount is a big help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101444?refcode=em20260307-10144&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=10&t=1&akid=10144%2E614464%2E1soQDz)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101444?refcode=em20260307-10144&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10144%2E614464%2E1soQDz)**
Remember — in 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat here couldn’t be done. We built the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and we won. That victory secured the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. We will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
Thanks for your help with this,
Jon

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=3&akid=10144%2E614464%2E1soQDz). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.
